3245
3246#include <string>
3247
3248namespace Catch {
3249
3250 struct TagAlias;
3251
3252 struct ITagAliasRegistry {
3253 virtual ~ITagAliasRegistry();
3254 // Nullptr if not present
3255 virtual TagAlias const* find( std::string const& alias ) const = 0;
3256 virtual std::string expandAliases( std::string const& unexpandedTestSpec ) const = 0;
3257
3258 static ITagAliasRegistry const& get();
3259 };
3260
3261} // end namespace Catch
3262
3263// end catch_interfaces_tag_alias_registry.h
3264namespace Catch {
3265
3266 class TestSpecParser {
3267 enum Mode{ None, Name, QuotedName, Tag, EscapedName };
3268 Mode m_mode = None;
3269 bool m_exclusion = false;
3270 std::size_t m_start = std::string::npos, m_pos = 0;
3271 std::string m_arg;
3272 std::vector<std::size_t> m_escapeChars;
3273 TestSpec::Filter m_currentFilter;
3274 TestSpec m_testSpec;
3275 ITagAliasRegistry const* m_tagAliases = nullptr;
3276
3277 public:
3278 TestSpecParser( ITagAliasRegistry const& tagAliases );
3279
3280 TestSpecParser& parse( std::string const& arg );
3281 TestSpec testSpec();
3282
3283 private:
3284 void visitChar( char c );
3285 void startNewMode( Mode mode, std::size_t start );
3286 void escape();
3287 std::string subString() const;
3288
3289 template<typename T>
3290 void addPattern() {
3291 std::string token = subString();
3292 for( std::size_t i = 0; i < m_escapeChars.size(); ++i )
3293 token = token.substr( 0, m_escapeChars[i]-m_start-i ) + token.substr( m_escapeChars[i]-m_start-i+1 );
3294 m_escapeChars.clear();
3295 if( startsWith( token, "exclude:" ) ) {
3296 m_exclusion = true;
3297 token = token.substr( 8 );
3298 }
3299 if( !token.empty() ) {
3300 TestSpec::PatternPtr pattern = std::make_shared<T>( token );
3301 if( m_exclusion )
3302 pattern = std::make_shared<TestSpec::ExcludedPattern>( pattern );
3303 m_currentFilter.m_patterns.push_back( pattern );
3304 }
3305 m_exclusion = false;
3306 m_mode = None;
3307 }
3308
3309 void addFilter();
3310 };
3311 TestSpec parseTestSpec( std::string const& arg );
3312
3313} // namespace Catch
3314
3315#ifdef __clang__
3316#pragma clang diagnostic pop
3317#endif
3318
3319// end catch_test_spec_parser.h

3321
3322#include <iosfwd>
3323#include <string>
3324#include <vector>
3325#include <memory>
3326
3327namespace Catch {
3328
3329 enum class Verbosity {
3330 Quiet = 0,
3331 Normal,
3332 High
3333 };
3334
3335 struct WarnAbout { enum What {
3336 Nothing = 0x00,
3337 NoAssertions = 0x01,
3338 NoTests = 0x02
3339 }; };
3340
3341 struct ShowDurations { enum OrNot {
3342 DefaultForReporter,
3343 Always,
3344 Never
3345 }; };
3346 struct RunTests { enum InWhatOrder {
3347 InDeclarationOrder,
3348 InLexicographicalOrder,
3349 InRandomOrder
3350 }; };
3351 struct UseColour { enum YesOrNo {
3352 Auto,
3353 Yes,
3354 No
3355 }; };
3356 struct WaitForKeypress { enum When {
3357 Never,
3358 BeforeStart = 1,
3359 BeforeExit = 2,
3360 BeforeStartAndExit = BeforeStart | BeforeExit
3361 }; };
3362
3363 class TestSpec;
3364
3365 struct IConfig : NonCopyable {
3366
3367 virtual ~IConfig();
3368
3369 virtual bool allowThrows() const = 0;
3370 virtual std::ostream& stream() const = 0;
3371 virtual std::string name() const = 0;
3372 virtual bool includeSuccessfulResults() const = 0;
3373 virtual bool shouldDebugBreak() const = 0;
3374 virtual bool warnAboutMissingAssertions() const = 0;
3375 virtual bool warnAboutNoTests() const = 0;
3376 virtual int abortAfter() const = 0;
3377 virtual bool showInvisibles() const = 0;
3378 virtual ShowDurations::OrNot showDurations() const = 0;
3379 virtual TestSpec const& testSpec() const = 0;
3380 virtual bool hasTestFilters() const = 0;
3381 virtual RunTests::InWhatOrder runOrder() const = 0;
3382 virtual unsigned int rngSeed() const = 0;
3383 virtual int benchmarkResolutionMultiple() const = 0;
3384 virtual UseColour::YesOrNo useColour() const = 0;
3385 virtual std::vector<std::string> const& getSectionsToRun() const = 0;
3386 virtual Verbosity verbosity() const = 0;
3387 };
3388
3389 using IConfigPtr = std::shared_ptr<IConfig const>;
3390}
3391
3392// end catch_interfaces_config.h

3394
3395#include <memory>
3396#include <vector>
3397#include <string>
3398
3399#ifndef CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH
3400#define CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH 80
3401#endif
3402
3403namespace Catch {
3404
3405 struct IStream;
3406
3407 struct ConfigData {
3408 bool listTests = false;
3409 bool listTags = false;
3410 bool listReporters = false;
3411 bool listTestNamesOnly = false;
3412
3413 bool showSuccessfulTests = false;
3414 bool shouldDebugBreak = false;
3415 bool noThrow = false;
3416 bool showHelp = false;
3417 bool showInvisibles = false;
3418 bool filenamesAsTags = false;
3419 bool libIdentify = false;
3420
3421 int abortAfter = -1;
3422 unsigned int rngSeed = 0;
3423 int benchmarkResolutionMultiple = 100;
3424
3425 Verbosity verbosity = Verbosity::Normal;
3426 WarnAbout::What warnings = WarnAbout::Nothing;
3427 ShowDurations::OrNot showDurations = ShowDurations::DefaultForReporter;
3428 RunTests::InWhatOrder runOrder = RunTests::InDeclarationOrder;
3429 UseColour::YesOrNo useColour = UseColour::Auto;
3430 WaitForKeypress::When waitForKeypress = WaitForKeypress::Never;
3431
3432 std::string outputFilename;
3433 std::string name;
3434 std::string processName;
3435#ifndef CATCH_CONFIG_DEFAULT_REPORTER
3436#define CATCH_CONFIG_DEFAULT_REPORTER "console"
3437#endif
3438 std::string reporterName = CATCH_CONFIG_DEFAULT_REPORTER;
3439#undef CATCH_CONFIG_DEFAULT_REPORTER
3440
3441 std::vector<std::string> testsOrTags;
3442 std::vector<std::string> sectionsToRun;
3443 };
3444
3445 class Config : public IConfig {
3446 public:
3447
3448 Config() = default;
3449 Config( ConfigData const& data );
3450 virtual ~Config() = default;
3451
3452 std::string const& getFilename() const;
3453
3454 bool listTests() const;
3455 bool listTestNamesOnly() const;
3456 bool listTags() const;
3457 bool listReporters() const;
3458
3459 std::string getProcessName() const;
3460 std::string const& getReporterName() const;
3461
3462 std::vector<std::string> const& getTestsOrTags() const;
3463 std::vector<std::string> const& getSectionsToRun() const override;
3464
3465 virtual TestSpec const& testSpec() const override;
3466 bool hasTestFilters() const override;
3467
3468 bool showHelp() const;
3469
3470 // IConfig interface
3471 bool allowThrows() const override;
3472 std::ostream& stream() const override;
3473 std::string name() const override;
3474 bool includeSuccessfulResults() const override;
3475 bool warnAboutMissingAssertions() const override;
3476 bool warnAboutNoTests() const override;
3477 ShowDurations::OrNot showDurations() const override;
3478 RunTests::InWhatOrder runOrder() const override;
3479 unsigned int rngSeed() const override;
3480 int benchmarkResolutionMultiple() const override;
3481 UseColour::YesOrNo useColour() const override;
3482 bool shouldDebugBreak() const override;
3483 int abortAfter() const override;
3484 bool showInvisibles() const override;
3485 Verbosity verbosity() const override;
3486
3487 private:
3488
3489 IStream const* openStream();
3490 ConfigData m_data;
3491
3492 std::unique_ptr<IStream const> m_stream;
3493 TestSpec m_testSpec;
3494 bool m_hasTestFilters = false;
3495 };
3496
3497} // end namespace Catch
3498
3499// end catch_config.hpp

3502#include <string>
3503
3504namespace Catch {
3505
3506 struct AssertionResultData
3507 {
3508 AssertionResultData() = delete;
3509
3510 AssertionResultData( ResultWas::OfType _resultType, LazyExpression const& _lazyExpression );
3511
3512 std::string message;
3513 mutable std::string reconstructedExpression;
3514 LazyExpression lazyExpression;
3515 ResultWas::OfType resultType;
3516
3517 std::string reconstructExpression() const;
3518 };
3519
3520 class AssertionResult {
3521 public:
3522 AssertionResult() = delete;
3523 AssertionResult( AssertionInfo const& info, AssertionResultData const& data );
3524
3525 bool isOk() const;
3526 bool succeeded() const;
3527 ResultWas::OfType getResultType() const;
3528 bool hasExpression() const;
3529 bool hasMessage() const;
3530 std::string getExpression() const;
3531 std::string getExpressionInMacro() const;
3532 bool hasExpandedExpression() const;
3533 std::string getExpandedExpression() const;
3534 std::string getMessage() const;
3535 SourceLineInfo getSourceInfo() const;
3536 StringRef getTestMacroName() const;
3537
3538 //protected:
3539 AssertionInfo m_info;
3540 AssertionResultData m_resultData;
3541 };
3542
3543} // end namespace Catch
3544
3545// end catch_assertionresult.h
3546// start catch_option.hpp
3547
3548namespace Catch {
3549
3550 // An optional type
3551 template<typename T>
3552 class Option {
3553 public:
3554 Option() : nullableValue( nullptr ) {}
3555 Option( T const& _value )
3556 : nullableValue( new( storage ) T( _value ) )
3557 {}
3558 Option( Option const& _other )
3559 : nullableValue( _other ? new( storage ) T( *_other ) : nullptr )
3560 {}
3561
3562 ~Option() {
3563 reset();
3564 }
3565
3566 Option& operator= ( Option const& _other ) {
3567 if( &_other != this ) {
3568 reset();
3569 if( _other )
3570 nullableValue = new( storage ) T( *_other );
3571 }
3572 return *this;
3573 }
3574 Option& operator = ( T const& _value ) {
3575 reset();
3576 nullableValue = new( storage ) T( _value );
3577 return *this;
3578 }
3579
3580 void reset() {
3581 if( nullableValue )
3582 nullableValue->~T();
3583 nullableValue = nullptr;
3584 }
3585
3586 T& operator*() { return *nullableValue; }
3587 T const& operator*() const { return *nullableValue; }
3588 T* operator->() { return nullableValue; }
3589 const T* operator->() const { return nullableValue; }
3590
3591 T valueOr( T const& defaultValue ) const {
3592 return nullableValue ? *nullableValue : defaultValue;
3593 }
3594
3595 bool some() const { return nullableValue != nullptr; }
3596 bool none() const { return nullableValue == nullptr; }
3597
3598 bool operator !() const { return nullableValue == nullptr; }
3599 explicit operator bool() const {
3600 return some();
3601 }
3602
3603 private:
3604 T *nullableValue;
3605 alignas(alignof(T)) char storage[sizeof(T)];
3606 };
3607
3608} // end namespace Catch
3609
3610// end catch_option.hpp
3611#include <string>
3612#include <iosfwd>
3613#include <map>
3614#include <set>
3615#include <memory>
3616
3617namespace Catch {
3618
3619 struct ReporterConfig {
3620 explicit ReporterConfig( IConfigPtr const& _fullConfig );
3621
3622 ReporterConfig( IConfigPtr const& _fullConfig, std::ostream& _stream );
3623
3624 std::ostream& stream() const;
3625 IConfigPtr fullConfig() const;
3626
3627 private:
3628 std::ostream* m_stream;
3629 IConfigPtr m_fullConfig;
3630 };
3631
3632 struct ReporterPreferences {
3633 bool shouldRedirectStdOut = false;
3634 bool shouldReportAllAssertions = false;
3635 };
3636
3637 template<typename T>
3638 struct LazyStat : Option<T> {
3639 LazyStat& operator=( T const& _value ) {
3640 Option<T>::operator=( _value );
3641 used = false;
3642 return *this;
3643 }
3644 void reset() {
3645 Option<T>::reset();
3646 used = false;
3647 }
3648 bool used = false;
3649 };
3650
3651 struct TestRunInfo {
3652 TestRunInfo( std::string const& _name );
3653 std::string name;
3654 };
3655 struct GroupInfo {
3656 GroupInfo( std::string const& _name,
3657 std::size_t _groupIndex,
3658 std::size_t _groupsCount );
3659
3660 std::string name;
3661 std::size_t groupIndex;
3662 std::size_t groupsCounts;
3663 };
3664
3665 struct AssertionStats {
3666 AssertionStats( AssertionResult const& _assertionResult,
3667 std::vector<MessageInfo> const& _infoMessages,
3668 Totals const& _totals );
3669
3670 AssertionStats( AssertionStats const& ) = default;
3671 AssertionStats( AssertionStats && ) = default;
3672 AssertionStats& operator = ( AssertionStats const& ) = default;
3673 AssertionStats& operator = ( AssertionStats && ) = default;
3674 virtual ~AssertionStats();
3675
3676 AssertionResult assertionResult;
3677 std::vector<MessageInfo> infoMessages;
3678 Totals totals;
3679 };
3680
3681 struct SectionStats {
3682 SectionStats( SectionInfo const& _sectionInfo,
3683 Counts const& _assertions,
3684 double _durationInSeconds,
3685 bool _missingAssertions );
3686 SectionStats( SectionStats const& ) = default;
3687 SectionStats( SectionStats && ) = default;
3688 SectionStats& operator = ( SectionStats const& ) = default;
3689 SectionStats& operator = ( SectionStats && ) = default;
3690 virtual ~SectionStats();
3691
3692 SectionInfo sectionInfo;
3693 Counts assertions;
3694 double durationInSeconds;
3695 bool missingAssertions;
3696 };
3697
3698 struct TestCaseStats {
3699 TestCaseStats( TestCaseInfo const& _testInfo,
3700 Totals const& _totals,
3701 std::string const& _stdOut,
3702 std::string const& _stdErr,
3703 bool _aborting );
3704
3705 TestCaseStats( TestCaseStats const& ) = default;
3706 TestCaseStats( TestCaseStats && ) = default;
3707 TestCaseStats& operator = ( TestCaseStats const& ) = default;
3708 TestCaseStats& operator = ( TestCaseStats && ) = default;
3709 virtual ~TestCaseStats();
3710
3711 TestCaseInfo testInfo;
3712 Totals totals;
3713 std::string stdOut;
3714 std::string stdErr;
3715 bool aborting;
3716 };
3717
3718 struct TestGroupStats {
3719 TestGroupStats( GroupInfo const& _groupInfo,
3720 Totals const& _totals,
3721 bool _aborting );
3722 TestGroupStats( GroupInfo const& _groupInfo );
3723
3724 TestGroupStats( TestGroupStats const& ) = default;
3725 TestGroupStats( TestGroupStats && ) = default;
3726 TestGroupStats& operator = ( TestGroupStats const& ) = default;
3727 TestGroupStats& operator = ( TestGroupStats && ) = default;
3728 virtual ~TestGroupStats();
3729
3730 GroupInfo groupInfo;
3731 Totals totals;
3732 bool aborting;
3733 };
3734
3735 struct TestRunStats {
3736 TestRunStats( TestRunInfo const& _runInfo,
3737 Totals const& _totals,
3738 bool _aborting );
3739
3740 TestRunStats( TestRunStats const& ) = default;
3741 TestRunStats( TestRunStats && ) = default;
3742 TestRunStats& operator = ( TestRunStats const& ) = default;
3743 TestRunStats& operator = ( TestRunStats && ) = default;
3744 virtual ~TestRunStats();
3745
3746 TestRunInfo runInfo;
3747 Totals totals;
3748 bool aborting;
3749 };
3750
3751 struct BenchmarkInfo {
3752 std::string name;
3753 };
3754 struct BenchmarkStats {
3755 BenchmarkInfo info;
3756 std::size_t iterations;
3757 uint64_t elapsedTimeInNanoseconds;
3758 };
3759
3760 struct IStreamingReporter {
3761 virtual ~IStreamingReporter() = default;
3762
3763 // Implementing class must also provide the following static methods:
3764 // static std::string getDescription();
3765 // static std::set<Verbosity> getSupportedVerbosities()
3766
3767 virtual ReporterPreferences getPreferences() const = 0;
3768
3769 virtual void noMatchingTestCases( std::string const& spec ) = 0;
3770
3771 virtual void testRunStarting( TestRunInfo const& testRunInfo ) = 0;
3772 virtual void testGroupStarting( GroupInfo const& groupInfo ) = 0;
3773
3774 virtual void testCaseStarting( TestCaseInfo const& testInfo ) = 0;
3775 virtual void sectionStarting( SectionInfo const& sectionInfo ) = 0;
3776
3777 // *** experimental ***
3778 virtual void benchmarkStarting( BenchmarkInfo const& ) {}
3779
3780 virtual void assertionStarting( AssertionInfo const& assertionInfo ) = 0;
3781
3782 // The return value indicates if the messages buffer should be cleared:
3783 virtual bool assertionEnded( AssertionStats const& assertionStats ) = 0;
3784
3785 // *** experimental ***
3786 virtual void benchmarkEnded( BenchmarkStats const& ) {}
3787
3788 virtual void sectionEnded( SectionStats const& sectionStats ) = 0;
3789 virtual void testCaseEnded( TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats ) = 0;
3790 virtual void testGroupEnded( TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats ) = 0;
3791 virtual void testRunEnded( TestRunStats const& testRunStats ) = 0;
3792
3793 virtual void skipTest( TestCaseInfo const& testInfo ) = 0;
3794
3795 // Default empty implementation provided
3796 virtual void fatalErrorEncountered( StringRef name );
3797
3798 virtual bool isMulti() const;
3799 };
3800 using IStreamingReporterPtr = std::unique_ptr<IStreamingReporter>;
3801
3802 struct IReporterFactory {
3803 virtual ~IReporterFactory();
3804 virtual IStreamingReporterPtr create( ReporterConfig const& config ) const = 0;
3805 virtual std::string getDescription() const = 0;
3806 };
3807 using IReporterFactoryPtr = std::shared_ptr<IReporterFactory>;
3808
3809 struct IReporterRegistry {
3810 using FactoryMap = std::map<std::string, IReporterFactoryPtr>;
3811 using Listeners = std::vector<IReporterFactoryPtr>;
3812
3813 virtual ~IReporterRegistry();
3814 virtual IStreamingReporterPtr create( std::string const& name, IConfigPtr const& config ) const = 0;
3815 virtual FactoryMap const& getFactories() const = 0;
3816 virtual Listeners const& getListeners() const = 0;
3817 };
3818
3819} // end namespace Catch
3820
3821// end catch_interfaces_reporter.h
3822#include <algorithm>
3823#include <cstring>
3824#include <cfloat>
3825#include <cstdio>
3826#include <cassert>
3827#include <memory>
3828#include <ostream>
3829
3830namespace Catch {
3831 void prepareExpandedExpression(AssertionResult& result);
3832
3833 // Returns double formatted as %.3f (format expected on output)
3834 std::string getFormattedDuration( double duration );
3835
3836 template<typename DerivedT>
3837 struct StreamingReporterBase : IStreamingReporter {
3838
3839 StreamingReporterBase( ReporterConfig const& _config )
3840 : m_config( _config.fullConfig() ),
3841 stream( _config.stream() )
3842 {
3843 m_reporterPrefs.shouldRedirectStdOut = false;
3844 if( !DerivedT::getSupportedVerbosities().count( m_config->verbosity() ) )
3845 throw std::domain_error( "Verbosity level not supported by this reporter" );
3846 }
3847
3848 ReporterPreferences getPreferences() const override {
3849 return m_reporterPrefs;
3850 }
3851
3852 static std::set<Verbosity> getSupportedVerbosities() {
3853 return { Verbosity::Normal };
3854 }
3855
3856 ~StreamingReporterBase() override = default;
3857
3858 void noMatchingTestCases(std::string const&) override {}
3859
3860 void testRunStarting(TestRunInfo const& _testRunInfo) override {
3861 currentTestRunInfo = _testRunInfo;
3862 }
3863 void testGroupStarting(GroupInfo const& _groupInfo) override {
3864 currentGroupInfo = _groupInfo;
3865 }
3866
3867 void testCaseStarting(TestCaseInfo const& _testInfo) override {
3868 currentTestCaseInfo = _testInfo;
3869 }
3870 void sectionStarting(SectionInfo const& _sectionInfo) override {
3871 m_sectionStack.push_back(_sectionInfo);
3872 }
3873
3874 void sectionEnded(SectionStats const& /* _sectionStats */) override {
3875 m_sectionStack.pop_back();
3876 }
3877 void testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats const& /* _testCaseStats */) override {
3878 currentTestCaseInfo.reset();
3879 }
3880 void testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats const& /* _testGroupStats */) override {
3881 currentGroupInfo.reset();
3882 }
3883 void testRunEnded(TestRunStats const& /* _testRunStats */) override {
3884 currentTestCaseInfo.reset();
3885 currentGroupInfo.reset();
3886 currentTestRunInfo.reset();
3887 }
3888
3889 void skipTest(TestCaseInfo const&) override {
3890 // Don't do anything with this by default.
3891 // It can optionally be overridden in the derived class.
3892 }
3893
3894 IConfigPtr m_config;
3895 std::ostream& stream;
3896
3897 LazyStat<TestRunInfo> currentTestRunInfo;
3898 LazyStat<GroupInfo> currentGroupInfo;
3899 LazyStat<TestCaseInfo> currentTestCaseInfo;
3900
3901 std::vector<SectionInfo> m_sectionStack;
3902 ReporterPreferences m_reporterPrefs;
3903 };
3904
3905 template<typename DerivedT>
3906 struct CumulativeReporterBase : IStreamingReporter {
3907 template<typename T, typename ChildNodeT>
3908 struct Node {
3909 explicit Node( T const& _value ) : value( _value ) {}
3910 virtual ~Node() {}
3911
3912 using ChildNodes = std::vector<std::shared_ptr<ChildNodeT>>;
3913 T value;
3914 ChildNodes children;
3915 };
3916 struct SectionNode {
3917 explicit SectionNode(SectionStats const& _stats) : stats(_stats) {}
3918 virtual ~SectionNode() = default;
3919
3920 bool operator == (SectionNode const& other) const {
3921 return stats.sectionInfo.lineInfo == other.stats.sectionInfo.lineInfo;
3922 }
3923 bool operator == (std::shared_ptr<SectionNode> const& other) const {
3924 return operator==(*other);
3925 }
3926
3927 SectionStats stats;
3928 using ChildSections = std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SectionNode>>;
3929 using Assertions = std::vector<AssertionStats>;
3930 ChildSections childSections;
3931 Assertions assertions;
3932 std::string stdOut;
3933 std::string stdErr;
3934 };
3935
3936 struct BySectionInfo {
3937 BySectionInfo( SectionInfo const& other ) : m_other( other ) {}
3938 BySectionInfo( BySectionInfo const& other ) : m_other( other.m_other ) {}
3939 bool operator() (std::shared_ptr<SectionNode> const& node) const {
3940 return ((node->stats.sectionInfo.name == m_other.name) &&
3941 (node->stats.sectionInfo.lineInfo == m_other.lineInfo));
3942 }
3943 void operator=(BySectionInfo const&) = delete;
3944
3945 private:
3946 SectionInfo const& m_other;
3947 };
3948
3949 using TestCaseNode = Node<TestCaseStats, SectionNode>;
3950 using TestGroupNode = Node<TestGroupStats, TestCaseNode>;
3951 using TestRunNode = Node<TestRunStats, TestGroupNode>;
3952
3953 CumulativeReporterBase( ReporterConfig const& _config )
3954 : m_config( _config.fullConfig() ),
3955 stream( _config.stream() )
3956 {
3957 m_reporterPrefs.shouldRedirectStdOut = false;
3958 if( !DerivedT::getSupportedVerbosities().count( m_config->verbosity() ) )
3959 throw std::domain_error( "Verbosity level not supported by this reporter" );
3960 }
3961 ~CumulativeReporterBase() override = default;
3962
3963 ReporterPreferences getPreferences() const override {
3964 return m_reporterPrefs;
3965 }
3966
3967 static std::set<Verbosity> getSupportedVerbosities() {
3968 return { Verbosity::Normal };
3969 }
3970
3971 void testRunStarting( TestRunInfo const& ) override {}
3972 void testGroupStarting( GroupInfo const& ) override {}
3973
3974 void testCaseStarting( TestCaseInfo const& ) override {}
3975
3976 void sectionStarting( SectionInfo const& sectionInfo ) override {
3977 SectionStats incompleteStats( sectionInfo, Counts(), 0, false );
3978 std::shared_ptr<SectionNode> node;
3979 if( m_sectionStack.empty() ) {
3980 if( !m_rootSection )
3981 m_rootSection = std::make_shared<SectionNode>( incompleteStats );
3982 node = m_rootSection;
3983 }
3984 else {
3985 SectionNode& parentNode = *m_sectionStack.back();
3986 auto it =
3987 std::find_if( parentNode.childSections.begin(),
3988 parentNode.childSections.end(),
3989 BySectionInfo( sectionInfo ) );
3990 if( it == parentNode.childSections.end() ) {
3991 node = std::make_shared<SectionNode>( incompleteStats );
3992 parentNode.childSections.push_back( node );
3993 }
3994 else
3995 node = *it;
3996 }
3997 m_sectionStack.push_back( node );
3998 m_deepestSection = std::move(node);
3999 }
4000
4001 void assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const&) override {}
4002
4003 bool assertionEnded(AssertionStats const& assertionStats) override {
4004 assert(!m_sectionStack.empty());
4005 // AssertionResult holds a pointer to a temporary DecomposedExpression,
4006 // which getExpandedExpression() calls to build the expression string.
4007 // Our section stack copy of the assertionResult will likely outlive the
4008 // temporary, so it must be expanded or discarded now to avoid calling
4009 // a destroyed object later.
4010 prepareExpandedExpression(const_cast<AssertionResult&>( assertionStats.assertionResult ) );
4011 SectionNode& sectionNode = *m_sectionStack.back();
4012 sectionNode.assertions.push_back(assertionStats);
4013 return true;
4014 }
4015 void sectionEnded(SectionStats const& sectionStats) override {
4016 assert(!m_sectionStack.empty());
4017 SectionNode& node = *m_sectionStack.back();
4018 node.stats = sectionStats;
4019 m_sectionStack.pop_back();
4020 }
4021 void testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats) override {
4022 auto node = std::make_shared<TestCaseNode>(testCaseStats);
4023 assert(m_sectionStack.size() == 0);
4024 node->children.push_back(m_rootSection);
4025 m_testCases.push_back(node);
4026 m_rootSection.reset();
4027
4028 assert(m_deepestSection);
4029 m_deepestSection->stdOut = testCaseStats.stdOut;
4030 m_deepestSection->stdErr = testCaseStats.stdErr;
4031 }
4032 void testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats) override {
4033 auto node = std::make_shared<TestGroupNode>(testGroupStats);
4034 node->children.swap(m_testCases);
4035 m_testGroups.push_back(node);
4036 }
4037 void testRunEnded(TestRunStats const& testRunStats) override {
4038 auto node = std::make_shared<TestRunNode>(testRunStats);
4039 node->children.swap(m_testGroups);
4040 m_testRuns.push_back(node);
4041 testRunEndedCumulative();
4042 }
4043 virtual void testRunEndedCumulative() = 0;
4044
4045 void skipTest(TestCaseInfo const&) override {}
4046
4047 IConfigPtr m_config;
4048 std::ostream& stream;
4049 std::vector<AssertionStats> m_assertions;
4050 std::vector<std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SectionNode>>> m_sections;
4051 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<TestCaseNode>> m_testCases;
4052 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<TestGroupNode>> m_testGroups;
4053
4054 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<TestRunNode>> m_testRuns;
4055
4056 std::shared_ptr<SectionNode> m_rootSection;
4057 std::shared_ptr<SectionNode> m_deepestSection;
4058 std::vector<std::shared_ptr<SectionNode>> m_sectionStack;
4059 ReporterPreferences m_reporterPrefs;
4060 };
4061
4062 template<char C>
4063 char const* getLineOfChars() {
4064 static char line[CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH] = {0};
4065 if( !*line ) {
4066 std::memset( line, C, CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH-1 );
4067 line[CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH-1] = 0;
4068 }
4069 return line;
4070 }
4071
4072 struct TestEventListenerBase : StreamingReporterBase<TestEventListenerBase> {
4073 TestEventListenerBase( ReporterConfig const& _config );
4074
4075 void assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const&) override;
4076 bool assertionEnded(AssertionStats const&) override;
4077 };
4078
4079} // end namespace Catch
4080
4081// end catch_reporter_bases.hpp
4082// start catch_console_colour.h
4083
4084namespace Catch {
4085
4086 struct Colour {
4087 enum Code {
4088 None = 0,
4089
4090 White,
4091 Red,
4092 Green,
4093 Blue,
4094 Cyan,
4095 Yellow,
4096 Grey,
4097
4098 Bright = 0x10,
4099
4100 BrightRed = Bright | Red,
4101 BrightGreen = Bright | Green,
4102 LightGrey = Bright | Grey,
4103 BrightWhite = Bright | White,
4104 BrightYellow = Bright | Yellow,
4105
4106 // By intention
4107 FileName = LightGrey,
4108 Warning = BrightYellow,
4109 ResultError = BrightRed,
4110 ResultSuccess = BrightGreen,
4111 ResultExpectedFailure = Warning,
4112
4113 Error = BrightRed,
4114 Success = Green,
4115
4116 OriginalExpression = Cyan,
4117 ReconstructedExpression = BrightYellow,
4118
4119 SecondaryText = LightGrey,
4120 Headers = White
4121 };
4122
4123 // Use constructed object for RAII guard
4124 Colour( Code _colourCode );
4125 Colour( Colour&& other ) noexcept;
4126 Colour& operator=( Colour&& other ) noexcept;
4127 ~Colour();
4128
4129 // Use static method for one-shot changes
4130 static void use( Code _colourCode );
4131
4132 private:
4133 bool m_moved = false;
4134 };
4135
4136 std::ostream& operator << ( std::ostream& os, Colour const& );
4137
4138} // end namespace Catch
4139
4140// end catch_console_colour.h
4141// start catch_reporter_registrars.hpp
4142
4143
4144namespace Catch {
4145
4146 template<typename T>
4147 class ReporterRegistrar {
4148
4149 class ReporterFactory : public IReporterFactory {
4150
4151 virtual IStreamingReporterPtr create( ReporterConfig const& config ) const override {
4152 return std::unique_ptr<T>( new T( config ) );
4153 }
4154
4155 virtual std::string getDescription() const override {
4156 return T::getDescription();
4157 }
4158 };
4159
4160 public:
4161
4162 explicit ReporterRegistrar( std::string const& name ) {
4163 getMutableRegistryHub().registerReporter( name, std::make_shared<ReporterFactory>() );
4164 }
4165 };
4166
4167 template<typename T>
4168 class ListenerRegistrar {
4169
4170 class ListenerFactory : public IReporterFactory {
4171
4172 virtual IStreamingReporterPtr create( ReporterConfig const& config ) const override {
4173 return std::unique_ptr<T>( new T( config ) );
4174 }
4175 virtual std::string getDescription() const override {
4176 return std::string();
4177 }
4178 };
4179
4180 public:
4181
4182 ListenerRegistrar() {
4183 getMutableRegistryHub().registerListener( std::make_shared<ListenerFactory>() );
4184 }
4185 };
4186}
4187
4188#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE)
4189
4190#define CATCH_REGISTER_REPORTER( name, reporterType ) \
4191 CATCH_INTERNAL_SUPPRESS_GLOBALS_WARNINGS \
4192 namespace{ Catch::ReporterRegistrar<reporterType> catch_internal_RegistrarFor##reporterType( name ); } \
4193 CATCH_INTERNAL_UNSUPPRESS_GLOBALS_WARNINGS
4194
4195#define CATCH_REGISTER_LISTENER( listenerType ) \
4196 CATCH_INTERNAL_SUPPRESS_GLOBALS_WARNINGS \
4197 namespace{ Catch::ListenerRegistrar<listenerType> catch_internal_RegistrarFor##listenerType; } \
4198 CATCH_INTERNAL_SUPPRESS_GLOBALS_WARNINGS
4199#else // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE
4200
4201#define CATCH_REGISTER_REPORTER(name, reporterType)
4202#define CATCH_REGISTER_LISTENER(listenerType)
4203
4204#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE
4205
4206// end catch_reporter_registrars.hpp
4207// Allow users to base their work off existing reporters
4208// start catch_reporter_compact.h

4210namespace Catch {
4211
4212 struct CompactReporter : StreamingReporterBase<CompactReporter> {
4213
4214 using StreamingReporterBase::StreamingReporterBase;
4215
4216 ~CompactReporter() override;
4217
4218 static std::string getDescription();
4219
4220 ReporterPreferences getPreferences() const override;
4221
4222 void noMatchingTestCases(std::string const& spec) override;
4223
4224 void assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const&) override;
4225
4226 bool assertionEnded(AssertionStats const& _assertionStats) override;
4227
4228 void sectionEnded(SectionStats const& _sectionStats) override;
4229
4230 void testRunEnded(TestRunStats const& _testRunStats) override;
4231
4232 };
4233
4234} // end namespace Catch

4239#if defined(_MSC_VER)
4240#pragma warning(push)

4243 // and default is missing) is enabled

4246namespace Catch {
4247 // Fwd decls
4248 struct SummaryColumn;
4249 class TablePrinter;
4250
4251 struct ConsoleReporter : StreamingReporterBase<ConsoleReporter> {
4252 std::unique_ptr<TablePrinter> m_tablePrinter;
4253
4254 ConsoleReporter(ReporterConfig const& config);
4255 ~ConsoleReporter() override;
4256 static std::string getDescription();
4257
4258 void noMatchingTestCases(std::string const& spec) override;
4259
4260 void assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const&) override;
4261
4262 bool assertionEnded(AssertionStats const& _assertionStats) override;
4263
4264 void sectionStarting(SectionInfo const& _sectionInfo) override;
4265 void sectionEnded(SectionStats const& _sectionStats) override;
4266
4267 void benchmarkStarting(BenchmarkInfo const& info) override;
4268 void benchmarkEnded(BenchmarkStats const& stats) override;
4269
4270 void testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats const& _testCaseStats) override;
4271 void testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats const& _testGroupStats) override;
4272 void testRunEnded(TestRunStats const& _testRunStats) override;
4273
4274 private:
4275
4276 void lazyPrint();
4277
4278 void lazyPrintWithoutClosingBenchmarkTable();
4279 void lazyPrintRunInfo();
4280 void lazyPrintGroupInfo();
4281 void printTestCaseAndSectionHeader();
4282
4283 void printClosedHeader(std::string const& _name);
4284 void printOpenHeader(std::string const& _name);
4285
4286 // if string has a : in first line will set indent to follow it on
4287 // subsequent lines
4288 void printHeaderString(std::string const& _string, std::size_t indent = 0);
4289
4290 void printTotals(Totals const& totals);
4291 void printSummaryRow(std::string const& label, std::vector<SummaryColumn> const& cols, std::size_t row);
4292
4293 void printTotalsDivider(Totals const& totals);
4294 void printSummaryDivider();
4295
4296 private:
4297 bool m_headerPrinted = false;
4298 };

4309// start catch_xmlwriter.h
4310
4311#include <vector>
4312
4313namespace Catch {
4314
4315 class XmlEncode {
4316 public:
4317 enum ForWhat { ForTextNodes, ForAttributes };
4318
4319 XmlEncode( std::string const& str, ForWhat forWhat = ForTextNodes );
4320
4321 void encodeTo( std::ostream& os ) const;
4322
4323 friend std::ostream& operator << ( std::ostream& os, XmlEncode const& xmlEncode );
4324
4325 private:
4326 std::string m_str;
4327 ForWhat m_forWhat;
4328 };
4329
4330 class XmlWriter {
4331 public:
4332
4333 class ScopedElement {
4334 public:
4335 ScopedElement( XmlWriter* writer );
4336
4337 ScopedElement( ScopedElement&& other ) noexcept;
4338 ScopedElement& operator=( ScopedElement&& other ) noexcept;
4339
4340 ~ScopedElement();
4341
4342 ScopedElement& writeText( std::string const& text, bool indent = true );
4343
4344 template<typename T>
4345 ScopedElement& writeAttribute( std::string const& name, T const& attribute ) {
4346 m_writer->writeAttribute( name, attribute );
4347 return *this;
4348 }
4349
4350 private:
4351 mutable XmlWriter* m_writer = nullptr;
4352 };
4353
4354 XmlWriter( std::ostream& os = Catch::cout() );
4355 ~XmlWriter();
4356
4357 XmlWriter( XmlWriter const& ) = delete;
4358 XmlWriter& operator=( XmlWriter const& ) = delete;
4359
4360 XmlWriter& startElement( std::string const& name );
4361
4362 ScopedElement scopedElement( std::string const& name );
4363
4364 XmlWriter& endElement();
4365
4366 XmlWriter& writeAttribute( std::string const& name, std::string const& attribute );
4367
4368 XmlWriter& writeAttribute( std::string const& name, bool attribute );
4369
4370 template<typename T>
4371 XmlWriter& writeAttribute( std::string const& name, T const& attribute ) {
4372 ReusableStringStream rss;
4373 rss << attribute;
4374 return writeAttribute( name, rss.str() );
4375 }
4376
4377 XmlWriter& writeText( std::string const& text, bool indent = true );
4378
4379 XmlWriter& writeComment( std::string const& text );
4380
4381 void writeStylesheetRef( std::string const& url );
4382
4383 XmlWriter& writeBlankLine();
4384
4385 void ensureTagClosed();
4386
4387 private:
4388
4389 void writeDeclaration();
4390
4391 void newlineIfNecessary();
4392
4393 bool m_tagIsOpen = false;
4394 bool m_needsNewline = false;
4395 std::vector<std::string> m_tags;
4396 std::string m_indent;
4397 std::ostream& m_os;
4398 };
4399
4400}
4401
4402// end catch_xmlwriter.h
4403namespace Catch {
4404
4405 class JunitReporter : public CumulativeReporterBase<JunitReporter> {
4406 public:
4407 JunitReporter(ReporterConfig const& _config);
4408
4409 ~JunitReporter() override;
4410
4411 static std::string getDescription();
4412
4413 void noMatchingTestCases(std::string const& /*spec*/) override;
4414
4415 void testRunStarting(TestRunInfo const& runInfo) override;
4416
4417 void testGroupStarting(GroupInfo const& groupInfo) override;
4418
4419 void testCaseStarting(TestCaseInfo const& testCaseInfo) override;
4420 bool assertionEnded(AssertionStats const& assertionStats) override;
4421
4422 void testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats) override;
4423
4424 void testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats) override;
4425
4426 void testRunEndedCumulative() override;
4427
4428 void writeGroup(TestGroupNode const& groupNode, double suiteTime);
4429
4430 void writeTestCase(TestCaseNode const& testCaseNode);
4431
4432 void writeSection(std::string const& className,
4433 std::string const& rootName,
4434 SectionNode const& sectionNode);
4435
4436 void writeAssertions(SectionNode const& sectionNode);
4437 void writeAssertion(AssertionStats const& stats);
4438
4439 XmlWriter xml;
4440 Timer suiteTimer;
4441 std::string stdOutForSuite;
4442 std::string stdErrForSuite;
4443 unsigned int unexpectedExceptions = 0;
4444 bool m_okToFail = false;
4445 };
4446
4447} // end namespace Catch
4448
4449// end catch_reporter_junit.h

4452namespace Catch {

4475 void sectionStarting(SectionInfo const& sectionInfo) override;

4477 void assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const&) override;
4478
4479 bool assertionEnded(AssertionStats const& assertionStats) override;

4483 void testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats) override;
4484
4485 void testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats) override;
4486
4487 void testRunEnded(TestRunStats const& testRunStats) override;
4488
4489 private:
4490 Timer m_testCaseTimer;
4491 XmlWriter m_xml;
4492 int m_sectionDepth = 0;
4493 };

4512// Keep these here for external reporters
4513// start catch_test_case_tracker.h
4514
4515#include <string>
4516#include <vector>
4517#include <memory>
4518
4519namespace Catch {
4520namespace TestCaseTracking {
4521
4522 struct NameAndLocation {
4523 std::string name;
4524 SourceLineInfo location;
4525
4526 NameAndLocation( std::string const& _name, SourceLineInfo const& _location );
4527 };
4528
4529 struct ITracker;
4530
4531 using ITrackerPtr = std::shared_ptr<ITracker>;
4532
4533 struct ITracker {
4534 virtual ~ITracker();
4535
4536 // static queries
4537 virtual NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation() const = 0;
4538
4539 // dynamic queries
4540 virtual bool isComplete() const = 0; // Successfully completed or failed
4541 virtual bool isSuccessfullyCompleted() const = 0;
4542 virtual bool isOpen() const = 0; // Started but not complete
4543 virtual bool hasChildren() const = 0;
4544
4545 virtual ITracker& parent() = 0;
4546
4547 // actions
4548 virtual void close() = 0; // Successfully complete
4549 virtual void fail() = 0;
4550 virtual void markAsNeedingAnotherRun() = 0;
4551
4552 virtual void addChild( ITrackerPtr const& child ) = 0;
4553 virtual ITrackerPtr findChild( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation ) = 0;
4554 virtual void openChild() = 0;
4555
4556 // Debug/ checking
4557 virtual bool isSectionTracker() const = 0;
4558 virtual bool isIndexTracker() const = 0;
4559 };
4560
4561 class TrackerContext {
4562
4563 enum RunState {
4564 NotStarted,
4565 Executing,
4566 CompletedCycle
4567 };
4568
4569 ITrackerPtr m_rootTracker;
4570 ITracker* m_currentTracker = nullptr;
4571 RunState m_runState = NotStarted;
4572
4573 public:
4574
4575 static TrackerContext& instance();
4576
4577 ITracker& startRun();
4578 void endRun();
4579
4580 void startCycle();
4581 void completeCycle();
4582
4583 bool completedCycle() const;
4584 ITracker& currentTracker();
4585 void setCurrentTracker( ITracker* tracker );
4586 };
4587
4588 class TrackerBase : public ITracker {
4589 protected:
4590 enum CycleState {
4591 NotStarted,
4592 Executing,
4593 ExecutingChildren,
4594 NeedsAnotherRun,
4595 CompletedSuccessfully,
4596 Failed
4597 };
4598
4599 class TrackerHasName {
4600 NameAndLocation m_nameAndLocation;
4601 public:
4602 TrackerHasName( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation );
4603 bool operator ()( ITrackerPtr const& tracker ) const;
4604 };
4605
4606 using Children = std::vector<ITrackerPtr>;
4607 NameAndLocation m_nameAndLocation;
4608 TrackerContext& m_ctx;
4609 ITracker* m_parent;
4610 Children m_children;
4611 CycleState m_runState = NotStarted;
4612
4613 public:
4614 TrackerBase( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, TrackerContext& ctx, ITracker* parent );
4615
4616 NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation() const override;
4617 bool isComplete() const override;
4618 bool isSuccessfullyCompleted() const override;
4619 bool isOpen() const override;
4620 bool hasChildren() const override;
4621
4622 void addChild( ITrackerPtr const& child ) override;
4623
4624 ITrackerPtr findChild( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation ) override;
4625 ITracker& parent() override;
4626
4627 void openChild() override;
4628
4629 bool isSectionTracker() const override;
4630 bool isIndexTracker() const override;
4631
4632 void open();
4633
4634 void close() override;
4635 void fail() override;
4636 void markAsNeedingAnotherRun() override;
4637
4638 private:
4639 void moveToParent();
4640 void moveToThis();
4641 };
4642
4643 class SectionTracker : public TrackerBase {
4644 std::vector<std::string> m_filters;
4645 public:
4646 SectionTracker( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, TrackerContext& ctx, ITracker* parent );
4647
4648 bool isSectionTracker() const override;
4649
4650 static SectionTracker& acquire( TrackerContext& ctx, NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation );
4651
4652 void tryOpen();
4653
4654 void addInitialFilters( std::vector<std::string> const& filters );
4655 void addNextFilters( std::vector<std::string> const& filters );
4656 };
4657
4658 class IndexTracker : public TrackerBase {
4659 int m_size;
4660 int m_index = -1;
4661 public:
4662 IndexTracker( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, TrackerContext& ctx, ITracker* parent, int size );
4663
4664 bool isIndexTracker() const override;
4665 void close() override;
4666
4667 static IndexTracker& acquire( TrackerContext& ctx, NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, int size );
4668
4669 int index() const;
4670
4671 void moveNext();
4672 };
4673
4674} // namespace TestCaseTracking
4675
4676using TestCaseTracking::ITracker;

4678using TestCaseTracking::SectionTracker;
4679using TestCaseTracking::IndexTracker;

4688
4689 struct LeakDetector {
4690 LeakDetector();
4691 };
4692
4693}
4694// end catch_leak_detector.h
4695// Cpp files will be included in the single-header file here
4696// start catch_approx.cpp
4697
4698#include <cmath>
4699#include <limits>
4700
4701namespace {
4702
4703// Performs equivalent check of std::fabs(lhs - rhs) <= margin
4704// But without the subtraction to allow for INFINITY in comparison
4705bool marginComparison(double lhs, double rhs, double margin) {
4706 return (lhs + margin >= rhs) && (rhs + margin >= lhs);
4707}
4708
4709}
4710
4711namespace Catch {
4712namespace Detail {
4713
4714 Approx::Approx ( double value )
4715 : m_epsilon( std::numeric_limits<float>::epsilon()*100 ),
4716 m_margin( 0.0 ),
4717 m_scale( 0.0 ),
4718 m_value( value )
4719 {}
4720
4721 Approx Approx::custom() {
4722 return Approx( 0 );
4723 }
4724
4725 Approx Approx::operator-() const {
4726 auto temp(*this);
4727 temp.m_value = -temp.m_value;
4728 return temp;
4729 }
4730
4731 std::string Approx::toString() const {
4732 ReusableStringStream rss;
4733 rss << "Approx( " << ::Catch::Detail::stringify( m_value ) << " )";
4734 return rss.str();
4735 }
4736
4737 bool Approx::equalityComparisonImpl(const double other) const {
4738 // First try with fixed margin, then compute margin based on epsilon, scale and Approx's value
4739 // Thanks to Richard Harris for his help refining the scaled margin value
4740 return marginComparison(m_value, other, m_margin) || marginComparison(m_value, other, m_epsilon * (m_scale + std::fabs(m_value)));
4741 }
4742
4743} // end namespace Detail
4744
4745namespace literals {
4746 Detail::Approx operator "" _a(long double val) {
4747 return Detail::Approx(val);
4748 }
4749 Detail::Approx operator "" _a(unsigned long long val) {
4750 return Detail::Approx(val);
4751 }
4752} // end namespace literals
4753
4754std::string StringMaker<Catch::Detail::Approx>::convert(Catch::Detail::Approx const& value) {
4755 return value.toString();
4756}
4757
4758} // end namespace Catch
4759// end catch_approx.cpp

4761
4762// start catch_context.h
4763
4764#include <memory>
4765
4766namespace Catch {
4767
4768 struct IResultCapture;
4769 struct IRunner;
4770 struct IConfig;
4771 struct IMutableContext;
4772
4773 using IConfigPtr = std::shared_ptr<IConfig const>;
4774
4775 struct IContext
4776 {
4777 virtual ~IContext();
4778
4779 virtual IResultCapture* getResultCapture() = 0;
4780 virtual IRunner* getRunner() = 0;
4781 virtual IConfigPtr const& getConfig() const = 0;
4782 };
4783
4784 struct IMutableContext : IContext
4785 {
4786 virtual ~IMutableContext();
4787 virtual void setResultCapture( IResultCapture* resultCapture ) = 0;
4788 virtual void setRunner( IRunner* runner ) = 0;
4789 virtual void setConfig( IConfigPtr const& config ) = 0;
4790
4791 private:
4792 static IMutableContext *currentContext;
4793 friend IMutableContext& getCurrentMutableContext();
4794 friend void cleanUpContext();
4795 static void createContext();
4796 };
4797
4798 inline IMutableContext& getCurrentMutableContext()
4799 {
4800 if( !IMutableContext::currentContext )
4801 IMutableContext::createContext();
4802 return *IMutableContext::currentContext;
4803 }
4804
4805 inline IContext& getCurrentContext()
4806 {
4807 return getCurrentMutableContext();
4808 }
4809
4810 void cleanUpContext();
4811}
4812
4813// end catch_context.h
4814// start catch_debugger.h
4815
4816namespace Catch {
4817 bool isDebuggerActive();
4818}
4819
4820#ifdef CATCH_PLATFORM_MAC
4821
4822 #define CATCH_TRAP() __asm__("int $3\n" : : ) /* NOLINT */
4823
4824#elif defined(CATCH_PLATFORM_LINUX)
4825 // If we can use inline assembler, do it because this allows us to break
4826 // directly at the location of the failing check instead of breaking inside
4827 // raise() called from it, i.e. one stack frame below.
4828 #if defined(__GNUC__) && (defined(__i386) || defined(__x86_64))
4829 #define CATCH_TRAP() asm volatile ("int $3") /* NOLINT */
4830 #else // Fall back to the generic way.
4831 #include <signal.h>
4832
4833 #define CATCH_TRAP() raise(SIGTRAP)
4834 #endif
4835#elif defined(_MSC_VER)
4836 #define CATCH_TRAP() __debugbreak()
4837#elif defined(__MINGW32__)
4838 extern "C" __declspec(dllimport) void __stdcall DebugBreak();
4839 #define CATCH_TRAP() DebugBreak()
4840#endif
4841
4842#ifdef CATCH_TRAP
4843 #define CATCH_BREAK_INTO_DEBUGGER() if( Catch::isDebuggerActive() ) { CATCH_TRAP(); }
4844#else
4845 namespace Catch {
4846 inline void doNothing() {}
4847 }
4848 #define CATCH_BREAK_INTO_DEBUGGER() Catch::doNothing()
4849#endif
4850
4851// end catch_debugger.h
4852// start catch_run_context.h
4853
4854// start catch_fatal_condition.h

4858

4862# define CATCH_DEFINED_NOMINMAX
4863# define NOMINMAX
4864#endif
4865#if !defined(WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN) && !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_NO_WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN)
4866# define CATCH_DEFINED_WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
4867# define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN
4868#endif

4872#else
4873#include <windows.h>
4874#endif
4875
4876#ifdef CATCH_DEFINED_NOMINMAX
4877# undef NOMINMAX
4878#endif

4881#endif
4882
4883#endif // defined(CATCH_PLATFORM_WINDOWS)

4919

4923 };

4938#include <string>
4939
4940namespace Catch {
4941
4942 struct IMutableContext;
4943
4945
4946 class RunContext : public IResultCapture, public IRunner {
4947
4948 public:
4949 RunContext( RunContext const& ) = delete;
4950 RunContext& operator =( RunContext const& ) = delete;
4951
4952 explicit RunContext( IConfigPtr const& _config, IStreamingReporterPtr&& reporter );
4953
4954 ~RunContext() override;
4955
4956 void testGroupStarting( std::string const& testSpec, std::size_t groupIndex, std::size_t groupsCount );
4957 void testGroupEnded( std::string const& testSpec, Totals const& totals, std::size_t groupIndex, std::size_t groupsCount );
4958
4959 Totals runTest(TestCase const& testCase);
4960
4961 IConfigPtr config() const;
4962 IStreamingReporter& reporter() const;
4963
4964 public: // IResultCapture
4965
4966 // Assertion handlers
4967 void handleExpr
4968 ( AssertionInfo const& info,
4969 ITransientExpression const& expr,
4970 AssertionReaction& reaction ) override;
4971 void handleMessage
4972 ( AssertionInfo const& info,
4973 ResultWas::OfType resultType,
4974 StringRef const& message,
4975 AssertionReaction& reaction ) override;
4976 void handleUnexpectedExceptionNotThrown
4977 ( AssertionInfo const& info,
4978 AssertionReaction& reaction ) override;
4979 void handleUnexpectedInflightException
4980 ( AssertionInfo const& info,
4981 std::string const& message,
4982 AssertionReaction& reaction ) override;
4983 void handleIncomplete
4984 ( AssertionInfo const& info ) override;
4985 void handleNonExpr
4986 ( AssertionInfo const &info,
4987 ResultWas::OfType resultType,
4988 AssertionReaction &reaction ) override;
4989
4990 bool sectionStarted( SectionInfo const& sectionInfo, Counts& assertions ) override;
4991
4992 void sectionEnded( SectionEndInfo const& endInfo ) override;
4993 void sectionEndedEarly( SectionEndInfo const& endInfo ) override;
4994
4995 void benchmarkStarting( BenchmarkInfo const& info ) override;
4996 void benchmarkEnded( BenchmarkStats const& stats ) override;
4997
4998 void pushScopedMessage( MessageInfo const& message ) override;
4999 void popScopedMessage( MessageInfo const& message ) override;
5000
5001 std::string getCurrentTestName() const override;
5002
5003 const AssertionResult* getLastResult() const override;
5004
5005 void exceptionEarlyReported() override;
5006
5007 void handleFatalErrorCondition( StringRef message ) override;
5008
5009 bool lastAssertionPassed() override;
5010
5011 void assertionPassed() override;
5012
5013 public:
5014 // !TBD We need to do this another way!
5015 bool aborting() const final;
5016
5017 private:
5018
5019 void runCurrentTest( std::string& redirectedCout, std::string& redirectedCerr );
5020 void invokeActiveTestCase();
5021
5022 void resetAssertionInfo();
5023 bool testForMissingAssertions( Counts& assertions );
5024
5025 void assertionEnded( AssertionResult const& result );
5026 void reportExpr
5027 ( AssertionInfo const &info,
5028 ResultWas::OfType resultType,
5029 ITransientExpression const *expr,
5030 bool negated );
5031
5032 void populateReaction( AssertionReaction& reaction );
5033
5034 private:
5035
5036 void handleUnfinishedSections();
5037
5038 TestRunInfo m_runInfo;
5039 IMutableContext& m_context;
5040 TestCase const* m_activeTestCase = nullptr;
5041 ITracker* m_testCaseTracker;
5042 Option<AssertionResult> m_lastResult;
5043
5044 IConfigPtr m_config;
5045 Totals m_totals;
5046 IStreamingReporterPtr m_reporter;
5047 std::vector<MessageInfo> m_messages;
5048 AssertionInfo m_lastAssertionInfo;
5049 std::vector<SectionEndInfo> m_unfinishedSections;
5050 std::vector<ITracker*> m_activeSections;
5051 TrackerContext m_trackerContext;
5052 bool m_lastAssertionPassed = false;
5053 bool m_shouldReportUnexpected = true;
5054 bool m_includeSuccessfulResults;
5055 };
5056
5057} // end namespace Catch
5058
5059// end catch_run_context.h
5060namespace Catch {
5061
5062 namespace {
5063 auto operator <<( std::ostream& os, ITransientExpression const& expr ) -> std::ostream& {
5064 expr.streamReconstructedExpression( os );
5065 return os;
5066 }
5067 }
5068
5069 LazyExpression::LazyExpression( bool isNegated )
5070 : m_isNegated( isNegated )
5071 {}
5072
5073 LazyExpression::LazyExpression( LazyExpression const& other ) : m_isNegated( other.m_isNegated ) {}
5074
5075 LazyExpression::operator bool() const {
5076 return m_transientExpression != nullptr;
5077 }
5078
5079 auto operator << ( std::ostream& os, LazyExpression const& lazyExpr ) -> std::ostream& {
5080 if( lazyExpr.m_isNegated )
5081 os << "!";
5082
5083 if( lazyExpr ) {
5084 if( lazyExpr.m_isNegated && lazyExpr.m_transientExpression->isBinaryExpression() )
5085 os << "(" << *lazyExpr.m_transientExpression << ")";
5086 else
5087 os << *lazyExpr.m_transientExpression;
5088 }
5089 else {
5090 os << "{** error - unchecked empty expression requested **}";
5091 }
5092 return os;
5093 }
5094
5095 AssertionHandler::AssertionHandler
5096 ( StringRef macroName,
5097 SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo,
5098 StringRef capturedExpression,
5099 ResultDisposition::Flags resultDisposition )
5100 : m_assertionInfo{ macroName, lineInfo, capturedExpression, resultDisposition },
5101 m_resultCapture( getResultCapture() )
5102 {}
5103
5104 void AssertionHandler::handleExpr( ITransientExpression const& expr ) {
5105 m_resultCapture.handleExpr( m_assertionInfo, expr, m_reaction );
5106 }
5107 void AssertionHandler::handleMessage(ResultWas::OfType resultType, StringRef const& message) {
5108 m_resultCapture.handleMessage( m_assertionInfo, resultType, message, m_reaction );
5109 }
5110
5111 auto AssertionHandler::allowThrows() const -> bool {
5112 return getCurrentContext().getConfig()->allowThrows();
5113 }
5114
5115 void AssertionHandler::complete() {
5116 setCompleted();
5117 if( m_reaction.shouldDebugBreak ) {
5118
5119 // If you find your debugger stopping you here then go one level up on the
5120 // call-stack for the code that caused it (typically a failed assertion)
5121
5122 // (To go back to the test and change execution, jump over the throw, next)
5123 CATCH_BREAK_INTO_DEBUGGER();
5124 }
5125 if( m_reaction.shouldThrow )
5126 throw Catch::TestFailureException();
5127 }
5128 void AssertionHandler::setCompleted() {
5129 m_completed = true;
5130 }
5131
5132 void AssertionHandler::handleUnexpectedInflightException() {
5133 m_resultCapture.handleUnexpectedInflightException( m_assertionInfo, Catch::translateActiveException(), m_reaction );
5134 }
5135
5136 void AssertionHandler::handleExceptionThrownAsExpected() {
5137 m_resultCapture.handleNonExpr(m_assertionInfo, ResultWas::Ok, m_reaction);
5138 }
5139 void AssertionHandler::handleExceptionNotThrownAsExpected() {
5140 m_resultCapture.handleNonExpr(m_assertionInfo, ResultWas::Ok, m_reaction);
5141 }
5142
5143 void AssertionHandler::handleUnexpectedExceptionNotThrown() {
5144 m_resultCapture.handleUnexpectedExceptionNotThrown( m_assertionInfo, m_reaction );
5145 }
5146
5147 void AssertionHandler::handleThrowingCallSkipped() {
5148 m_resultCapture.handleNonExpr(m_assertionInfo, ResultWas::Ok, m_reaction);
5149 }
5150
5151 // This is the overload that takes a string and infers the Equals matcher from it
5152 // The more general overload, that takes any string matcher, is in catch_capture_matchers.cpp
5153 void handleExceptionMatchExpr( AssertionHandler& handler, std::string const& str, StringRef matcherString ) {
5154 handleExceptionMatchExpr( handler, Matchers::Equals( str ), matcherString );
5155 }
5156
5157} // namespace Catch
5158// end catch_assertionhandler.cpp
5159// start catch_assertionresult.cpp
5160
5161namespace Catch {
5162 AssertionResultData::AssertionResultData(ResultWas::OfType _resultType, LazyExpression const & _lazyExpression):
5163 lazyExpression(_lazyExpression),
5164 resultType(_resultType) {}
5165
5166 std::string AssertionResultData::reconstructExpression() const {
5167
5168 if( reconstructedExpression.empty() ) {
5169 if( lazyExpression ) {
5170 ReusableStringStream rss;
5171 rss << lazyExpression;
5172 reconstructedExpression = rss.str();
5173 }
5174 }
5175 return reconstructedExpression;
5176 }
5177
5178 AssertionResult::AssertionResult( AssertionInfo const& info, AssertionResultData const& data )
5179 : m_info( info ),
5180 m_resultData( data )
5181 {}
5182
5183 // Result was a success
5184 bool AssertionResult::succeeded() const {
5185 return Catch::isOk( m_resultData.resultType );
5186 }
5187
5188 // Result was a success, or failure is suppressed
5189 bool AssertionResult::isOk() const {
5190 return Catch::isOk( m_resultData.resultType ) || shouldSuppressFailure( m_info.resultDisposition );
5191 }
5192
5193 ResultWas::OfType AssertionResult::getResultType() const {
5194 return m_resultData.resultType;
5195 }
5196
5197 bool AssertionResult::hasExpression() const {
5198 return m_info.capturedExpression[0] != 0;
5199 }
5200
5201 bool AssertionResult::hasMessage() const {
5202 return !m_resultData.message.empty();
5203 }
5204
5205 std::string AssertionResult::getExpression() const {
5206 if( isFalseTest( m_info.resultDisposition ) )
5207 return "!(" + m_info.capturedExpression + ")";
5208 else
5209 return m_info.capturedExpression;
5210 }
5211
5212 std::string AssertionResult::getExpressionInMacro() const {
5213 std::string expr;
5214 if( m_info.macroName[0] == 0 )
5215 expr = m_info.capturedExpression;
5216 else {
5217 expr.reserve( m_info.macroName.size() + m_info.capturedExpression.size() + 4 );
5218 expr += m_info.macroName;
5219 expr += "( ";
5220 expr += m_info.capturedExpression;
5221 expr += " )";
5222 }
5223 return expr;
5224 }
5225
5226 bool AssertionResult::hasExpandedExpression() const {
5227 return hasExpression() && getExpandedExpression() != getExpression();
5228 }
5229
5230 std::string AssertionResult::getExpandedExpression() const {
5231 std::string expr = m_resultData.reconstructExpression();
5232 return expr.empty()
5233 ? getExpression()
5234 : expr;
5235 }
5236
5237 std::string AssertionResult::getMessage() const {
5238 return m_resultData.message;
5239 }
5240 SourceLineInfo AssertionResult::getSourceInfo() const {
5241 return m_info.lineInfo;
5242 }
5243
5244 StringRef AssertionResult::getTestMacroName() const {
5245 return m_info.macroName;
5246 }
5247
5248} // end namespace Catch
5249// end catch_assertionresult.cpp
5250// start catch_benchmark.cpp
5251
5252namespace Catch {
5253
5254 auto BenchmarkLooper::getResolution() -> uint64_t {
5255 return getEstimatedClockResolution() * getCurrentContext().getConfig()->benchmarkResolutionMultiple();
5256 }
5257
5258 void BenchmarkLooper::reportStart() {
5259 getResultCapture().benchmarkStarting( { m_name } );
5260 }
5261 auto BenchmarkLooper::needsMoreIterations() -> bool {
5262 auto elapsed = m_timer.getElapsedNanoseconds();
5263
5264 // Exponentially increasing iterations until we're confident in our timer resolution
5265 if( elapsed < m_resolution ) {
5266 m_iterationsToRun *= 10;
5267 return true;
5268 }
5269
5270 getResultCapture().benchmarkEnded( { { m_name }, m_count, elapsed } );
5271 return false;
5272 }
5273
5274} // end namespace Catch
5275// end catch_benchmark.cpp
5276// start catch_capture_matchers.cpp
5277
5278namespace Catch {
5279
5280 using StringMatcher = Matchers::Impl::MatcherBase<std::string>;
5281
5282 // This is the general overload that takes a any string matcher
5283 // There is another overload, in catch_assertionhandler.h/.cpp, that only takes a string and infers
5284 // the Equals matcher (so the header does not mention matchers)
5285 void handleExceptionMatchExpr( AssertionHandler& handler, StringMatcher const& matcher, StringRef matcherString ) {
5286 std::string exceptionMessage = Catch::translateActiveException();
5287 MatchExpr<std::string, StringMatcher const&> expr( exceptionMessage, matcher, matcherString );
5288 handler.handleExpr( expr );
5289 }
5290
5291} // namespace Catch
5292// end catch_capture_matchers.cpp

5299// Use Catch's value for console width (store Clara's off to the side, if present)
5300#ifdef CLARA_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH

5302#undef CATCH_CLARA_TEXTFLOW_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH
5303#endif

5342
5343// TextFlowCpp
5344//
5345// A single-header library for wrapping and laying out basic text, by Phil Nash
5346//
5347// This work is licensed under the BSD 2-Clause license.

5353#include <cassert>
5354#include <ostream>
5355#include <sstream>
5356#include <vector>
