7897 countIt = tagCounts.insert( std::make_pair( lcaseTagName, TagInfo() ) ).first;
7898 countIt->second.add( tagName );
7899 }
7900 }
7901
7902 for( auto const& tagCount : tagCounts ) {
7903 ReusableStringStream rss;
7904 rss << " " << std::setw(2) << tagCount.second.count << " ";
7905 auto str = rss.str();
7906 auto wrapper = Column( tagCount.second.all() )
7907 .initialIndent( 0 )
7908 .indent( str.size() )
7909 .width( CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH-10 );
7910 Catch::cout() << str << wrapper << '\n';
7911 }
7912 Catch::cout() << pluralise( tagCounts.size(), "tag" ) << '\n' << std::endl;
7913 return tagCounts.size();
7914 }
7915
7916 std::size_t listReporters( Config const& /*config*/ ) {
7917 Catch::cout() << "Available reporters:\n";
7918 IReporterRegistry::FactoryMap const& factories = getRegistryHub().getReporterRegistry().getFactories();
7919 std::size_t maxNameLen = 0;
7920 for( auto const& factoryKvp : factories )
7921 maxNameLen = (std::max)( maxNameLen, factoryKvp.first.size() );
7922
7923 for( auto const& factoryKvp : factories ) {
7924 Catch::cout()
7925 << Column( factoryKvp.first + ":" )
7926 .indent(2)
7927 .width( 5+maxNameLen )
7928 + Column( factoryKvp.second->getDescription() )
7929 .initialIndent(0)
7930 .indent(2)
7931 .width( CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH - maxNameLen-8 )
7932 << "\n";
7933 }
7934 Catch::cout() << std::endl;
7935 return factories.size();
7936 }
7937
7938 Option<std::size_t> list( Config const& config ) {
7939 Option<std::size_t> listedCount;
7940 if( config.listTests() )
7941 listedCount = listedCount.valueOr(0) + listTests( config );
7942 if( config.listTestNamesOnly() )
7943 listedCount = listedCount.valueOr(0) + listTestsNamesOnly( config );
7944 if( config.listTags() )
7945 listedCount = listedCount.valueOr(0) + listTags( config );
7946 if( config.listReporters() )
7947 listedCount = listedCount.valueOr(0) + listReporters( config );
7948 return listedCount;
7949 }
7950
7951} // end namespace Catch
7952// end catch_list.cpp
7953// start catch_matchers.cpp
7954
7955namespace Catch {
7956namespace Matchers {
7957 namespace Impl {
7958
7959 std::string MatcherUntypedBase::toString() const {
7960 if( m_cachedToString.empty() )
7961 m_cachedToString = describe();
7962 return m_cachedToString;
7963 }
7964
7965 MatcherUntypedBase::~MatcherUntypedBase() = default;
7966
7967 } // namespace Impl
7968} // namespace Matchers
7969
7970using namespace Matchers;
7971using Matchers::Impl::MatcherBase;
7972
7973} // namespace Catch
7974// end catch_matchers.cpp
7975// start catch_matchers_floating.cpp
7976
7977// start catch_to_string.hpp
7978
7979#include <string>
7980
7981namespace Catch {
7982 template <typename T>
7983 std::string to_string(T const& t) {
7984#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_CPP11_TO_STRING)
7985 return std::to_string(t);
7986#else
7987 ReusableStringStream rss;
7988 rss << t;
7989 return rss.str();
7990#endif
7991 }
7992} // end namespace Catch
7993
7994// end catch_to_string.hpp
7995#include <cstdlib>
7996#include <cstdint>
7997#include <cstring>
7998#include <stdexcept>
7999
8000namespace Catch {
8001namespace Matchers {
8002namespace Floating {
8003enum class FloatingPointKind : uint8_t {
8004 Float,
8005 Double
8006};
8007}
8008}
8009}
8010
8011namespace {
8012
8013template <typename T>
8014struct Converter;
8015
8016template <>
8017struct Converter<float> {
8018 static_assert(sizeof(float) == sizeof(int32_t), "Important ULP matcher assumption violated");
8019 Converter(float f) {
8020 std::memcpy(&i, &f, sizeof(f));
8021 }
8022 int32_t i;
8023};
8024
8025template <>
8026struct Converter<double> {
8027 static_assert(sizeof(double) == sizeof(int64_t), "Important ULP matcher assumption violated");
8028 Converter(double d) {
8029 std::memcpy(&i, &d, sizeof(d));
8030 }
8031 int64_t i;
8032};
8033
8034template <typename T>
8035auto convert(T t) -> Converter<T> {
8036 return Converter<T>(t);
8037}
8038
8039template <typename FP>
8040bool almostEqualUlps(FP lhs, FP rhs, int maxUlpDiff) {
8041 // Comparison with NaN should always be false.
8042 // This way we can rule it out before getting into the ugly details
8043 if (std::isnan(lhs) || std::isnan(rhs)) {
8044 return false;
8045 }
8046
8047 auto lc = convert(lhs);
8048 auto rc = convert(rhs);
8049
8050 if ((lc.i < 0) != (rc.i < 0)) {
8051 // Potentially we can have +0 and -0
8052 return lhs == rhs;
8053 }
8054
8055 auto ulpDiff = std::abs(lc.i - rc.i);
8056 return ulpDiff <= maxUlpDiff;
8057}
8058
8059}
8060
8061namespace Catch {
8062namespace Matchers {
8063namespace Floating {
8064 WithinAbsMatcher::WithinAbsMatcher(double target, double margin)
8065 :m_target{ target }, m_margin{ margin } {
8066 if (m_margin < 0) {
8067 throw std::domain_error("Allowed margin difference has to be >= 0");
8068 }
8069 }
8070
8071 // Performs equivalent check of std::fabs(lhs - rhs) <= margin
8072 // But without the subtraction to allow for INFINITY in comparison
8073 bool WithinAbsMatcher::match(double const& matchee) const {
8074 return (matchee + m_margin >= m_target) && (m_target + m_margin >= matchee);
8075 }
8076
8077 std::string WithinAbsMatcher::describe() const {
8078 return "is within " + ::Catch::Detail::stringify(m_margin) + " of " + ::Catch::Detail::stringify(m_target);
8079 }
8080
8081 WithinUlpsMatcher::WithinUlpsMatcher(double target, int ulps, FloatingPointKind baseType)
8082 :m_target{ target }, m_ulps{ ulps }, m_type{ baseType } {
8083 if (m_ulps < 0) {
8084 throw std::domain_error("Allowed ulp difference has to be >= 0");
8085 }
8086 }
8087
8088 bool WithinUlpsMatcher::match(double const& matchee) const {
8089 switch (m_type) {
8090 case FloatingPointKind::Float:
8091 return almostEqualUlps<float>(static_cast<float>(matchee), static_cast<float>(m_target), m_ulps);
8092 case FloatingPointKind::Double:
8093 return almostEqualUlps<double>(matchee, m_target, m_ulps);
8094 default:
8095 throw std::domain_error("Unknown FloatingPointKind value");
8096 }
8097 }
8098
8099 std::string WithinUlpsMatcher::describe() const {
8100 return "is within " + Catch::to_string(m_ulps) + " ULPs of " + ::Catch::Detail::stringify(m_target) + ((m_type == FloatingPointKind::Float)? "f" : "");
8101 }
8102
8103}// namespace Floating
8104
8105Floating::WithinUlpsMatcher WithinULP(double target, int maxUlpDiff) {
8106 return Floating::WithinUlpsMatcher(target, maxUlpDiff, Floating::FloatingPointKind::Double);
8107}
8108
8109Floating::WithinUlpsMatcher WithinULP(float target, int maxUlpDiff) {
8110 return Floating::WithinUlpsMatcher(target, maxUlpDiff, Floating::FloatingPointKind::Float);
8111}
8112
8113Floating::WithinAbsMatcher WithinAbs(double target, double margin) {
8114 return Floating::WithinAbsMatcher(target, margin);
8115}
8116
8117} // namespace Matchers
8118} // namespace Catch
8119
8120// end catch_matchers_floating.cpp
8121// start catch_matchers_generic.cpp
8122
8123std::string Catch::Matchers::Generic::Detail::finalizeDescription(const std::string& desc) {
8124 if (desc.empty()) {
8125 return "matches undescribed predicate";
8126 } else {
8127 return "matches predicate: \"" + desc + '"';
8128 }
8129}
8130// end catch_matchers_generic.cpp
8131// start catch_matchers_string.cpp
8132
8133#include <regex>
8134
8135namespace Catch {
8136namespace Matchers {
8137
8138 namespace StdString {
8139
8140 CasedString::CasedString( std::string const& str, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity )
8141 : m_caseSensitivity( caseSensitivity ),
8142 m_str( adjustString( str ) )
8143 {}
8144 std::string CasedString::adjustString( std::string const& str ) const {
8145 return m_caseSensitivity == CaseSensitive::No
8146 ? toLower( str )
8147 : str;
8148 }
8149 std::string CasedString::caseSensitivitySuffix() const {
8150 return m_caseSensitivity == CaseSensitive::No
8151 ? " (case insensitive)"
8152 : std::string();
8153 }
8154
8155 StringMatcherBase::StringMatcherBase( std::string const& operation, CasedString const& comparator )
8156 : m_comparator( comparator ),
8157 m_operation( operation ) {
8158 }
8159
8160 std::string StringMatcherBase::describe() const {
8161 std::string description;
8162 description.reserve(5 + m_operation.size() + m_comparator.m_str.size() +
8163 m_comparator.caseSensitivitySuffix().size());
8164 description += m_operation;
8165 description += ": \"";
8166 description += m_comparator.m_str;
8167 description += "\"";
8168 description += m_comparator.caseSensitivitySuffix();
8169 return description;
8170 }
8171
8172 EqualsMatcher::EqualsMatcher( CasedString const& comparator ) : StringMatcherBase( "equals", comparator ) {}
8173
8174 bool EqualsMatcher::match( std::string const& source ) const {
8175 return m_comparator.adjustString( source ) == m_comparator.m_str;
8176 }
8177
8178 ContainsMatcher::ContainsMatcher( CasedString const& comparator ) : StringMatcherBase( "contains", comparator ) {}
8179
8180 bool ContainsMatcher::match( std::string const& source ) const {
8181 return contains( m_comparator.adjustString( source ), m_comparator.m_str );
8182 }
8183
8184 StartsWithMatcher::StartsWithMatcher( CasedString const& comparator ) : StringMatcherBase( "starts with", comparator ) {}
8185
8186 bool StartsWithMatcher::match( std::string const& source ) const {
8187 return startsWith( m_comparator.adjustString( source ), m_comparator.m_str );
8188 }
8189
8190 EndsWithMatcher::EndsWithMatcher( CasedString const& comparator ) : StringMatcherBase( "ends with", comparator ) {}
8191
8192 bool EndsWithMatcher::match( std::string const& source ) const {
8193 return endsWith( m_comparator.adjustString( source ), m_comparator.m_str );
8194 }
8195
8196 RegexMatcher::RegexMatcher(std::string regex, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity): m_regex(std::move(regex)), m_caseSensitivity(caseSensitivity) {}
8197
8198 bool RegexMatcher::match(std::string const& matchee) const {
8199 auto flags = std::regex::ECMAScript; // ECMAScript is the default syntax option anyway
8200 if (m_caseSensitivity == CaseSensitive::Choice::No) {
8201 flags |= std::regex::icase;
8202 }
8203 auto reg = std::regex(m_regex, flags);
8204 return std::regex_match(matchee, reg);
8205 }
8206
8207 std::string RegexMatcher::describe() const {
8208 return "matches " + ::Catch::Detail::stringify(m_regex) + ((m_caseSensitivity == CaseSensitive::Choice::Yes)? " case sensitively" : " case insensitively");
8209 }
8210
8211 } // namespace StdString
8212
8213 StdString::EqualsMatcher Equals( std::string const& str, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity ) {
8214 return StdString::EqualsMatcher( StdString::CasedString( str, caseSensitivity) );
8215 }
8216 StdString::ContainsMatcher Contains( std::string const& str, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity ) {
8217 return StdString::ContainsMatcher( StdString::CasedString( str, caseSensitivity) );
8218 }
8219 StdString::EndsWithMatcher EndsWith( std::string const& str, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity ) {
8220 return StdString::EndsWithMatcher( StdString::CasedString( str, caseSensitivity) );
8221 }
8222 StdString::StartsWithMatcher StartsWith( std::string const& str, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity ) {
8223 return StdString::StartsWithMatcher( StdString::CasedString( str, caseSensitivity) );
8224 }
8225
8226 StdString::RegexMatcher Matches(std::string const& regex, CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity) {
8227 return StdString::RegexMatcher(regex, caseSensitivity);
8228 }
8229
8230} // namespace Matchers
8231} // namespace Catch
8232// end catch_matchers_string.cpp
8233// start catch_message.cpp
8234
8235// start catch_uncaught_exceptions.h
8236
8237namespace Catch {
8238 bool uncaught_exceptions();
8239} // end namespace Catch
8240
8241// end catch_uncaught_exceptions.h
8242namespace Catch {
8243
8244 MessageInfo::MessageInfo( std::string const& _macroName,
8245 SourceLineInfo const& _lineInfo,
8246 ResultWas::OfType _type )
8247 : macroName( _macroName ),
8248 lineInfo( _lineInfo ),
8249 type( _type ),
8250 sequence( ++globalCount )
8251 {}
8252
8253 bool MessageInfo::operator==( MessageInfo const& other ) const {
8254 return sequence == other.sequence;
8255 }
8256
8257 bool MessageInfo::operator<( MessageInfo const& other ) const {
8258 return sequence < other.sequence;
8259 }
8260
8261 // This may need protecting if threading support is added
8262 unsigned int MessageInfo::globalCount = 0;
8263
8265
8266 Catch::MessageBuilder::MessageBuilder( std::string const& macroName,
8267 SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo,
8268 ResultWas::OfType type )
8269 :m_info(macroName, lineInfo, type) {}
8270
8272
8273 ScopedMessage::ScopedMessage( MessageBuilder const& builder )
8274 : m_info( builder.m_info )
8275 {
8276 m_info.message = builder.m_stream.str();
8277 getResultCapture().pushScopedMessage( m_info );
8278 }
8279
8280 ScopedMessage::~ScopedMessage() {
8281 if ( !uncaught_exceptions() ){
8282 getResultCapture().popScopedMessage(m_info);
8283 }
8284 }
8285} // end namespace Catch
8286// end catch_message.cpp
8287// start catch_output_redirect.cpp
8288
8289// start catch_output_redirect.h
8290#ifndef TWOBLUECUBES_CATCH_OUTPUT_REDIRECT_H
8291#define TWOBLUECUBES_CATCH_OUTPUT_REDIRECT_H
8292
8293#include <cstdio>
8294#include <iosfwd>
8295#include <string>
8296
8297namespace Catch {
8298
8299 class RedirectedStream {
8300 std::ostream& m_originalStream;
8301 std::ostream& m_redirectionStream;
8302 std::streambuf* m_prevBuf;
8303
8304 public:
8305 RedirectedStream( std::ostream& originalStream, std::ostream& redirectionStream );
8306 ~RedirectedStream();
8307 };
8308
8309 class RedirectedStdOut {
8310 ReusableStringStream m_rss;
8311 RedirectedStream m_cout;
8312 public:
8313 RedirectedStdOut();
8314 auto str() const -> std::string;
8315 };
8316
8317 // StdErr has two constituent streams in C++, std::cerr and std::clog
8318 // This means that we need to redirect 2 streams into 1 to keep proper
8319 // order of writes
8320 class RedirectedStdErr {
8321 ReusableStringStream m_rss;
8322 RedirectedStream m_cerr;
8323 RedirectedStream m_clog;
8324 public:
8325 RedirectedStdErr();
8326 auto str() const -> std::string;
8327 };
8328
8329#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_NEW_CAPTURE)
8330
8331 // Windows's implementation of std::tmpfile is terrible (it tries
8332 // to create a file inside system folder, thus requiring elevated
8333 // privileges for the binary), so we have to use tmpnam(_s) and
8334 // create the file ourselves there.
8335 class TempFile {
8336 public:
8337 TempFile(TempFile const&) = delete;
8338 TempFile& operator=(TempFile const&) = delete;
8339 TempFile(TempFile&&) = delete;
8340 TempFile& operator=(TempFile&&) = delete;
8341
8342 TempFile();
8343 ~TempFile();
8344
8345 std::FILE* getFile();
8346 std::string getContents();
8347
8348 private:
8349 std::FILE* m_file = nullptr;
8350 #if defined(_MSC_VER)
8351 char m_buffer[L_tmpnam] = { 0 };
8352 #endif
8353 };
8354
8355 class OutputRedirect {
8356 public:
8357 OutputRedirect(OutputRedirect const&) = delete;
8358 OutputRedirect& operator=(OutputRedirect const&) = delete;
8359 OutputRedirect(OutputRedirect&&) = delete;
8360 OutputRedirect& operator=(OutputRedirect&&) = delete;
8361
8362 OutputRedirect(std::string& stdout_dest, std::string& stderr_dest);
8363 ~OutputRedirect();
8364
8365 private:
8366 int m_originalStdout = -1;
8367 int m_originalStderr = -1;
8368 TempFile m_stdoutFile;
8369 TempFile m_stderrFile;
8370 std::string& m_stdoutDest;
8371 std::string& m_stderrDest;
8372 };
8373
8374#endif
8375
8376} // end namespace Catch
8377
8378#endif // TWOBLUECUBES_CATCH_OUTPUT_REDIRECT_H
8379// end catch_output_redirect.h
8380#include <cstdio>
8381#include <cstring>
8382#include <fstream>
8383#include <sstream>
8384#include <stdexcept>
8385
8386#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_NEW_CAPTURE)
8387 #if defined(_MSC_VER)
8388 #include <io.h> //_dup and _dup2
8389 #define dup _dup
8390 #define dup2 _dup2
8391 #define fileno _fileno
8392 #else
8393 #include <unistd.h> // dup and dup2
8394 #endif
8395#endif
8396
8397namespace Catch {
8398
8399 RedirectedStream::RedirectedStream( std::ostream& originalStream, std::ostream& redirectionStream )
8400 : m_originalStream( originalStream ),
8401 m_redirectionStream( redirectionStream ),
8402 m_prevBuf( m_originalStream.rdbuf() )
8403 {
8404 m_originalStream.rdbuf( m_redirectionStream.rdbuf() );
8405 }
8406
8407 RedirectedStream::~RedirectedStream() {
8408 m_originalStream.rdbuf( m_prevBuf );
8409 }
8410
8411 RedirectedStdOut::RedirectedStdOut() : m_cout( Catch::cout(), m_rss.get() ) {}
8412 auto RedirectedStdOut::str() const -> std::string { return m_rss.str(); }
8413
8414 RedirectedStdErr::RedirectedStdErr()
8415 : m_cerr( Catch::cerr(), m_rss.get() ),
8416 m_clog( Catch::clog(), m_rss.get() )
8417 {}
8418 auto RedirectedStdErr::str() const -> std::string { return m_rss.str(); }
8419
8420#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_NEW_CAPTURE)
8421
8422#if defined(_MSC_VER)
8423 TempFile::TempFile() {
8424 if (tmpnam_s(m_buffer)) {
8425 throw std::runtime_error("Could not get a temp filename");
8426 }
8427 if (fopen_s(&m_file, m_buffer, "w")) {
8428 char buffer[100];
8429 if (strerror_s(buffer, errno)) {
8430 throw std::runtime_error("Could not translate errno to string");
8431 }
8432 throw std::runtime_error("Could not open the temp file: " + std::string(m_buffer) + buffer);
8433 }
8434 }
8435#else
8436 TempFile::TempFile() {
8437 m_file = std::tmpfile();
8438 if (!m_file) {
8439 throw std::runtime_error("Could not create a temp file.");
8440 }
8441 }
8442
8443#endif
8444
8445 TempFile::~TempFile() {
8446 // TBD: What to do about errors here?
8447 std::fclose(m_file);
8448 // We manually create the file on Windows only, on Linux
8449 // it will be autodeleted
8450#if defined(_MSC_VER)
8451 std::remove(m_buffer);
8452#endif
8453 }
8454
8455 FILE* TempFile::getFile() {
8456 return m_file;
8457 }
8458
8459 std::string TempFile::getContents() {
8460 std::stringstream sstr;
8461 char buffer[100] = {};
8462 std::rewind(m_file);
8463 while (std::fgets(buffer, sizeof(buffer), m_file)) {
8464 sstr << buffer;
8465 }
8466 return sstr.str();
8467 }
8468
8469 OutputRedirect::OutputRedirect(std::string& stdout_dest, std::string& stderr_dest) :
8470 m_originalStdout(dup(1)),
8471 m_originalStderr(dup(2)),
8472 m_stdoutDest(stdout_dest),
8473 m_stderrDest(stderr_dest) {
8474 dup2(fileno(m_stdoutFile.getFile()), 1);
8475 dup2(fileno(m_stderrFile.getFile()), 2);
8476 }
8477
8478 OutputRedirect::~OutputRedirect() {
8479 Catch::cout() << std::flush;
8480 fflush(stdout);
8481 // Since we support overriding these streams, we flush cerr
8482 // even though std::cerr is unbuffered
8483 Catch::cerr() << std::flush;
8484 Catch::clog() << std::flush;
8485 fflush(stderr);
8486
8487 dup2(m_originalStdout, 1);
8488 dup2(m_originalStderr, 2);
8489
8490 m_stdoutDest += m_stdoutFile.getContents();
8491 m_stderrDest += m_stderrFile.getContents();
8492 }
8493
8494#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_NEW_CAPTURE
8495
8496} // namespace Catch
8497
8498#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_NEW_CAPTURE)
8499 #if defined(_MSC_VER)
8500 #undef dup
8501 #undef dup2
8502 #undef fileno
8503 #endif
8504#endif
8505// end catch_output_redirect.cpp
8506// start catch_random_number_generator.cpp
8507
8508// start catch_random_number_generator.h
8509
8510#include <algorithm>
8511#include <random>
8512
8513namespace Catch {
8514
8515 struct IConfig;
8516
8517 std::mt19937& rng();
8518 void seedRng( IConfig const& config );
8519 unsigned int rngSeed();
8520
8521}
8522
8523// end catch_random_number_generator.h
8524namespace Catch {
8525
8526 std::mt19937& rng() {
8527 static std::mt19937 s_rng;
8528 return s_rng;
8529 }
8530
8531 void seedRng( IConfig const& config ) {
8532 if( config.rngSeed() != 0 ) {
8533 std::srand( config.rngSeed() );
8534 rng().seed( config.rngSeed() );
8535 }
8536 }
8537
8538 unsigned int rngSeed() {
8539 return getCurrentContext().getConfig()->rngSeed();
8540 }
8541}
8542// end catch_random_number_generator.cpp
8543// start catch_registry_hub.cpp
8544
8545// start catch_test_case_registry_impl.h
8546
8547#include <vector>
8548#include <set>
8549#include <algorithm>
8550#include <ios>
8551
8552namespace Catch {
8553
8554 class TestCase;
8555 struct IConfig;
8556
8557 std::vector<TestCase> sortTests( IConfig const& config, std::vector<TestCase> const& unsortedTestCases );
8558 bool matchTest( TestCase const& testCase, TestSpec const& testSpec, IConfig const& config );
8559
8560 void enforceNoDuplicateTestCases( std::vector<TestCase> const& functions );
8561
8562 std::vector<TestCase> filterTests( std::vector<TestCase> const& testCases, TestSpec const& testSpec, IConfig const& config );
8563 std::vector<TestCase> const& getAllTestCasesSorted( IConfig const& config );
8564
8565 class TestRegistry : public ITestCaseRegistry {
8566 public:
8567 virtual ~TestRegistry() = default;
8568
8569 virtual void registerTest( TestCase const& testCase );
8570
8571 std::vector<TestCase> const& getAllTests() const override;
8572 std::vector<TestCase> const& getAllTestsSorted( IConfig const& config ) const override;
8573
8574 private:
8575 std::vector<TestCase> m_functions;
8576 mutable RunTests::InWhatOrder m_currentSortOrder = RunTests::InDeclarationOrder;
8577 mutable std::vector<TestCase> m_sortedFunctions;
8578 std::size_t m_unnamedCount = 0;
8579 std::ios_base::Init m_ostreamInit; // Forces cout/ cerr to be initialised
8580 };
8581
8583
8584 class TestInvokerAsFunction : public ITestInvoker {
8585 void(*m_testAsFunction)();
8586 public:
8587 TestInvokerAsFunction( void(*testAsFunction)() ) noexcept;
8588
8589 void invoke() const override;
8590 };
8591
8592 std::string extractClassName( StringRef const& classOrQualifiedMethodName );
8593
8595
8596} // end namespace Catch
8597
8598// end catch_test_case_registry_impl.h
8599// start catch_reporter_registry.h
8600
8601#include <map>
8602
8603namespace Catch {
8604
8605 class ReporterRegistry : public IReporterRegistry {
8606
8607 public:
8608
8609 ~ReporterRegistry() override;
8610
8611 IStreamingReporterPtr create( std::string const& name, IConfigPtr const& config ) const override;
8612
8613 void registerReporter( std::string const& name, IReporterFactoryPtr const& factory );
8614 void registerListener( IReporterFactoryPtr const& factory );
8615
8616 FactoryMap const& getFactories() const override;
8617 Listeners const& getListeners() const override;
8618
8619 private:
8620 FactoryMap m_factories;
8621 Listeners m_listeners;
8622 };
8623}
8624
8625// end catch_reporter_registry.h
8626// start catch_tag_alias_registry.h
8627
8628// start catch_tag_alias.h
8629
8630#include <string>
8631
8632namespace Catch {
8633
8634 struct TagAlias {
8635 TagAlias(std::string const& _tag, SourceLineInfo _lineInfo);
8636
8637 std::string tag;
8638 SourceLineInfo lineInfo;
8639 };
8640
8641} // end namespace Catch
8642
8643// end catch_tag_alias.h
8644#include <map>
8645
8646namespace Catch {
8647
8648 class TagAliasRegistry : public ITagAliasRegistry {
8649 public:
8650 ~TagAliasRegistry() override;
8651 TagAlias const* find( std::string const& alias ) const override;
8652 std::string expandAliases( std::string const& unexpandedTestSpec ) const override;
8653 void add( std::string const& alias, std::string const& tag, SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo );
8654
8655 private:
8656 std::map<std::string, TagAlias> m_registry;
8657 };
8658
8659} // end namespace Catch
8660
8661// end catch_tag_alias_registry.h
8662// start catch_startup_exception_registry.h
8663
8664#include <vector>
8665#include <exception>
8666
8667namespace Catch {
8668
8669 class StartupExceptionRegistry {
8670 public:
8671 void add(std::exception_ptr const& exception) noexcept;
8672 std::vector<std::exception_ptr> const& getExceptions() const noexcept;
8673 private:
8674 std::vector<std::exception_ptr> m_exceptions;
8675 };
8676
8677} // end namespace Catch
8678
8679// end catch_startup_exception_registry.h
8680namespace Catch {
8681
8682 namespace {
8683
8684 class RegistryHub : public IRegistryHub, public IMutableRegistryHub,
8685 private NonCopyable {
8686
8687 public: // IRegistryHub
8688 RegistryHub() = default;
8689 IReporterRegistry const& getReporterRegistry() const override {
8690 return m_reporterRegistry;
8691 }
8692 ITestCaseRegistry const& getTestCaseRegistry() const override {
8693 return m_testCaseRegistry;
8694 }
8695 IExceptionTranslatorRegistry& getExceptionTranslatorRegistry() override {
8696 return m_exceptionTranslatorRegistry;
8697 }
8698 ITagAliasRegistry const& getTagAliasRegistry() const override {
8699 return m_tagAliasRegistry;
8700 }
8701 StartupExceptionRegistry const& getStartupExceptionRegistry() const override {
8702 return m_exceptionRegistry;
8703 }
8704
8705 public: // IMutableRegistryHub
8706 void registerReporter( std::string const& name, IReporterFactoryPtr const& factory ) override {
8707 m_reporterRegistry.registerReporter( name, factory );
8708 }
8709 void registerListener( IReporterFactoryPtr const& factory ) override {
8710 m_reporterRegistry.registerListener( factory );
8711 }
8712 void registerTest( TestCase const& testInfo ) override {
8713 m_testCaseRegistry.registerTest( testInfo );
8714 }
8715 void registerTranslator( const IExceptionTranslator* translator ) override {
8716 m_exceptionTranslatorRegistry.registerTranslator( translator );
8717 }
8718 void registerTagAlias( std::string const& alias, std::string const& tag, SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo ) override {
8719 m_tagAliasRegistry.add( alias, tag, lineInfo );
8720 }
8721 void registerStartupException() noexcept override {
8722 m_exceptionRegistry.add(std::current_exception());
8723 }
8724
8725 private:
8726 TestRegistry m_testCaseRegistry;
8727 ReporterRegistry m_reporterRegistry;
8728 ExceptionTranslatorRegistry m_exceptionTranslatorRegistry;
8729 TagAliasRegistry m_tagAliasRegistry;
8730 StartupExceptionRegistry m_exceptionRegistry;
8731 };
8732
8733 // Single, global, instance
8734 RegistryHub*& getTheRegistryHub() {
8735 static RegistryHub* theRegistryHub = nullptr;
8736 if( !theRegistryHub )
8737 theRegistryHub = new RegistryHub();
8738 return theRegistryHub;
8739 }
8740 }
8741
8742 IRegistryHub& getRegistryHub() {
8743 return *getTheRegistryHub();
8744 }
8745 IMutableRegistryHub& getMutableRegistryHub() {
8746 return *getTheRegistryHub();
8747 }
8748 void cleanUp() {
8749 delete getTheRegistryHub();
8750 getTheRegistryHub() = nullptr;
8751 cleanUpContext();
8752 ReusableStringStream::cleanup();
8753 }
8754 std::string translateActiveException() {
8755 return getRegistryHub().getExceptionTranslatorRegistry().translateActiveException();
8756 }
8757
8758} // end namespace Catch
8759// end catch_registry_hub.cpp
8760// start catch_reporter_registry.cpp
8761
8762namespace Catch {
8763
8764 ReporterRegistry::~ReporterRegistry() = default;
8765
8766 IStreamingReporterPtr ReporterRegistry::create( std::string const& name, IConfigPtr const& config ) const {
8767 auto it = m_factories.find( name );
8768 if( it == m_factories.end() )
8769 return nullptr;
8770 return it->second->create( ReporterConfig( config ) );
8771 }
8772
8773 void ReporterRegistry::registerReporter( std::string const& name, IReporterFactoryPtr const& factory ) {
8774 m_factories.emplace(name, factory);
8775 }
8776 void ReporterRegistry::registerListener( IReporterFactoryPtr const& factory ) {
8777 m_listeners.push_back( factory );
8778 }
8779
8780 IReporterRegistry::FactoryMap const& ReporterRegistry::getFactories() const {
8781 return m_factories;
8782 }
8783 IReporterRegistry::Listeners const& ReporterRegistry::getListeners() const {
8784 return m_listeners;
8785 }
8786
8787}
8788// end catch_reporter_registry.cpp
8789// start catch_result_type.cpp
8790
8791namespace Catch {
8792
8793 bool isOk( ResultWas::OfType resultType ) {
8794 return ( resultType & ResultWas::FailureBit ) == 0;
8795 }
8796 bool isJustInfo( int flags ) {
8797 return flags == ResultWas::Info;
8798 }
8799
8800 ResultDisposition::Flags operator | ( ResultDisposition::Flags lhs, ResultDisposition::Flags rhs ) {
8801 return static_cast<ResultDisposition::Flags>( static_cast<int>( lhs ) | static_cast<int>( rhs ) );
8802 }
8803
8804 bool shouldContinueOnFailure( int flags ) { return ( flags & ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure ) != 0; }
8805 bool shouldSuppressFailure( int flags ) { return ( flags & ResultDisposition::SuppressFail ) != 0; }
8806
8807} // end namespace Catch
8808// end catch_result_type.cpp
8809// start catch_run_context.cpp
8810
8811#include <cassert>
8812#include <algorithm>
8813#include <sstream>
8814
8815namespace Catch {
8816
8817 RunContext::RunContext(IConfigPtr const& _config, IStreamingReporterPtr&& reporter)
8818 : m_runInfo(_config->name()),
8819 m_context(getCurrentMutableContext()),
8820 m_config(_config),
8821 m_reporter(std::move(reporter)),
8822 m_lastAssertionInfo{ StringRef(), SourceLineInfo("",0), StringRef(), ResultDisposition::Normal },
8823 m_includeSuccessfulResults( m_config->includeSuccessfulResults() || m_reporter->getPreferences().shouldReportAllAssertions )
8824 {
8825 m_context.setRunner(this);
8826 m_context.setConfig(m_config);
8827 m_context.setResultCapture(this);
8828 m_reporter->testRunStarting(m_runInfo);
8829 }
8830
8831 RunContext::~RunContext() {
8832 m_reporter->testRunEnded(TestRunStats(m_runInfo, m_totals, aborting()));
8833 }
8834
8835 void RunContext::testGroupStarting(std::string const& testSpec, std::size_t groupIndex, std::size_t groupsCount) {
8836 m_reporter->testGroupStarting(GroupInfo(testSpec, groupIndex, groupsCount));
8837 }
8838
8839 void RunContext::testGroupEnded(std::string const& testSpec, Totals const& totals, std::size_t groupIndex, std::size_t groupsCount) {
8840 m_reporter->testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats(GroupInfo(testSpec, groupIndex, groupsCount), totals, aborting()));
8841 }
8842
8843 Totals RunContext::runTest(TestCase const& testCase) {
8844 Totals prevTotals = m_totals;
8845
8846 std::string redirectedCout;
8847 std::string redirectedCerr;
8848
8849 auto const& testInfo = testCase.getTestCaseInfo();
8850
8851 m_reporter->testCaseStarting(testInfo);
8852
8853 m_activeTestCase = &testCase;
8854
8855 ITracker& rootTracker = m_trackerContext.startRun();
8856 assert(rootTracker.isSectionTracker());
8857 static_cast<SectionTracker&>(rootTracker).addInitialFilters(m_config->getSectionsToRun());
8858 do {
8859 m_trackerContext.startCycle();
8860 m_testCaseTracker = &SectionTracker::acquire(m_trackerContext, TestCaseTracking::NameAndLocation(testInfo.name, testInfo.lineInfo));
8861 runCurrentTest(redirectedCout, redirectedCerr);
8862 } while (!m_testCaseTracker->isSuccessfullyCompleted() && !aborting());
8863
8864 Totals deltaTotals = m_totals.delta(prevTotals);
8865 if (testInfo.expectedToFail() && deltaTotals.testCases.passed > 0) {
8866 deltaTotals.assertions.failed++;
8867 deltaTotals.testCases.passed--;
8868 deltaTotals.testCases.failed++;
8869 }
8870 m_totals.testCases += deltaTotals.testCases;
8871 m_reporter->testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats(testInfo,
8872 deltaTotals,
8873 redirectedCout,
8874 redirectedCerr,
8875 aborting()));
8876
8877 m_activeTestCase = nullptr;
8878 m_testCaseTracker = nullptr;
8879
8880 return deltaTotals;
8881 }
8882
8883 IConfigPtr RunContext::config() const {
8884 return m_config;
8885 }
8886
8887 IStreamingReporter& RunContext::reporter() const {
8888 return *m_reporter;
8889 }
8890
8891 void RunContext::assertionEnded(AssertionResult const & result) {
8892 if (result.getResultType() == ResultWas::Ok) {
8893 m_totals.assertions.passed++;
8894 m_lastAssertionPassed = true;
8895 } else if (!result.isOk()) {
8896 m_lastAssertionPassed = false;
8897 if( m_activeTestCase->getTestCaseInfo().okToFail() )
8898 m_totals.assertions.failedButOk++;
8899 else
8900 m_totals.assertions.failed++;
8901 }
8902 else {
8903 m_lastAssertionPassed = true;
8904 }
8905
8906 // We have no use for the return value (whether messages should be cleared), because messages were made scoped
8907 // and should be let to clear themselves out.
8908 static_cast<void>(m_reporter->assertionEnded(AssertionStats(result, m_messages, m_totals)));
8909
8910 // Reset working state
8911 resetAssertionInfo();
8912 m_lastResult = result;
8913 }
8914 void RunContext::resetAssertionInfo() {
8915 m_lastAssertionInfo.macroName = StringRef();
8916 m_lastAssertionInfo.capturedExpression = "{Unknown expression after the reported line}"_sr;
8917 }
8918
8919 bool RunContext::sectionStarted(SectionInfo const & sectionInfo, Counts & assertions) {
8920 ITracker& sectionTracker = SectionTracker::acquire(m_trackerContext, TestCaseTracking::NameAndLocation(sectionInfo.name, sectionInfo.lineInfo));
8921 if (!sectionTracker.isOpen())
8922 return false;
8923 m_activeSections.push_back(&sectionTracker);
8924
8925 m_lastAssertionInfo.lineInfo = sectionInfo.lineInfo;
8926
8927 m_reporter->sectionStarting(sectionInfo);
8928
8929 assertions = m_totals.assertions;
8930
8931 return true;
8932 }
8933
8934 bool RunContext::testForMissingAssertions(Counts& assertions) {
8935 if (assertions.total() != 0)
8936 return false;
8937 if (!m_config->warnAboutMissingAssertions())
8938 return false;
8939 if (m_trackerContext.currentTracker().hasChildren())
8940 return false;
8941 m_totals.assertions.failed++;
8942 assertions.failed++;
8943 return true;
8944 }
8945
8946 void RunContext::sectionEnded(SectionEndInfo const & endInfo) {
8947 Counts assertions = m_totals.assertions - endInfo.prevAssertions;
8948 bool missingAssertions = testForMissingAssertions(assertions);
8949
8950 if (!m_activeSections.empty()) {
8951 m_activeSections.back()->close();
8952 m_activeSections.pop_back();
8953 }
8954
8955 m_reporter->sectionEnded(SectionStats(endInfo.sectionInfo, assertions, endInfo.durationInSeconds, missingAssertions));
8956 m_messages.clear();
8957 }
8958
8959 void RunContext::sectionEndedEarly(SectionEndInfo const & endInfo) {
8960 if (m_unfinishedSections.empty())
8961 m_activeSections.back()->fail();
8962 else
8963 m_activeSections.back()->close();
8964 m_activeSections.pop_back();
8965
8966 m_unfinishedSections.push_back(endInfo);
8967 }
8968 void RunContext::benchmarkStarting( BenchmarkInfo const& info ) {
8969 m_reporter->benchmarkStarting( info );
8970 }
8971 void RunContext::benchmarkEnded( BenchmarkStats const& stats ) {
8972 m_reporter->benchmarkEnded( stats );
8973 }
8974
8975 void RunContext::pushScopedMessage(MessageInfo const & message) {
8976 m_messages.push_back(message);
8977 }
8978
8979 void RunContext::popScopedMessage(MessageInfo const & message) {
8980 m_messages.erase(std::remove(m_messages.begin(), m_messages.end(), message), m_messages.end());
8981 }
8982
8983 std::string RunContext::getCurrentTestName() const {
8984 return m_activeTestCase
8985 ? m_activeTestCase->getTestCaseInfo().name
8986 : std::string();
8987 }
8988
8989 const AssertionResult * RunContext::getLastResult() const {
8990 return &(*m_lastResult);
8991 }
8992
8993 void RunContext::exceptionEarlyReported() {
8994 m_shouldReportUnexpected = false;
8995 }
8996
8997 void RunContext::handleFatalErrorCondition( StringRef message ) {
8998 // First notify reporter that bad things happened
8999 m_reporter->fatalErrorEncountered(message);
9000
9001 // Don't rebuild the result -- the stringification itself can cause more fatal errors
9002 // Instead, fake a result data.
9003 AssertionResultData tempResult( ResultWas::FatalErrorCondition, { false } );
9004 tempResult.message = message;
9005 AssertionResult result(m_lastAssertionInfo, tempResult);
9006
9007 assertionEnded(result);
9008
9009 handleUnfinishedSections();
9010
9011 // Recreate section for test case (as we will lose the one that was in scope)
9012 auto const& testCaseInfo = m_activeTestCase->getTestCaseInfo();
9013 SectionInfo testCaseSection(testCaseInfo.lineInfo, testCaseInfo.name);
9014
9015 Counts assertions;
9016 assertions.failed = 1;
9017 SectionStats testCaseSectionStats(testCaseSection, assertions, 0, false);
9018 m_reporter->sectionEnded(testCaseSectionStats);
9019
9020 auto const& testInfo = m_activeTestCase->getTestCaseInfo();
9021
9022 Totals deltaTotals;
9023 deltaTotals.testCases.failed = 1;
9024 deltaTotals.assertions.failed = 1;
9025 m_reporter->testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats(testInfo,
9026 deltaTotals,
9027 std::string(),
9028 std::string(),
9029 false));
9030 m_totals.testCases.failed++;
9031 testGroupEnded(std::string(), m_totals, 1, 1);
9032 m_reporter->testRunEnded(TestRunStats(m_runInfo, m_totals, false));
9033 }
9034
9035 bool RunContext::lastAssertionPassed() {
9036 return m_lastAssertionPassed;
9037 }
9038
9039 void RunContext::assertionPassed() {
9040 m_lastAssertionPassed = true;
9041 ++m_totals.assertions.passed;
9042 resetAssertionInfo();
9043 }
9044
9045 bool RunContext::aborting() const {
9046 return m_totals.assertions.failed == static_cast<std::size_t>(m_config->abortAfter());
9047 }
9048
9049 void RunContext::runCurrentTest(std::string & redirectedCout, std::string & redirectedCerr) {
9050 auto const& testCaseInfo = m_activeTestCase->getTestCaseInfo();
9051 SectionInfo testCaseSection(testCaseInfo.lineInfo, testCaseInfo.name);
9052 m_reporter->sectionStarting(testCaseSection);
9053 Counts prevAssertions = m_totals.assertions;
9054 double duration = 0;
9055 m_shouldReportUnexpected = true;
9056 m_lastAssertionInfo = { "TEST_CASE"_sr, testCaseInfo.lineInfo, StringRef(), ResultDisposition::Normal };
9057
9058 seedRng(*m_config);
9059
9060 Timer timer;
9061 try {
9062 if (m_reporter->getPreferences().shouldRedirectStdOut) {
9063#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_EXPERIMENTAL_REDIRECT)
9064 RedirectedStdOut redirectedStdOut;
9065 RedirectedStdErr redirectedStdErr;
9066
9067 timer.start();
9068 invokeActiveTestCase();
9069 redirectedCout += redirectedStdOut.str();
9070 redirectedCerr += redirectedStdErr.str();
9071#else
9072 OutputRedirect r(redirectedCout, redirectedCerr);
9073 timer.start();
9074 invokeActiveTestCase();
9075#endif
9076 } else {
9077 timer.start();
9078 invokeActiveTestCase();
9079 }
9080 duration = timer.getElapsedSeconds();
9081 } catch (TestFailureException&) {
9082 // This just means the test was aborted due to failure
9083 } catch (...) {
9084 // Under CATCH_CONFIG_FAST_COMPILE, unexpected exceptions under REQUIRE assertions
9085 // are reported without translation at the point of origin.
9086 if( m_shouldReportUnexpected ) {
9087 AssertionReaction dummyReaction;
9088 handleUnexpectedInflightException( m_lastAssertionInfo, translateActiveException(), dummyReaction );
9089 }
9090 }
9091 Counts assertions = m_totals.assertions - prevAssertions;
9092 bool missingAssertions = testForMissingAssertions(assertions);
9093
9094 m_testCaseTracker->close();
9095 handleUnfinishedSections();
9096 m_messages.clear();
9097
9098 SectionStats testCaseSectionStats(testCaseSection, assertions, duration, missingAssertions);
9099 m_reporter->sectionEnded(testCaseSectionStats);
9100 }
9101
9102 void RunContext::invokeActiveTestCase() {
9103 FatalConditionHandler fatalConditionHandler; // Handle signals
9104 m_activeTestCase->invoke();
9105 fatalConditionHandler.reset();
9106 }
9107
9108 void RunContext::handleUnfinishedSections() {
9109 // If sections ended prematurely due to an exception we stored their
9110 // infos here so we can tear them down outside the unwind process.
9111 for (auto it = m_unfinishedSections.rbegin(),
9112 itEnd = m_unfinishedSections.rend();
9113 it != itEnd;
9114 ++it)
9115 sectionEnded(*it);
9116 m_unfinishedSections.clear();
9117 }
9118
9119 void RunContext::handleExpr(
9120 AssertionInfo const& info,
9121 ITransientExpression const& expr,
9122 AssertionReaction& reaction
9123 ) {
9124 m_reporter->assertionStarting( info );
9125
9126 bool negated = isFalseTest( info.resultDisposition );
9127 bool result = expr.getResult() != negated;
9128
9129 if( result ) {
9130 if (!m_includeSuccessfulResults) {
9131 assertionPassed();
9132 }
9133 else {
9134 reportExpr(info, ResultWas::Ok, &expr, negated);
9135 }
9136 }
9137 else {
9138 reportExpr(info, ResultWas::ExpressionFailed, &expr, negated );
9139 populateReaction( reaction );
9140 }
9141 }
9142 void RunContext::reportExpr(
9143 AssertionInfo const &info,
9144 ResultWas::OfType resultType,
9145 ITransientExpression const *expr,
9146 bool negated ) {
9147
9148 m_lastAssertionInfo = info;
9149 AssertionResultData data( resultType, LazyExpression( negated ) );
9150
9151 AssertionResult assertionResult{ info, data };
9152 assertionResult.m_resultData.lazyExpression.m_transientExpression = expr;
9153
9154 assertionEnded( assertionResult );
9155 }
9156
9157 void RunContext::handleMessage(
9158 AssertionInfo const& info,
9159 ResultWas::OfType resultType,
9160 StringRef const& message,
9161 AssertionReaction& reaction
9162 ) {
9163 m_reporter->assertionStarting( info );
9164
9165 m_lastAssertionInfo = info;
9166
9167 AssertionResultData data( resultType, LazyExpression( false ) );
9168 data.message = message;
9169 AssertionResult assertionResult{ m_lastAssertionInfo, data };
9170 assertionEnded( assertionResult );
9171 if( !assertionResult.isOk() )
9172 populateReaction( reaction );
9173 }
9174 void RunContext::handleUnexpectedExceptionNotThrown(
9175 AssertionInfo const& info,
9176 AssertionReaction& reaction
9177 ) {
9178 handleNonExpr(info, Catch::ResultWas::DidntThrowException, reaction);
9179 }
9180
9181 void RunContext::handleUnexpectedInflightException(
9182 AssertionInfo const& info,
9183 std::string const& message,
9184 AssertionReaction& reaction
9185 ) {
9186 m_lastAssertionInfo = info;
9187
9188 AssertionResultData data( ResultWas::ThrewException, LazyExpression( false ) );
9189 data.message = message;
9190 AssertionResult assertionResult{ info, data };
9191 assertionEnded( assertionResult );
9192 populateReaction( reaction );
9193 }
9194
9195 void RunContext::populateReaction( AssertionReaction& reaction ) {
9196 reaction.shouldDebugBreak = m_config->shouldDebugBreak();
9197 reaction.shouldThrow = aborting() || (m_lastAssertionInfo.resultDisposition & ResultDisposition::Normal);
9198 }
9199
9200 void RunContext::handleIncomplete(
9201 AssertionInfo const& info
9202 ) {
9203 m_lastAssertionInfo = info;
9204
9205 AssertionResultData data( ResultWas::ThrewException, LazyExpression( false ) );
9206 data.message = "Exception translation was disabled by CATCH_CONFIG_FAST_COMPILE";
9207 AssertionResult assertionResult{ info, data };
9208 assertionEnded( assertionResult );
9209 }
9210 void RunContext::handleNonExpr(
9211 AssertionInfo const &info,
9212 ResultWas::OfType resultType,
9213 AssertionReaction &reaction
9214 ) {
9215 m_lastAssertionInfo = info;
9216
9217 AssertionResultData data( resultType, LazyExpression( false ) );
9218 AssertionResult assertionResult{ info, data };
9219 assertionEnded( assertionResult );
9220
9221 if( !assertionResult.isOk() )
9222 populateReaction( reaction );
9223 }
9224
9225 IResultCapture& getResultCapture() {
9226 if (auto* capture = getCurrentContext().getResultCapture())
9227 return *capture;
9228 else
9229 CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR("No result capture instance");
9230 }
9231}
9232// end catch_run_context.cpp
9233// start catch_section.cpp
9234
9235namespace Catch {
9236
9237 Section::Section( SectionInfo const& info )
9238 : m_info( info ),
9239 m_sectionIncluded( getResultCapture().sectionStarted( m_info, m_assertions ) )
9240 {
9241 m_timer.start();
9242 }
9243
9244 Section::~Section() {
9245 if( m_sectionIncluded ) {
9246 SectionEndInfo endInfo{ m_info, m_assertions, m_timer.getElapsedSeconds() };
9247 if( uncaught_exceptions() )
9248 getResultCapture().sectionEndedEarly( endInfo );
9249 else
9250 getResultCapture().sectionEnded( endInfo );
9251 }
9252 }
9253
9254 // This indicates whether the section should be executed or not
9255 Section::operator bool() const {
9256 return m_sectionIncluded;
9257 }
9258
9259} // end namespace Catch
9260// end catch_section.cpp
9261// start catch_section_info.cpp
9262
9263namespace Catch {
9264
9265 SectionInfo::SectionInfo
9266 ( SourceLineInfo const& _lineInfo,
9267 std::string const& _name )
9268 : name( _name ),
9269 lineInfo( _lineInfo )
9270 {}
9271
9272} // end namespace Catch
9273// end catch_section_info.cpp
9274// start catch_session.cpp
9275
9276// start catch_session.h
9277
9278#include <memory>
9279
9280namespace Catch {
9281
9282 class Session : NonCopyable {
9283 public:
9284
9285 Session();
9286 ~Session() override;
9287
9288 void showHelp() const;
9289 void libIdentify();
9290
9291 int applyCommandLine( int argc, char const * const * argv );
9292
9293 void useConfigData( ConfigData const& configData );
9294
9295 int run( int argc, char* argv[] );
9296 #if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_WCHAR) && defined(WIN32) && defined(UNICODE)
9297 int run( int argc, wchar_t* const argv[] );
9298 #endif
9299 int run();
9300
9301 clara::Parser const& cli() const;
9302 void cli( clara::Parser const& newParser );
9303 ConfigData& configData();
9304 Config& config();
9305 private:
9306 int runInternal();
9307
9308 clara::Parser m_cli;
9309 ConfigData m_configData;
9310 std::shared_ptr<Config> m_config;
9311 bool m_startupExceptions = false;
9312 };
9313
9314} // end namespace Catch
9315
9316// end catch_session.h
9317// start catch_version.h
9318
9319#include <iosfwd>
9320
9321namespace Catch {
9322
9323 // Versioning information
9324 struct Version {
9325 Version( Version const& ) = delete;
9326 Version& operator=( Version const& ) = delete;
9327 Version( unsigned int _majorVersion,
9328 unsigned int _minorVersion,
9329 unsigned int _patchNumber,
9330 char const * const _branchName,
9331 unsigned int _buildNumber );
9332
9333 unsigned int const majorVersion;
9334 unsigned int const minorVersion;
9335 unsigned int const patchNumber;
9336
9337 // buildNumber is only used if branchName is not null
9338 char const * const branchName;
9339 unsigned int const buildNumber;
9340
9341 friend std::ostream& operator << ( std::ostream& os, Version const& version );
9342 };
9343
9344 Version const& libraryVersion();
9345}
9346
9347// end catch_version.h
9348#include <cstdlib>
9349#include <iomanip>
9350
9351namespace Catch {
9352
9353 namespace {
9354 const int MaxExitCode = 255;
9355
9356 IStreamingReporterPtr createReporter(std::string const& reporterName, IConfigPtr const& config) {
9357 auto reporter = Catch::getRegistryHub().getReporterRegistry().create(reporterName, config);
9358 CATCH_ENFORCE(reporter, "No reporter registered with name: '" << reporterName << "'");
9359
9360 return reporter;
9361 }
9362
9363 IStreamingReporterPtr makeReporter(std::shared_ptr<Config> const& config) {
9364 if (Catch::getRegistryHub().getReporterRegistry().getListeners().empty()) {
9365 return createReporter(config->getReporterName(), config);
9366 }
9367
9368 auto multi = std::unique_ptr<ListeningReporter>(new ListeningReporter);
9369
9370 auto const& listeners = Catch::getRegistryHub().getReporterRegistry().getListeners();
9371 for (auto const& listener : listeners) {
9372 multi->addListener(listener->create(Catch::ReporterConfig(config)));
9373 }
9374 multi->addReporter(createReporter(config->getReporterName(), config));
9375 return std::move(multi);
9376 }
9377
9378 Catch::Totals runTests(std::shared_ptr<Config> const& config) {
9379 // FixMe: Add listeners in order first, then add reporters.
9380
9381 auto reporter = makeReporter(config);
9382
9383 RunContext context(config, std::move(reporter));
9384
9385 Totals totals;
9386
9387 context.testGroupStarting(config->name(), 1, 1);
9388
9389 TestSpec testSpec = config->testSpec();
9390
9391 auto const& allTestCases = getAllTestCasesSorted(*config);
9392 for (auto const& testCase : allTestCases) {
9393 if (!context.aborting() && matchTest(testCase, testSpec, *config))
9394 totals += context.runTest(testCase);
9395 else
9396 context.reporter().skipTest(testCase);
9397 }
9398
9399 if (config->warnAboutNoTests() && totals.testCases.total() == 0) {
9400 ReusableStringStream testConfig;
9401
9402 bool first = true;
9403 for (const auto& input : config->getTestsOrTags()) {
9404 if (!first) { testConfig << ' '; }
9405 first = false;
9406 testConfig << input;
9407 }
9408
9409 context.reporter().noMatchingTestCases(testConfig.str());
9410 totals.error = -1;
9411 }
9412
9413 context.testGroupEnded(config->name(), totals, 1, 1);
9414 return totals;
9415 }
9416
9417 void applyFilenamesAsTags(Catch::IConfig const& config) {
9418 auto& tests = const_cast<std::vector<TestCase>&>(getAllTestCasesSorted(config));
9419 for (auto& testCase : tests) {
9420 auto tags = testCase.tags;
9421
9422 std::string filename = testCase.lineInfo.file;
9423 auto lastSlash = filename.find_last_of("\\/");
9424 if (lastSlash != std::string::npos) {
9425 filename.erase(0, lastSlash);
9426 filename[0] = '#';
9427 }
9428
9429 auto lastDot = filename.find_last_of('.');
9430 if (lastDot != std::string::npos) {
9431 filename.erase(lastDot);
9432 }
9433
9434 tags.push_back(std::move(filename));
9435 setTags(testCase, tags);
9436 }
9437 }
9438
9439 } // anon namespace
9440
9441 Session::Session() {
9442 static bool alreadyInstantiated = false;
9443 if( alreadyInstantiated ) {
9444 try { CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR( "Only one instance of Catch::Session can ever be used" ); }
9445 catch(...) { getMutableRegistryHub().registerStartupException(); }
9446 }
9447
9448 const auto& exceptions = getRegistryHub().getStartupExceptionRegistry().getExceptions();
9449 if ( !exceptions.empty() ) {
9450 m_startupExceptions = true;
9451 Colour colourGuard( Colour::Red );
9452 Catch::cerr() << "Errors occurred during startup!" << '\n';
9453 // iterate over all exceptions and notify user
9454 for ( const auto& ex_ptr : exceptions ) {
9455 try {
9456 std::rethrow_exception(ex_ptr);
9457 } catch ( std::exception const& ex ) {
9458 Catch::cerr() << Column( ex.what() ).indent(2) << '\n';
9459 }
9460 }
9461 }
9462
9463 alreadyInstantiated = true;
9464 m_cli = makeCommandLineParser( m_configData );
9465 }
9466 Session::~Session() {
9467 Catch::cleanUp();
9468 }
9469
9470 void Session::showHelp() const {
9471 Catch::cout()
9472 << "\nCatch v" << libraryVersion() << "\n"
9473 << m_cli << std::endl
9474 << "For more detailed usage please see the project docs\n" << std::endl;
9475 }
9476 void Session::libIdentify() {
9477 Catch::cout()
9478 << std::left << std::setw(16) << "description: " << "A Catch test executable\n"
9479 << std::left << std::setw(16) << "category: " << "testframework\n"
9480 << std::left << std::setw(16) << "framework: " << "Catch Test\n"
9481 << std::left << std::setw(16) << "version: " << libraryVersion() << std::endl;
9482 }
9483
9484 int Session::applyCommandLine( int argc, char const * const * argv ) {
9485 if( m_startupExceptions )
9486 return 1;
9487
9488 auto result = m_cli.parse( clara::Args( argc, argv ) );
9489 if( !result ) {
9490 Catch::cerr()
9491 << Colour( Colour::Red )
9492 << "\nError(s) in input:\n"
9493 << Column( result.errorMessage() ).indent( 2 )
9494 << "\n\n";
9495 Catch::cerr() << "Run with -? for usage\n" << std::endl;
9496 return MaxExitCode;
9497 }
9498
9499 if( m_configData.showHelp )
9500 showHelp();
9501 if( m_configData.libIdentify )
9502 libIdentify();
9503 m_config.reset();
9504 return 0;
9505 }
9506
9507 void Session::useConfigData( ConfigData const& configData ) {
9508 m_configData = configData;
9509 m_config.reset();
9510 }
9511
9512 int Session::run( int argc, char* argv[] ) {
9513 if( m_startupExceptions )
9514 return 1;
9515 int returnCode = applyCommandLine( argc, argv );
9516 if( returnCode == 0 )
9517 returnCode = run();
9518 return returnCode;
9519 }
9520
9521#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_WCHAR) && defined(WIN32) && defined(UNICODE)
9522 int Session::run( int argc, wchar_t* const argv[] ) {
9523
9524 char **utf8Argv = new char *[ argc ];
9525
9526 for ( int i = 0; i < argc; ++i ) {
9527 int bufSize = WideCharToMultiByte( CP_UTF8, 0, argv[i], -1, NULL, 0, NULL, NULL );
9528
9529 utf8Argv[ i ] = new char[ bufSize ];
9530
9531 WideCharToMultiByte( CP_UTF8, 0, argv[i], -1, utf8Argv[i], bufSize, NULL, NULL );
9532 }
9533
9534 int returnCode = run( argc, utf8Argv );
9535
9536 for ( int i = 0; i < argc; ++i )
9537 delete [] utf8Argv[ i ];
9538
9539 delete [] utf8Argv;
9540
9541 return returnCode;
9542 }
9543#endif
9544 int Session::run() {
9545 if( ( m_configData.waitForKeypress & WaitForKeypress::BeforeStart ) != 0 ) {
9546 Catch::cout() << "...waiting for enter/ return before starting" << std::endl;
9547 static_cast<void>(std::getchar());
9548 }
9549 int exitCode = runInternal();
9550 if( ( m_configData.waitForKeypress & WaitForKeypress::BeforeExit ) != 0 ) {
9551 Catch::cout() << "...waiting for enter/ return before exiting, with code: " << exitCode << std::endl;
9552 static_cast<void>(std::getchar());
9553 }
9554 return exitCode;
9555 }
9556
9557 clara::Parser const& Session::cli() const {
9558 return m_cli;
9559 }
9560 void Session::cli( clara::Parser const& newParser ) {
9561 m_cli = newParser;
9562 }
9563 ConfigData& Session::configData() {
9564 return m_configData;
9565 }
9566 Config& Session::config() {
9567 if( !m_config )
9568 m_config = std::make_shared<Config>( m_configData );
9569 return *m_config;
9570 }
9571
9572 int Session::runInternal() {
9573 if( m_startupExceptions )
9574 return 1;
9575
9576 if( m_configData.showHelp || m_configData.libIdentify )
9577 return 0;
9578
9579 try
9580 {
9581 config(); // Force config to be constructed
9582
9583 seedRng( *m_config );
9584
9585 if( m_configData.filenamesAsTags )
9586 applyFilenamesAsTags( *m_config );
9587
9588 // Handle list request
9589 if( Option<std::size_t> listed = list( config() ) )
9590 return static_cast<int>( *listed );
9591
9592 auto totals = runTests( m_config );
9593 // Note that on unices only the lower 8 bits are usually used, clamping
9594 // the return value to 255 prevents false negative when some multiple
9595 // of 256 tests has failed
9596 return (std::min) (MaxExitCode, (std::max) (totals.error, static_cast<int>(totals.assertions.failed)));
9597 }
9598 catch( std::exception& ex ) {
9599 Catch::cerr() << ex.what() << std::endl;
9600 return MaxExitCode;
9601 }
9602 }
9603
9604} // end namespace Catch
9605// end catch_session.cpp
9606// start catch_startup_exception_registry.cpp
9607
9608namespace Catch {
9609 void StartupExceptionRegistry::add( std::exception_ptr const& exception ) noexcept {
9610 try {
9611 m_exceptions.push_back(exception);
9612 }
9613 catch(...) {
9614 // If we run out of memory during start-up there's really not a lot more we can do about it
9615 std::terminate();
9616 }
9617 }
9618
9619 std::vector<std::exception_ptr> const& StartupExceptionRegistry::getExceptions() const noexcept {
9620 return m_exceptions;
9621 }
9622
9623} // end namespace Catch
9624// end catch_startup_exception_registry.cpp
9625// start catch_stream.cpp
9626
9627#include <cstdio>
9628#include <iostream>
9629#include <fstream>
9630#include <sstream>
9631#include <vector>
9632#include <memory>
9633
9634#if defined(__clang__)
9635# pragma clang diagnostic push
9636# pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wexit-time-destructors"
9637#endif
9638
9639namespace Catch {
9640
9641 Catch::IStream::~IStream() = default;
9642
9643 namespace detail { namespace {
9644 template<typename WriterF, std::size_t bufferSize=256>
9645 class StreamBufImpl : public std::streambuf {
9646 char data[bufferSize];
9647 WriterF m_writer;
9648
9649 public:
9650 StreamBufImpl() {
9651 setp( data, data + sizeof(data) );
9652 }
9653
9654 ~StreamBufImpl() noexcept {
9655 StreamBufImpl::sync();
9656 }
9657
9658 private:
9659 int overflow( int c ) override {
9660 sync();
9661
9662 if( c != EOF ) {
9663 if( pbase() == epptr() )
9664 m_writer( std::string( 1, static_cast<char>( c ) ) );
9665 else
9666 sputc( static_cast<char>( c ) );
9667 }
9668 return 0;
9669 }
9670
9671 int sync() override {
9672 if( pbase() != pptr() ) {
9673 m_writer( std::string( pbase(), static_cast<std::string::size_type>( pptr() - pbase() ) ) );
9674 setp( pbase(), epptr() );
9675 }
9676 return 0;
9677 }
9678 };
9679
9681
9682 struct OutputDebugWriter {
9683
9684 void operator()( std::string const&str ) {
9685 writeToDebugConsole( str );
9686 }
9687 };
9688
9690
9691 class FileStream : public IStream {
9692 mutable std::ofstream m_ofs;
9693 public:
9694 FileStream( StringRef filename ) {
9695 m_ofs.open( filename.c_str() );
9696 CATCH_ENFORCE( !m_ofs.fail(), "Unable to open file: '" << filename << "'" );
9697 }
9698 ~FileStream() override = default;
9699 public: // IStream
9700 std::ostream& stream() const override {
9701 return m_ofs;
9702 }
9703 };
9704
9706
9707 class CoutStream : public IStream {
9708 mutable std::ostream m_os;
9709 public:
9710 // Store the streambuf from cout up-front because
9711 // cout may get redirected when running tests
9712 CoutStream() : m_os( Catch::cout().rdbuf() ) {}
9713 ~CoutStream() override = default;
9714
9715 public: // IStream
9716 std::ostream& stream() const override { return m_os; }
9717 };
9718
9720
9721 class DebugOutStream : public IStream {
9722 std::unique_ptr<StreamBufImpl<OutputDebugWriter>> m_streamBuf;
9723 mutable std::ostream m_os;
9724 public:
9725 DebugOutStream()
9726 : m_streamBuf( new StreamBufImpl<OutputDebugWriter>() ),
9727 m_os( m_streamBuf.get() )
9728 {}
9729
9730 ~DebugOutStream() override = default;
9731
9732 public: // IStream
9733 std::ostream& stream() const override { return m_os; }
9734 };
9735
9736 }} // namespace anon::detail
9737
9739
9740 auto makeStream( StringRef const &filename ) -> IStream const* {
9741 if( filename.empty() )
9742 return new detail::CoutStream();
9743 else if( filename[0] == '%' ) {
9744 if( filename == "%debug" )
9745 return new detail::DebugOutStream();
9746 else
9747 CATCH_ERROR( "Unrecognised stream: '" << filename << "'" );
9748 }
9749 else
9750 return new detail::FileStream( filename );
9751 }
9752
9753 // This class encapsulates the idea of a pool of ostringstreams that can be reused.
9754 struct StringStreams {
9755 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<std::ostringstream>> m_streams;
9756 std::vector<std::size_t> m_unused;
9757 std::ostringstream m_referenceStream; // Used for copy state/ flags from
9758 static StringStreams* s_instance;
9759
9760 auto add() -> std::size_t {
9761 if( m_unused.empty() ) {
9762 m_streams.push_back( std::unique_ptr<std::ostringstream>( new std::ostringstream ) );
9763 return m_streams.size()-1;
9764 }
9765 else {
9766 auto index = m_unused.back();
9767 m_unused.pop_back();
9768 return index;
9769 }
9770 }
9771
9772 void release( std::size_t index ) {
9773 m_streams[index]->copyfmt( m_referenceStream ); // Restore initial flags and other state
9774 m_unused.push_back(index);
9775 }
9776
9777 // !TBD: put in TLS
9778 static auto instance() -> StringStreams& {
9779 if( !s_instance )
9780 s_instance = new StringStreams();
9781 return *s_instance;
9782 }
9783 static void cleanup() {
9784 delete s_instance;
9785 s_instance = nullptr;
9786 }
9787 };
9788
9789 StringStreams* StringStreams::s_instance = nullptr;
9790
9791 void ReusableStringStream::cleanup() {
9792 StringStreams::cleanup();
9793 }
9794
9795 ReusableStringStream::ReusableStringStream()
9796 : m_index( StringStreams::instance().add() ),
9797 m_oss( StringStreams::instance().m_streams[m_index].get() )
9798 {}
9799
9800 ReusableStringStream::~ReusableStringStream() {
9801 static_cast<std::ostringstream*>( m_oss )->str("");
9802 m_oss->clear();
9803 StringStreams::instance().release( m_index );
9804 }
9805
9806 auto ReusableStringStream::str() const -> std::string {
9807 return static_cast<std::ostringstream*>( m_oss )->str();
9808 }
9809
9811
9812#ifndef CATCH_CONFIG_NOSTDOUT // If you #define this you must implement these functions
9813 std::ostream& cout() { return std::cout; }
9814 std::ostream& cerr() { return std::cerr; }
9815 std::ostream& clog() { return std::clog; }
9816#endif
9817}
9818
9819#if defined(__clang__)
9820# pragma clang diagnostic pop
9821#endif
9822// end catch_stream.cpp
9823// start catch_string_manip.cpp
9824
9825#include <algorithm>
9826#include <ostream>
9827#include <cstring>
9828#include <cctype>
9829
9830namespace Catch {
9831
9832 namespace {
9833 char toLowerCh(char c) {
9834 return static_cast<char>( std::tolower( c ) );
9835 }
9836 }
9837
9838 bool startsWith( std::string const& s, std::string const& prefix ) {
9839 return s.size() >= prefix.size() && std::equal(prefix.begin(), prefix.end(), s.begin());
9840 }
9841 bool startsWith( std::string const& s, char prefix ) {
9842 return !s.empty() && s[0] == prefix;
9843 }
9844 bool endsWith( std::string const& s, std::string const& suffix ) {
9845 return s.size() >= suffix.size() && std::equal(suffix.rbegin(), suffix.rend(), s.rbegin());
9846 }
9847 bool endsWith( std::string const& s, char suffix ) {
9848 return !s.empty() && s[s.size()-1] == suffix;
9849 }
9850 bool contains( std::string const& s, std::string const& infix ) {
9851 return s.find( infix ) != std::string::npos;
9852 }
9853 void toLowerInPlace( std::string& s ) {
9854 std::transform( s.begin(), s.end(), s.begin(), toLowerCh );
9855 }
9856 std::string toLower( std::string const& s ) {
9857 std::string lc = s;
9858 toLowerInPlace( lc );
9859 return lc;
9860 }
9861 std::string trim( std::string const& str ) {
9862 static char const* whitespaceChars = "\n\r\t ";
9863 std::string::size_type start = str.find_first_not_of( whitespaceChars );
9864 std::string::size_type end = str.find_last_not_of( whitespaceChars );
9865
9866 return start != std::string::npos ? str.substr( start, 1+end-start ) : std::string();
9867 }
9868
9869 bool replaceInPlace( std::string& str, std::string const& replaceThis, std::string const& withThis ) {
9870 bool replaced = false;
9871 std::size_t i = str.find( replaceThis );
9872 while( i != std::string::npos ) {
9873 replaced = true;
9874 str = str.substr( 0, i ) + withThis + str.substr( i+replaceThis.size() );
9875 if( i < str.size()-withThis.size() )
9876 i = str.find( replaceThis, i+withThis.size() );
9877 else
9878 i = std::string::npos;
9879 }
9880 return replaced;
9881 }
9882
9883 pluralise::pluralise( std::size_t count, std::string const& label )
9884 : m_count( count ),
9885 m_label( label )
9886 {}
9887
9888 std::ostream& operator << ( std::ostream& os, pluralise const& pluraliser ) {
9889 os << pluraliser.m_count << ' ' << pluraliser.m_label;
9890 if( pluraliser.m_count != 1 )
9891 os << 's';
9892 return os;
9893 }
9894
9895}
9896// end catch_string_manip.cpp
9897// start catch_stringref.cpp
9898
9899#if defined(__clang__)
9900# pragma clang diagnostic push
9901# pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wexit-time-destructors"
9902#endif
9903
9904#include <ostream>
9905#include <cstring>
9906#include <cstdint>
9907
9908namespace {
9909 const uint32_t byte_2_lead = 0xC0;
9910 const uint32_t byte_3_lead = 0xE0;
9911 const uint32_t byte_4_lead = 0xF0;
9912}
9913
9914namespace Catch {
9915 StringRef::StringRef( char const* rawChars ) noexcept
9916 : StringRef( rawChars, static_cast<StringRef::size_type>(std::strlen(rawChars) ) )
9917 {}
9918
9919 StringRef::operator std::string() const {
9920 return std::string( m_start, m_size );
9921 }
9922
9923 void StringRef::swap( StringRef& other ) noexcept {
9924 std::swap( m_start, other.m_start );
9925 std::swap( m_size, other.m_size );
9926 std::swap( m_data, other.m_data );
9927 }
9928
9929 auto StringRef::c_str() const -> char const* {
9930 if( isSubstring() )
9931 const_cast<StringRef*>( this )->takeOwnership();
9932 return m_start;
9933 }
9934 auto StringRef::currentData() const noexcept -> char const* {
9935 return m_start;
9936 }
9937
9938 auto StringRef::isOwned() const noexcept -> bool {
9939 return m_data != nullptr;
9940 }
9941 auto StringRef::isSubstring() const noexcept -> bool {
9942 return m_start[m_size] != '\0';
9943 }
9944
9945 void StringRef::takeOwnership() {
9946 if( !isOwned() ) {
9947 m_data = new char[m_size+1];
9948 memcpy( m_data, m_start, m_size );
9949 m_data[m_size] = '\0';
9950 m_start = m_data;
9951 }
9952 }
9953 auto StringRef::substr( size_type start, size_type size ) const noexcept -> StringRef {
9954 if( start < m_size )
9955 return StringRef( m_start+start, size );
9956 else
9957 return StringRef();
9958 }
9959 auto StringRef::operator == ( StringRef const& other ) const noexcept -> bool {
9960 return
9961 size() == other.size() &&
9962 (std::strncmp( m_start, other.m_start, size() ) == 0);
9963 }
9964 auto StringRef::operator != ( StringRef const& other ) const noexcept -> bool {
9965 return !operator==( other );
9966 }
9967
9968 auto StringRef::operator[](size_type index) const noexcept -> char {
9969 return m_start[index];
9970 }
9971
9972 auto StringRef::numberOfCharacters() const noexcept -> size_type {
9973 size_type noChars = m_size;
9974 // Make adjustments for uft encodings
9975 for( size_type i=0; i < m_size; ++i ) {
9976 char c = m_start[i];
9977 if( ( c & byte_2_lead ) == byte_2_lead ) {
9978 noChars--;
9979 if (( c & byte_3_lead ) == byte_3_lead )
9980 noChars--;
9981 if( ( c & byte_4_lead ) == byte_4_lead )
9982 noChars--;
9983 }
9984 }
9985 return noChars;
9986 }
9987
9988 auto operator + ( StringRef const& lhs, StringRef const& rhs ) -> std::string {
9989 std::string str;
9990 str.reserve( lhs.size() + rhs.size() );
9991 str += lhs;
9992 str += rhs;
9993 return str;
9994 }
9995 auto operator + ( StringRef const& lhs, const char* rhs ) -> std::string {
9996 return std::string( lhs ) + std::string( rhs );
9997 }
9998 auto operator + ( char const* lhs, StringRef const& rhs ) -> std::string {
9999 return std::string( lhs ) + std::string( rhs );
10000 }
10001
10002 auto operator << ( std::ostream& os, StringRef const& str ) -> std::ostream& {
10003 return os.write(str.currentData(), str.size());
10004 }
10005
10006 auto operator+=( std::string& lhs, StringRef const& rhs ) -> std::string& {
10007 lhs.append(rhs.currentData(), rhs.size());
10008 return lhs;
10009 }
10010
10011} // namespace Catch
10012
10013#if defined(__clang__)
10014# pragma clang diagnostic pop
10015#endif
10016// end catch_stringref.cpp
10017// start catch_tag_alias.cpp
10018
10019namespace Catch {
10020 TagAlias::TagAlias(std::string const & _tag, SourceLineInfo _lineInfo): tag(_tag), lineInfo(_lineInfo) {}
10021}
10022// end catch_tag_alias.cpp
10023// start catch_tag_alias_autoregistrar.cpp
10024
10025namespace Catch {
10026
10027 RegistrarForTagAliases::RegistrarForTagAliases(char const* alias, char const* tag, SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo) {
10028 try {
10029 getMutableRegistryHub().registerTagAlias(alias, tag, lineInfo);
10030 } catch (...) {
10031 // Do not throw when constructing global objects, instead register the exception to be processed later
10032 getMutableRegistryHub().registerStartupException();
10033 }
10034 }
10035
10036}
10037// end catch_tag_alias_autoregistrar.cpp
10038// start catch_tag_alias_registry.cpp
10039
10040#include <sstream>
10041
10042namespace Catch {
10043
10044 TagAliasRegistry::~TagAliasRegistry() {}
10045
10046 TagAlias const* TagAliasRegistry::find( std::string const& alias ) const {
10047 auto it = m_registry.find( alias );
10048 if( it != m_registry.end() )
10049 return &(it->second);
10050 else
10051 return nullptr;
10052 }
10053
10054 std::string TagAliasRegistry::expandAliases( std::string const& unexpandedTestSpec ) const {
10055 std::string expandedTestSpec = unexpandedTestSpec;
10056 for( auto const& registryKvp : m_registry ) {
10057 std::size_t pos = expandedTestSpec.find( registryKvp.first );
10058 if( pos != std::string::npos ) {
10059 expandedTestSpec = expandedTestSpec.substr( 0, pos ) +
10060 registryKvp.second.tag +
10061 expandedTestSpec.substr( pos + registryKvp.first.size() );
10062 }
10063 }
10064 return expandedTestSpec;
10065 }
10066
10067 void TagAliasRegistry::add( std::string const& alias, std::string const& tag, SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo ) {
10068 CATCH_ENFORCE( startsWith(alias, "[@") && endsWith(alias, ']'),
10069 "error: tag alias, '" << alias << "' is not of the form [@alias name].\n" << lineInfo );
10070
10071 CATCH_ENFORCE( m_registry.insert(std::make_pair(alias, TagAlias(tag, lineInfo))).second,
10072 "error: tag alias, '" << alias << "' already registered.\n"
10073 << "\tFirst seen at: " << find(alias)->lineInfo << "\n"
10074 << "\tRedefined at: " << lineInfo );
10075 }
10076
10077 ITagAliasRegistry::~ITagAliasRegistry() {}
10078
10079 ITagAliasRegistry const& ITagAliasRegistry::get() {
10080 return getRegistryHub().getTagAliasRegistry();
10081 }
10082
10083} // end namespace Catch
10084// end catch_tag_alias_registry.cpp
10085// start catch_test_case_info.cpp
10086
10087#include <cctype>
10088#include <exception>
10089#include <algorithm>
10090#include <sstream>
10091
10092namespace Catch {
10093
10094 namespace {
10095 TestCaseInfo::SpecialProperties parseSpecialTag( std::string const& tag ) {
10096 if( startsWith( tag, '.' ) ||
10097 tag == "!hide" )
10098 return TestCaseInfo::IsHidden;
10099 else if( tag == "!throws" )
10100 return TestCaseInfo::Throws;
10101 else if( tag == "!shouldfail" )
10102 return TestCaseInfo::ShouldFail;
10103 else if( tag == "!mayfail" )
10104 return TestCaseInfo::MayFail;
10105 else if( tag == "!nonportable" )
10106 return TestCaseInfo::NonPortable;
10107 else if( tag == "!benchmark" )
10108 return static_cast<TestCaseInfo::SpecialProperties>( TestCaseInfo::Benchmark | TestCaseInfo::IsHidden );
10109 else
10110 return TestCaseInfo::None;
10111 }
10112 bool isReservedTag( std::string const& tag ) {
10113 return parseSpecialTag( tag ) == TestCaseInfo::None && tag.size() > 0 && !std::isalnum( static_cast<unsigned char>(tag[0]) );
10114 }
10115 void enforceNotReservedTag( std::string const& tag, SourceLineInfo const& _lineInfo ) {
10116 CATCH_ENFORCE( !isReservedTag(tag),
10117 "Tag name: [" << tag << "] is not allowed.\n"
10118 << "Tag names starting with non alpha-numeric characters are reserved\n"
10119 << _lineInfo );
10120 }
10121 }
10122
10123 TestCase makeTestCase( ITestInvoker* _testCase,
10124 std::string const& _className,
10125 NameAndTags const& nameAndTags,
10126 SourceLineInfo const& _lineInfo )
10127 {
10128 bool isHidden = false;
10129
10130 // Parse out tags
10131 std::vector<std::string> tags;
10132 std::string desc, tag;
10133 bool inTag = false;
10134 std::string _descOrTags = nameAndTags.tags;
10135 for (char c : _descOrTags) {
10136 if( !inTag ) {
10137 if( c == '[' )
10138 inTag = true;
10139 else
10140 desc += c;
10141 }
10142 else {
10143 if( c == ']' ) {
10144 TestCaseInfo::SpecialProperties prop = parseSpecialTag( tag );
10145 if( ( prop & TestCaseInfo::IsHidden ) != 0 )
10146 isHidden = true;
10147 else if( prop == TestCaseInfo::None )
10148 enforceNotReservedTag( tag, _lineInfo );
10149
10150 tags.push_back( tag );
10151 tag.clear();
10152 inTag = false;
10153 }
10154 else
10155 tag += c;
10156 }
10157 }
10158 if( isHidden ) {
10159 tags.push_back( "." );
10160 }
10161
10162 TestCaseInfo info( nameAndTags.name, _className, desc, tags, _lineInfo );
10163 return TestCase( _testCase, std::move(info) );
10164 }
10165
10166 void setTags( TestCaseInfo& testCaseInfo, std::vector<std::string> tags ) {
10167 std::sort(begin(tags), end(tags));
10168 tags.erase(std::unique(begin(tags), end(tags)), end(tags));
10169 testCaseInfo.lcaseTags.clear();
10170
10171 for( auto const& tag : tags ) {
10172 std::string lcaseTag = toLower( tag );
10173 testCaseInfo.properties = static_cast<TestCaseInfo::SpecialProperties>( testCaseInfo.properties | parseSpecialTag( lcaseTag ) );
10174 testCaseInfo.lcaseTags.push_back( lcaseTag );
10175 }
10176 testCaseInfo.tags = std::move(tags);
10177 }
10178
10179 TestCaseInfo::TestCaseInfo( std::string const& _name,
10180 std::string const& _className,
10181 std::string const& _description,
10182 std::vector<std::string> const& _tags,
10183 SourceLineInfo const& _lineInfo )
10184 : name( _name ),
10185 className( _className ),
10186 description( _description ),
10187 lineInfo( _lineInfo ),
10188 properties( None )
10189 {
10190 setTags( *this, _tags );
10191 }
10192
10193 bool TestCaseInfo::isHidden() const {
10194 return ( properties & IsHidden ) != 0;
10195 }
10196 bool TestCaseInfo::throws() const {
10197 return ( properties & Throws ) != 0;
10198 }
10199 bool TestCaseInfo::okToFail() const {
10200 return ( properties & (ShouldFail | MayFail ) ) != 0;
10201 }
10202 bool TestCaseInfo::expectedToFail() const {
10203 return ( properties & (ShouldFail ) ) != 0;
10204 }
10205
10206 std::string TestCaseInfo::tagsAsString() const {
10207 std::string ret;
10208 // '[' and ']' per tag
10209 std::size_t full_size = 2 * tags.size();
10210 for (const auto& tag : tags) {
10211 full_size += tag.size();
10212 }
10213 ret.reserve(full_size);
10214 for (const auto& tag : tags) {
10215 ret.push_back('[');
10216 ret.append(tag);
10217 ret.push_back(']');
10218 }
10219
10220 return ret;
10221 }
10222
10223 TestCase::TestCase( ITestInvoker* testCase, TestCaseInfo&& info ) : TestCaseInfo( std::move(info) ), test( testCase ) {}
10224
10225 TestCase TestCase::withName( std::string const& _newName ) const {
10226 TestCase other( *this );
10227 other.name = _newName;
10228 return other;
10229 }
10230
10231 void TestCase::invoke() const {
10232 test->invoke();
10233 }
10234
10235 bool TestCase::operator == ( TestCase const& other ) const {
10236 return test.get() == other.test.get() &&
10237 name == other.name &&
10238 className == other.className;
10239 }
10240
10241 bool TestCase::operator < ( TestCase const& other ) const {
10242 return name < other.name;
10243 }
10244
10245 TestCaseInfo const& TestCase::getTestCaseInfo() const
10246 {
10247 return *this;
10248 }
10249
10250} // end namespace Catch
10251// end catch_test_case_info.cpp
10252// start catch_test_case_registry_impl.cpp
10253
10254#include <sstream>
10255
10256namespace Catch {
10257
10258 std::vector<TestCase> sortTests( IConfig const& config, std::vector<TestCase> const& unsortedTestCases ) {
10259
10260 std::vector<TestCase> sorted = unsortedTestCases;
10261
10262 switch( config.runOrder() ) {
10263 case RunTests::InLexicographicalOrder:
10264 std::sort( sorted.begin(), sorted.end() );
10265 break;
10266 case RunTests::InRandomOrder:
10267 seedRng( config );
10268 std::shuffle( sorted.begin(), sorted.end(), rng() );
10269 break;
10270 case RunTests::InDeclarationOrder:
10271 // already in declaration order
10272 break;
10273 }
10274 return sorted;
10275 }
10276 bool matchTest( TestCase const& testCase, TestSpec const& testSpec, IConfig const& config ) {
10277 return testSpec.matches( testCase ) && ( config.allowThrows() || !testCase.throws() );
10278 }
10279
10280 void enforceNoDuplicateTestCases( std::vector<TestCase> const& functions ) {
10281 std::set<TestCase> seenFunctions;
10282 for( auto const& function : functions ) {
10283 auto prev = seenFunctions.insert( function );
10284 CATCH_ENFORCE( prev.second,
10285 "error: TEST_CASE( \"" << function.name << "\" ) already defined.\n"
10286 << "\tFirst seen at " << prev.first->getTestCaseInfo().lineInfo << "\n"
10287 << "\tRedefined at " << function.getTestCaseInfo().lineInfo );
10288 }
10289 }
10290
10291 std::vector<TestCase> filterTests( std::vector<TestCase> const& testCases, TestSpec const& testSpec, IConfig const& config ) {
10292 std::vector<TestCase> filtered;
10293 filtered.reserve( testCases.size() );
10294 for( auto const& testCase : testCases )
10295 if( matchTest( testCase, testSpec, config ) )
10296 filtered.push_back( testCase );
10297 return filtered;
10298 }
10299 std::vector<TestCase> const& getAllTestCasesSorted( IConfig const& config ) {
10300 return getRegistryHub().getTestCaseRegistry().getAllTestsSorted( config );
10301 }
10302
10303 void TestRegistry::registerTest( TestCase const& testCase ) {
10304 std::string name = testCase.getTestCaseInfo().name;
10305 if( name.empty() ) {
10306 ReusableStringStream rss;
10307 rss << "Anonymous test case " << ++m_unnamedCount;
10308 return registerTest( testCase.withName( rss.str() ) );
10309 }
10310 m_functions.push_back( testCase );
10311 }
10312
10313 std::vector<TestCase> const& TestRegistry::getAllTests() const {
10314 return m_functions;
10315 }
10316 std::vector<TestCase> const& TestRegistry::getAllTestsSorted( IConfig const& config ) const {
10317 if( m_sortedFunctions.empty() )
10318 enforceNoDuplicateTestCases( m_functions );
10319
10320 if( m_currentSortOrder != config.runOrder() || m_sortedFunctions.empty() ) {
10321 m_sortedFunctions = sortTests( config, m_functions );
10322 m_currentSortOrder = config.runOrder();
10323 }
10324 return m_sortedFunctions;
10325 }
10326
10328 TestInvokerAsFunction::TestInvokerAsFunction( void(*testAsFunction)() ) noexcept : m_testAsFunction( testAsFunction ) {}
10329
10330 void TestInvokerAsFunction::invoke() const {
10331 m_testAsFunction();
10332 }
10333
10334 std::string extractClassName( StringRef const& classOrQualifiedMethodName ) {
10335 std::string className = classOrQualifiedMethodName;
10336 if( startsWith( className, '&' ) )
10337 {
10338 std::size_t lastColons = className.rfind( "::" );
10339 std::size_t penultimateColons = className.rfind( "::", lastColons-1 );
10340 if( penultimateColons == std::string::npos )
10341 penultimateColons = 1;
10342 className = className.substr( penultimateColons, lastColons-penultimateColons );
10343 }
10344 return className;
10345 }
10346
10347} // end namespace Catch
10348// end catch_test_case_registry_impl.cpp
10349// start catch_test_case_tracker.cpp
10350
10351#include <algorithm>
10352#include <cassert>
10353#include <stdexcept>
10354#include <memory>
10355#include <sstream>
10356
10357#if defined(__clang__)
10358# pragma clang diagnostic push
10359# pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wexit-time-destructors"
10360#endif
10361
10362namespace Catch {
10363namespace TestCaseTracking {
10364
10365 NameAndLocation::NameAndLocation( std::string const& _name, SourceLineInfo const& _location )
10366 : name( _name ),
10367 location( _location )
10368 {}
10369
10370 ITracker::~ITracker() = default;
10371
10372 TrackerContext& TrackerContext::instance() {
10373 static TrackerContext s_instance;
10374 return s_instance;
10375 }
10376
10377 ITracker& TrackerContext::startRun() {
10378 m_rootTracker = std::make_shared<SectionTracker>( NameAndLocation( "{root}", CATCH_INTERNAL_LINEINFO ), *this, nullptr );
10379 m_currentTracker = nullptr;
10380 m_runState = Executing;
10381 return *m_rootTracker;
10382 }
10383
10384 void TrackerContext::endRun() {
10385 m_rootTracker.reset();
10386 m_currentTracker = nullptr;
10387 m_runState = NotStarted;
10388 }
10389
10390 void TrackerContext::startCycle() {
10391 m_currentTracker = m_rootTracker.get();
10392 m_runState = Executing;
10393 }
10394 void TrackerContext::completeCycle() {
10395 m_runState = CompletedCycle;
10396 }
10397
10398 bool TrackerContext::completedCycle() const {
10399 return m_runState == CompletedCycle;
10400 }
10401 ITracker& TrackerContext::currentTracker() {
10402 return *m_currentTracker;
10403 }
10404 void TrackerContext::setCurrentTracker( ITracker* tracker ) {
10405 m_currentTracker = tracker;
10406 }
10407
10408 TrackerBase::TrackerHasName::TrackerHasName( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation ) : m_nameAndLocation( nameAndLocation ) {}
10409 bool TrackerBase::TrackerHasName::operator ()( ITrackerPtr const& tracker ) const {
10410 return
10411 tracker->nameAndLocation().location == m_nameAndLocation.location &&
10412 tracker->nameAndLocation().name == m_nameAndLocation.name;
10413 }
10414
10415 TrackerBase::TrackerBase( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, TrackerContext& ctx, ITracker* parent )
10416 : m_nameAndLocation( nameAndLocation ),
10417 m_ctx( ctx ),
10418 m_parent( parent )
10419 {}
10420
10421 NameAndLocation const& TrackerBase::nameAndLocation() const {
10422 return m_nameAndLocation;
10423 }
10424 bool TrackerBase::isComplete() const {
10425 return m_runState == CompletedSuccessfully || m_runState == Failed;
10426 }
10427 bool TrackerBase::isSuccessfullyCompleted() const {
10428 return m_runState == CompletedSuccessfully;
10429 }
10430 bool TrackerBase::isOpen() const {
