10431 return m_runState != NotStarted && !isComplete();
10432 }
10433 bool TrackerBase::hasChildren() const {
10434 return !m_children.empty();
10435 }
10436
10437 void TrackerBase::addChild( ITrackerPtr const& child ) {
10438 m_children.push_back( child );
10439 }
10440
10441 ITrackerPtr TrackerBase::findChild( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation ) {
10442 auto it = std::find_if( m_children.begin(), m_children.end(), TrackerHasName( nameAndLocation ) );
10443 return( it != m_children.end() )
10444 ? *it
10445 : nullptr;
10446 }
10447 ITracker& TrackerBase::parent() {
10448 assert( m_parent ); // Should always be non-null except for root
10449 return *m_parent;
10450 }
10451
10452 void TrackerBase::openChild() {
10453 if( m_runState != ExecutingChildren ) {
10454 m_runState = ExecutingChildren;
10455 if( m_parent )
10456 m_parent->openChild();
10457 }
10458 }
10459
10460 bool TrackerBase::isSectionTracker() const { return false; }
10461 bool TrackerBase::isIndexTracker() const { return false; }
10462
10463 void TrackerBase::open() {
10464 m_runState = Executing;
10465 moveToThis();
10466 if( m_parent )
10467 m_parent->openChild();
10468 }
10469
10470 void TrackerBase::close() {
10471
10472 // Close any still open children (e.g. generators)
10473 while( &m_ctx.currentTracker() != this )
10474 m_ctx.currentTracker().close();
10475
10476 switch( m_runState ) {
10477 case NeedsAnotherRun:
10478 break;
10479
10480 case Executing:
10481 m_runState = CompletedSuccessfully;
10482 break;
10483 case ExecutingChildren:
10484 if( m_children.empty() || m_children.back()->isComplete() )
10485 m_runState = CompletedSuccessfully;
10486 break;
10487
10488 case NotStarted:
10489 case CompletedSuccessfully:
10490 case Failed:
10491 CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR( "Illogical state: " << m_runState );
10492
10493 default:
10494 CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR( "Unknown state: " << m_runState );
10495 }
10496 moveToParent();
10497 m_ctx.completeCycle();
10498 }
10499 void TrackerBase::fail() {
10500 m_runState = Failed;
10501 if( m_parent )
10502 m_parent->markAsNeedingAnotherRun();
10503 moveToParent();
10504 m_ctx.completeCycle();
10505 }
10506 void TrackerBase::markAsNeedingAnotherRun() {
10507 m_runState = NeedsAnotherRun;
10508 }
10509
10510 void TrackerBase::moveToParent() {
10511 assert( m_parent );
10512 m_ctx.setCurrentTracker( m_parent );
10513 }
10514 void TrackerBase::moveToThis() {
10515 m_ctx.setCurrentTracker( this );
10516 }
10517
10518 SectionTracker::SectionTracker( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, TrackerContext& ctx, ITracker* parent )
10519 : TrackerBase( nameAndLocation, ctx, parent )
10520 {
10521 if( parent ) {
10522 while( !parent->isSectionTracker() )
10523 parent = &parent->parent();
10524
10525 SectionTracker& parentSection = static_cast<SectionTracker&>( *parent );
10526 addNextFilters( parentSection.m_filters );
10527 }
10528 }
10529
10530 bool SectionTracker::isSectionTracker() const { return true; }
10531
10532 SectionTracker& SectionTracker::acquire( TrackerContext& ctx, NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation ) {
10533 std::shared_ptr<SectionTracker> section;
10534
10535 ITracker& currentTracker = ctx.currentTracker();
10536 if( ITrackerPtr childTracker = currentTracker.findChild( nameAndLocation ) ) {
10537 assert( childTracker );
10538 assert( childTracker->isSectionTracker() );
10539 section = std::static_pointer_cast<SectionTracker>( childTracker );
10540 }
10541 else {
10542 section = std::make_shared<SectionTracker>( nameAndLocation, ctx, &currentTracker );
10543 currentTracker.addChild( section );
10544 }
10545 if( !ctx.completedCycle() )
10546 section->tryOpen();
10547 return *section;
10548 }
10549
10550 void SectionTracker::tryOpen() {
10551 if( !isComplete() && (m_filters.empty() || m_filters[0].empty() || m_filters[0] == m_nameAndLocation.name ) )
10552 open();
10553 }
10554
10555 void SectionTracker::addInitialFilters( std::vector<std::string> const& filters ) {
10556 if( !filters.empty() ) {
10557 m_filters.push_back(""); // Root - should never be consulted
10558 m_filters.push_back(""); // Test Case - not a section filter
10559 m_filters.insert( m_filters.end(), filters.begin(), filters.end() );
10560 }
10561 }
10562 void SectionTracker::addNextFilters( std::vector<std::string> const& filters ) {
10563 if( filters.size() > 1 )
10564 m_filters.insert( m_filters.end(), ++filters.begin(), filters.end() );
10565 }
10566
10567 IndexTracker::IndexTracker( NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, TrackerContext& ctx, ITracker* parent, int size )
10568 : TrackerBase( nameAndLocation, ctx, parent ),
10569 m_size( size )
10570 {}
10571
10572 bool IndexTracker::isIndexTracker() const { return true; }
10573
10574 IndexTracker& IndexTracker::acquire( TrackerContext& ctx, NameAndLocation const& nameAndLocation, int size ) {
10575 std::shared_ptr<IndexTracker> tracker;
10576
10577 ITracker& currentTracker = ctx.currentTracker();
10578 if( ITrackerPtr childTracker = currentTracker.findChild( nameAndLocation ) ) {
10579 assert( childTracker );
10580 assert( childTracker->isIndexTracker() );
10581 tracker = std::static_pointer_cast<IndexTracker>( childTracker );
10582 }
10583 else {
10584 tracker = std::make_shared<IndexTracker>( nameAndLocation, ctx, &currentTracker, size );
10585 currentTracker.addChild( tracker );
10586 }
10587
10588 if( !ctx.completedCycle() && !tracker->isComplete() ) {
10589 if( tracker->m_runState != ExecutingChildren && tracker->m_runState != NeedsAnotherRun )
10590 tracker->moveNext();
10591 tracker->open();
10592 }
10593
10594 return *tracker;
10595 }
10596
10597 int IndexTracker::index() const { return m_index; }
10598
10599 void IndexTracker::moveNext() {
10600 m_index++;
10601 m_children.clear();
10602 }
10603
10604 void IndexTracker::close() {
10605 TrackerBase::close();
10606 if( m_runState == CompletedSuccessfully && m_index < m_size-1 )
10607 m_runState = Executing;
10608 }
10609
10610} // namespace TestCaseTracking
10611
10612using TestCaseTracking::ITracker;
10613using TestCaseTracking::TrackerContext;
10614using TestCaseTracking::SectionTracker;
10615using TestCaseTracking::IndexTracker;
10616
10617} // namespace Catch
10618
10619#if defined(__clang__)
10620# pragma clang diagnostic pop
10621#endif
10622// end catch_test_case_tracker.cpp
10623// start catch_test_registry.cpp
10624
10625namespace Catch {
10626
10627 auto makeTestInvoker( void(*testAsFunction)() ) noexcept -> ITestInvoker* {
10628 return new(std::nothrow) TestInvokerAsFunction( testAsFunction );
10629 }
10630
10631 NameAndTags::NameAndTags( StringRef const& name_ , StringRef const& tags_ ) noexcept : name( name_ ), tags( tags_ ) {}
10632
10633 AutoReg::AutoReg( ITestInvoker* invoker, SourceLineInfo const& lineInfo, StringRef const& classOrMethod, NameAndTags const& nameAndTags ) noexcept {
10634 try {
10635 getMutableRegistryHub()
10636 .registerTest(
10637 makeTestCase(
10638 invoker,
10639 extractClassName( classOrMethod ),
10640 nameAndTags,
10641 lineInfo));
10642 } catch (...) {
10643 // Do not throw when constructing global objects, instead register the exception to be processed later
10644 getMutableRegistryHub().registerStartupException();
10645 }
10646 }
10647
10648 AutoReg::~AutoReg() = default;
10649}
10650// end catch_test_registry.cpp
10651// start catch_test_spec.cpp
10652
10653#include <algorithm>
10654#include <string>
10655#include <vector>
10656#include <memory>
10657
10658namespace Catch {
10659
10660 TestSpec::Pattern::~Pattern() = default;
10661 TestSpec::NamePattern::~NamePattern() = default;
10662 TestSpec::TagPattern::~TagPattern() = default;
10663 TestSpec::ExcludedPattern::~ExcludedPattern() = default;
10664
10665 TestSpec::NamePattern::NamePattern( std::string const& name )
10666 : m_wildcardPattern( toLower( name ), CaseSensitive::No )
10667 {}
10668 bool TestSpec::NamePattern::matches( TestCaseInfo const& testCase ) const {
10669 return m_wildcardPattern.matches( toLower( testCase.name ) );
10670 }
10671
10672 TestSpec::TagPattern::TagPattern( std::string const& tag ) : m_tag( toLower( tag ) ) {}
10673 bool TestSpec::TagPattern::matches( TestCaseInfo const& testCase ) const {
10674 return std::find(begin(testCase.lcaseTags),
10675 end(testCase.lcaseTags),
10676 m_tag) != end(testCase.lcaseTags);
10677 }
10678
10679 TestSpec::ExcludedPattern::ExcludedPattern( PatternPtr const& underlyingPattern ) : m_underlyingPattern( underlyingPattern ) {}
10680 bool TestSpec::ExcludedPattern::matches( TestCaseInfo const& testCase ) const { return !m_underlyingPattern->matches( testCase ); }
10681
10682 bool TestSpec::Filter::matches( TestCaseInfo const& testCase ) const {
10683 // All patterns in a filter must match for the filter to be a match
10684 for( auto const& pattern : m_patterns ) {
10685 if( !pattern->matches( testCase ) )
10686 return false;
10687 }
10688 return true;
10689 }
10690
10691 bool TestSpec::hasFilters() const {
10692 return !m_filters.empty();
10693 }
10694 bool TestSpec::matches( TestCaseInfo const& testCase ) const {
10695 // A TestSpec matches if any filter matches
10696 for( auto const& filter : m_filters )
10697 if( filter.matches( testCase ) )
10698 return true;
10699 return false;
10700 }
10701}
10702// end catch_test_spec.cpp
10703// start catch_test_spec_parser.cpp
10704
10705namespace Catch {
10706
10707 TestSpecParser::TestSpecParser( ITagAliasRegistry const& tagAliases ) : m_tagAliases( &tagAliases ) {}
10708
10709 TestSpecParser& TestSpecParser::parse( std::string const& arg ) {
10710 m_mode = None;
10711 m_exclusion = false;
10712 m_start = std::string::npos;
10713 m_arg = m_tagAliases->expandAliases( arg );
10714 m_escapeChars.clear();
10715 for( m_pos = 0; m_pos < m_arg.size(); ++m_pos )
10716 visitChar( m_arg[m_pos] );
10717 if( m_mode == Name )
10718 addPattern<TestSpec::NamePattern>();
10719 return *this;
10720 }
10721 TestSpec TestSpecParser::testSpec() {
10722 addFilter();
10723 return m_testSpec;
10724 }
10725
10726 void TestSpecParser::visitChar( char c ) {
10727 if( m_mode == None ) {
10728 switch( c ) {
10729 case ' ': return;
10730 case '~': m_exclusion = true; return;
10731 case '[': return startNewMode( Tag, ++m_pos );
10732 case '"': return startNewMode( QuotedName, ++m_pos );
10733 case '\\': return escape();
10734 default: startNewMode( Name, m_pos ); break;
10735 }
10736 }
10737 if( m_mode == Name ) {
10738 if( c == ',' ) {
10739 addPattern<TestSpec::NamePattern>();
10740 addFilter();
10741 }
10742 else if( c == '[' ) {
10743 if( subString() == "exclude:" )
10744 m_exclusion = true;
10745 else
10746 addPattern<TestSpec::NamePattern>();
10747 startNewMode( Tag, ++m_pos );
10748 }
10749 else if( c == '\\' )
10750 escape();
10751 }
10752 else if( m_mode == EscapedName )
10753 m_mode = Name;
10754 else if( m_mode == QuotedName && c == '"' )
10755 addPattern<TestSpec::NamePattern>();
10756 else if( m_mode == Tag && c == ']' )
10757 addPattern<TestSpec::TagPattern>();
10758 }
10759 void TestSpecParser::startNewMode( Mode mode, std::size_t start ) {
10760 m_mode = mode;
10761 m_start = start;
10762 }
10763 void TestSpecParser::escape() {
10764 if( m_mode == None )
10765 m_start = m_pos;
10766 m_mode = EscapedName;
10767 m_escapeChars.push_back( m_pos );
10768 }
10769 std::string TestSpecParser::subString() const { return m_arg.substr( m_start, m_pos - m_start ); }
10770
10771 void TestSpecParser::addFilter() {
10772 if( !m_currentFilter.m_patterns.empty() ) {
10773 m_testSpec.m_filters.push_back( m_currentFilter );
10774 m_currentFilter = TestSpec::Filter();
10775 }
10776 }
10777
10778 TestSpec parseTestSpec( std::string const& arg ) {
10779 return TestSpecParser( ITagAliasRegistry::get() ).parse( arg ).testSpec();
10780 }
10781
10782} // namespace Catch
10783// end catch_test_spec_parser.cpp
10784// start catch_timer.cpp
10785
10786#include <chrono>
10787
10788static const uint64_t nanosecondsInSecond = 1000000000;
10789
10790namespace Catch {
10791
10792 auto getCurrentNanosecondsSinceEpoch() -> uint64_t {
10793 return std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::nanoseconds>( std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now().time_since_epoch() ).count();
10794 }
10795
10796 namespace {
10797 auto estimateClockResolution() -> uint64_t {
10798 uint64_t sum = 0;
10799 static const uint64_t iterations = 1000000;
10800
10801 auto startTime = getCurrentNanosecondsSinceEpoch();
10802
10803 for( std::size_t i = 0; i < iterations; ++i ) {
10804
10805 uint64_t ticks;
10806 uint64_t baseTicks = getCurrentNanosecondsSinceEpoch();
10807 do {
10808 ticks = getCurrentNanosecondsSinceEpoch();
10809 } while( ticks == baseTicks );
10810
10811 auto delta = ticks - baseTicks;
10812 sum += delta;
10813
10814 // If we have been calibrating for over 3 seconds -- the clock
10815 // is terrible and we should move on.
10816 // TBD: How to signal that the measured resolution is probably wrong?
10817 if (ticks > startTime + 3 * nanosecondsInSecond) {
10818 return sum / i;
10819 }
10820 }
10821
10822 // We're just taking the mean, here. To do better we could take the std. dev and exclude outliers
10823 // - and potentially do more iterations if there's a high variance.
10824 return sum/iterations;
10825 }
10826 }
10827 auto getEstimatedClockResolution() -> uint64_t {
10828 static auto s_resolution = estimateClockResolution();
10829 return s_resolution;
10830 }
10831
10832 void Timer::start() {
10833 m_nanoseconds = getCurrentNanosecondsSinceEpoch();
10834 }
10835 auto Timer::getElapsedNanoseconds() const -> uint64_t {
10836 return getCurrentNanosecondsSinceEpoch() - m_nanoseconds;
10837 }
10838 auto Timer::getElapsedMicroseconds() const -> uint64_t {
10839 return getElapsedNanoseconds()/1000;
10840 }
10841 auto Timer::getElapsedMilliseconds() const -> unsigned int {
10842 return static_cast<unsigned int>(getElapsedMicroseconds()/1000);
10843 }
10844 auto Timer::getElapsedSeconds() const -> double {
10845 return getElapsedMicroseconds()/1000000.0;
10846 }
10847
10848} // namespace Catch
10849// end catch_timer.cpp
10850// start catch_tostring.cpp
10851
10852#if defined(__clang__)
10853# pragma clang diagnostic push
10854# pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wexit-time-destructors"
10855# pragma clang diagnostic ignored "-Wglobal-constructors"
10856#endif
10857
10858// Enable specific decls locally
10859#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_ENABLE_CHRONO_STRINGMAKER)
10860#define CATCH_CONFIG_ENABLE_CHRONO_STRINGMAKER
10861#endif
10862
10863#include <cmath>
10864#include <iomanip>
10865
10866namespace Catch {
10867
10868namespace Detail {
10869
10870 const std::string unprintableString = "{?}";
10871
10872 namespace {
10873 const int hexThreshold = 255;
10874
10875 struct Endianness {
10876 enum Arch { Big, Little };
10877
10878 static Arch which() {
10879 union _{
10880 int asInt;
10881 char asChar[sizeof (int)];
10882 } u;
10883
10884 u.asInt = 1;
10885 return ( u.asChar[sizeof(int)-1] == 1 ) ? Big : Little;
10886 }
10887 };
10888 }
10889
10890 std::string rawMemoryToString( const void *object, std::size_t size ) {
10891 // Reverse order for little endian architectures
10892 int i = 0, end = static_cast<int>( size ), inc = 1;
10893 if( Endianness::which() == Endianness::Little ) {
10894 i = end-1;
10895 end = inc = -1;
10896 }
10897
10898 unsigned char const *bytes = static_cast<unsigned char const *>(object);
10899 ReusableStringStream rss;
10900 rss << "0x" << std::setfill('0') << std::hex;
10901 for( ; i != end; i += inc )
10902 rss << std::setw(2) << static_cast<unsigned>(bytes[i]);
10903 return rss.str();
10904 }
10905}
10906
10907template<typename T>
10908std::string fpToString( T value, int precision ) {
10909 if (std::isnan(value)) {
10910 return "nan";
10911 }
10912
10913 ReusableStringStream rss;
10914 rss << std::setprecision( precision )
10915 << std::fixed
10916 << value;
10917 std::string d = rss.str();
10918 std::size_t i = d.find_last_not_of( '0' );
10919 if( i != std::string::npos && i != d.size()-1 ) {
10920 if( d[i] == '.' )
10921 i++;
10922 d = d.substr( 0, i+1 );
10923 }
10924 return d;
10925}
10926
10928//
10929// Out-of-line defs for full specialization of StringMaker
10930//
10932
10933std::string StringMaker<std::string>::convert(const std::string& str) {
10934 if (!getCurrentContext().getConfig()->showInvisibles()) {
10935 return '"' + str + '"';
10936 }
10937
10938 std::string s("\"");
10939 for (char c : str) {
10940 switch (c) {
10941 case '\n':
10942 s.append("\\n");
10943 break;
10944 case '\t':
10945 s.append("\\t");
10946 break;
10947 default:
10948 s.push_back(c);
10949 break;
10950 }
10951 }
10952 s.append("\"");
10953 return s;
10954}
10955
10956#ifdef CATCH_CONFIG_WCHAR
10957std::string StringMaker<std::wstring>::convert(const std::wstring& wstr) {
10958 std::string s;
10959 s.reserve(wstr.size());
10960 for (auto c : wstr) {
10961 s += (c <= 0xff) ? static_cast<char>(c) : '?';
10962 }
10963 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(s);
10964}
10965#endif
10966
10967std::string StringMaker<char const*>::convert(char const* str) {
10968 if (str) {
10969 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(std::string{ str });
10970 } else {
10971 return{ "{null string}" };
10972 }
10973}
10974std::string StringMaker<char*>::convert(char* str) {
10975 if (str) {
10976 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(std::string{ str });
10977 } else {
10978 return{ "{null string}" };
10979 }
10980}
10981#ifdef CATCH_CONFIG_WCHAR
10982std::string StringMaker<wchar_t const*>::convert(wchar_t const * str) {
10983 if (str) {
10984 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(std::wstring{ str });
10985 } else {
10986 return{ "{null string}" };
10987 }
10988}
10989std::string StringMaker<wchar_t *>::convert(wchar_t * str) {
10990 if (str) {
10991 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(std::wstring{ str });
10992 } else {
10993 return{ "{null string}" };
10994 }
10995}
10996#endif
10997
10998std::string StringMaker<int>::convert(int value) {
10999 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<long long>(value));
11000}
11001std::string StringMaker<long>::convert(long value) {
11002 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<long long>(value));
11003}
11004std::string StringMaker<long long>::convert(long long value) {
11005 ReusableStringStream rss;
11006 rss << value;
11007 if (value > Detail::hexThreshold) {
11008 rss << " (0x" << std::hex << value << ')';
11009 }
11010 return rss.str();
11011}
11012
11013std::string StringMaker<unsigned int>::convert(unsigned int value) {
11014 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<unsigned long long>(value));
11015}
11016std::string StringMaker<unsigned long>::convert(unsigned long value) {
11017 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<unsigned long long>(value));
11018}
11019std::string StringMaker<unsigned long long>::convert(unsigned long long value) {
11020 ReusableStringStream rss;
11021 rss << value;
11022 if (value > Detail::hexThreshold) {
11023 rss << " (0x" << std::hex << value << ')';
11024 }
11025 return rss.str();
11026}
11027
11028std::string StringMaker<bool>::convert(bool b) {
11029 return b ? "true" : "false";
11030}
11031
11032std::string StringMaker<char>::convert(char value) {
11033 if (value == '\r') {
11034 return "'\\r'";
11035 } else if (value == '\f') {
11036 return "'\\f'";
11037 } else if (value == '\n') {
11038 return "'\\n'";
11039 } else if (value == '\t') {
11040 return "'\\t'";
11041 } else if ('\0' <= value && value < ' ') {
11042 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<unsigned int>(value));
11043 } else {
11044 char chstr[] = "' '";
11045 chstr[1] = value;
11046 return chstr;
11047 }
11048}
11049std::string StringMaker<signed char>::convert(signed char c) {
11050 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<char>(c));
11051}
11052std::string StringMaker<unsigned char>::convert(unsigned char c) {
11053 return ::Catch::Detail::stringify(static_cast<char>(c));
11054}
11055
11056std::string StringMaker<std::nullptr_t>::convert(std::nullptr_t) {
11057 return "nullptr";
11058}
11059
11060std::string StringMaker<float>::convert(float value) {
11061 return fpToString(value, 5) + 'f';
11062}
11063std::string StringMaker<double>::convert(double value) {
11064 return fpToString(value, 10);
11065}
11066
11067std::string ratio_string<std::atto>::symbol() { return "a"; }
11068std::string ratio_string<std::femto>::symbol() { return "f"; }
11069std::string ratio_string<std::pico>::symbol() { return "p"; }
11070std::string ratio_string<std::nano>::symbol() { return "n"; }
11071std::string ratio_string<std::micro>::symbol() { return "u"; }
11072std::string ratio_string<std::milli>::symbol() { return "m"; }
11073
11074} // end namespace Catch
11075
11076#if defined(__clang__)
11077# pragma clang diagnostic pop
11078#endif
11079
11080// end catch_tostring.cpp
11081// start catch_totals.cpp
11082
11083namespace Catch {
11084
11085 Counts Counts::operator - ( Counts const& other ) const {
11086 Counts diff;
11087 diff.passed = passed - other.passed;
11088 diff.failed = failed - other.failed;
11089 diff.failedButOk = failedButOk - other.failedButOk;
11090 return diff;
11091 }
11092
11093 Counts& Counts::operator += ( Counts const& other ) {
11094 passed += other.passed;
11095 failed += other.failed;
11096 failedButOk += other.failedButOk;
11097 return *this;
11098 }
11099
11100 std::size_t Counts::total() const {
11101 return passed + failed + failedButOk;
11102 }
11103 bool Counts::allPassed() const {
11104 return failed == 0 && failedButOk == 0;
11105 }
11106 bool Counts::allOk() const {
11107 return failed == 0;
11108 }
11109
11110 Totals Totals::operator - ( Totals const& other ) const {
11111 Totals diff;
11112 diff.assertions = assertions - other.assertions;
11113 diff.testCases = testCases - other.testCases;
11114 return diff;
11115 }
11116
11117 Totals& Totals::operator += ( Totals const& other ) {
11118 assertions += other.assertions;
11119 testCases += other.testCases;
11120 return *this;
11121 }
11122
11123 Totals Totals::delta( Totals const& prevTotals ) const {
11124 Totals diff = *this - prevTotals;
11125 if( diff.assertions.failed > 0 )
11126 ++diff.testCases.failed;
11127 else if( diff.assertions.failedButOk > 0 )
11128 ++diff.testCases.failedButOk;
11129 else
11130 ++diff.testCases.passed;
11131 return diff;
11132 }
11133
11134}
11135// end catch_totals.cpp
11136// start catch_uncaught_exceptions.cpp
11137
11138#include <exception>
11139
11140namespace Catch {
11141 bool uncaught_exceptions() {
11142#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_CPP17_UNCAUGHT_EXCEPTIONS)
11143 return std::uncaught_exceptions() > 0;
11144#else
11145 return std::uncaught_exception();
11146#endif
11147 }
11148} // end namespace Catch
11149// end catch_uncaught_exceptions.cpp
11150// start catch_version.cpp
11151
11152#include <ostream>
11153
11154namespace Catch {
11155
11156 Version::Version
11157 ( unsigned int _majorVersion,
11158 unsigned int _minorVersion,
11159 unsigned int _patchNumber,
11160 char const * const _branchName,
11161 unsigned int _buildNumber )
11162 : majorVersion( _majorVersion ),
11163 minorVersion( _minorVersion ),
11164 patchNumber( _patchNumber ),
11165 branchName( _branchName ),
11166 buildNumber( _buildNumber )
11167 {}
11168
11169 std::ostream& operator << ( std::ostream& os, Version const& version ) {
11170 os << version.majorVersion << '.'
11171 << version.minorVersion << '.'
11172 << version.patchNumber;
11173 // branchName is never null -> 0th char is \0 if it is empty
11174 if (version.branchName[0]) {
11175 os << '-' << version.branchName
11176 << '.' << version.buildNumber;
11177 }
11178 return os;
11179 }
11180
11181 Version const& libraryVersion() {
11182 static Version version( 2, 3, 0, "", 0 );
11183 return version;
11184 }
11185
11186}
11187// end catch_version.cpp
11188// start catch_wildcard_pattern.cpp
11189
11190#include <sstream>
11191
11192namespace Catch {
11193
11194 WildcardPattern::WildcardPattern( std::string const& pattern,
11195 CaseSensitive::Choice caseSensitivity )
11196 : m_caseSensitivity( caseSensitivity ),
11197 m_pattern( adjustCase( pattern ) )
11198 {
11199 if( startsWith( m_pattern, '*' ) ) {
11200 m_pattern = m_pattern.substr( 1 );
11201 m_wildcard = WildcardAtStart;
11202 }
11203 if( endsWith( m_pattern, '*' ) ) {
11204 m_pattern = m_pattern.substr( 0, m_pattern.size()-1 );
11205 m_wildcard = static_cast<WildcardPosition>( m_wildcard | WildcardAtEnd );
11206 }
11207 }
11208
11209 bool WildcardPattern::matches( std::string const& str ) const {
11210 switch( m_wildcard ) {
11211 case NoWildcard:
11212 return m_pattern == adjustCase( str );
11213 case WildcardAtStart:
11214 return endsWith( adjustCase( str ), m_pattern );
11215 case WildcardAtEnd:
11216 return startsWith( adjustCase( str ), m_pattern );
11217 case WildcardAtBothEnds:
11218 return contains( adjustCase( str ), m_pattern );
11219 default:
11220 CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR( "Unknown enum" );
11221 }
11222 }
11223
11224 std::string WildcardPattern::adjustCase( std::string const& str ) const {
11225 return m_caseSensitivity == CaseSensitive::No ? toLower( str ) : str;
11226 }
11227}
11228// end catch_wildcard_pattern.cpp
11229// start catch_xmlwriter.cpp
11230
11231#include <iomanip>
11232
11233using uchar = unsigned char;
11234
11235namespace Catch {
11236
11237namespace {
11238
11239 size_t trailingBytes(unsigned char c) {
11240 if ((c & 0xE0) == 0xC0) {
11241 return 2;
11242 }
11243 if ((c & 0xF0) == 0xE0) {
11244 return 3;
11245 }
11246 if ((c & 0xF8) == 0xF0) {
11247 return 4;
11248 }
11249 CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR("Invalid multibyte utf-8 start byte encountered");
11250 }
11251
11252 uint32_t headerValue(unsigned char c) {
11253 if ((c & 0xE0) == 0xC0) {
11254 return c & 0x1F;
11255 }
11256 if ((c & 0xF0) == 0xE0) {
11257 return c & 0x0F;
11258 }
11259 if ((c & 0xF8) == 0xF0) {
11260 return c & 0x07;
11261 }
11262 CATCH_INTERNAL_ERROR("Invalid multibyte utf-8 start byte encountered");
11263 }
11264
11265 void hexEscapeChar(std::ostream& os, unsigned char c) {
11266 os << "\\x"
11267 << std::uppercase << std::hex << std::setfill('0') << std::setw(2)
11268 << static_cast<int>(c);
11269 }
11270
11271} // anonymous namespace
11272
11273 XmlEncode::XmlEncode( std::string const& str, ForWhat forWhat )
11274 : m_str( str ),
11275 m_forWhat( forWhat )
11276 {}
11277
11278 void XmlEncode::encodeTo( std::ostream& os ) const {
11279 // Apostrophe escaping not necessary if we always use " to write attributes
11280 // (see: http://www.w3.org/TR/xml/#syntax)
11281
11282 for( std::size_t idx = 0; idx < m_str.size(); ++ idx ) {
11283 uchar c = m_str[idx];
11284 switch (c) {
11285 case '<': os << "&lt;"; break;
11286 case '&': os << "&amp;"; break;
11287
11288 case '>':
11289 // See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xml/#syntax
11290 if (idx > 2 && m_str[idx - 1] == ']' && m_str[idx - 2] == ']')
11291 os << "&gt;";
11292 else
11293 os << c;
11294 break;
11295
11296 case '\"':
11297 if (m_forWhat == ForAttributes)
11298 os << "&quot;";
11299 else
11300 os << c;
11301 break;
11302
11303 default:
11304 // Check for control characters and invalid utf-8
11305
11306 // Escape control characters in standard ascii
11307 // see http://stackoverflow.com/questions/404107/why-are-control-characters-illegal-in-xml-1-0
11308 if (c < 0x09 || (c > 0x0D && c < 0x20) || c == 0x7F) {
11309 hexEscapeChar(os, c);
11310 break;
11311 }
11312
11313 // Plain ASCII: Write it to stream
11314 if (c < 0x7F) {
11315 os << c;
11316 break;
11317 }
11318
11319 // UTF-8 territory
11320 // Check if the encoding is valid and if it is not, hex escape bytes.
11321 // Important: We do not check the exact decoded values for validity, only the encoding format
11322 // First check that this bytes is a valid lead byte:
11323 // This means that it is not encoded as 1111 1XXX
11324 // Or as 10XX XXXX
11325 if (c < 0xC0 ||
11326 c >= 0xF8) {
11327 hexEscapeChar(os, c);
11328 break;
11329 }
11330
11331 auto encBytes = trailingBytes(c);
11332 // Are there enough bytes left to avoid accessing out-of-bounds memory?
11333 if (idx + encBytes - 1 >= m_str.size()) {
11334 hexEscapeChar(os, c);
11335 break;
11336 }
11337 // The header is valid, check data
11338 // The next encBytes bytes must together be a valid utf-8
11339 // This means: bitpattern 10XX XXXX and the extracted value is sane (ish)
11340 bool valid = true;
11341 uint32_t value = headerValue(c);
11342 for (std::size_t n = 1; n < encBytes; ++n) {
11343 uchar nc = m_str[idx + n];
11344 valid &= ((nc & 0xC0) == 0x80);
11345 value = (value << 6) | (nc & 0x3F);
11346 }
11347
11348 if (
11349 // Wrong bit pattern of following bytes
11350 (!valid) ||
11351 // Overlong encodings
11352 (value < 0x80) ||
11353 (0x80 <= value && value < 0x800 && encBytes > 2) ||
11354 (0x800 < value && value < 0x10000 && encBytes > 3) ||
11355 // Encoded value out of range
11356 (value >= 0x110000)
11357 ) {
11358 hexEscapeChar(os, c);
11359 break;
11360 }
11361
11362 // If we got here, this is in fact a valid(ish) utf-8 sequence
11363 for (std::size_t n = 0; n < encBytes; ++n) {
11364 os << m_str[idx + n];
11365 }
11366 idx += encBytes - 1;
11367 break;
11368 }
11369 }
11370 }
11371
11372 std::ostream& operator << ( std::ostream& os, XmlEncode const& xmlEncode ) {
11373 xmlEncode.encodeTo( os );
11374 return os;
11375 }
11376
11377 XmlWriter::ScopedElement::ScopedElement( XmlWriter* writer )
11378 : m_writer( writer )
11379 {}
11380
11381 XmlWriter::ScopedElement::ScopedElement( ScopedElement&& other ) noexcept
11382 : m_writer( other.m_writer ){
11383 other.m_writer = nullptr;
11384 }
11385 XmlWriter::ScopedElement& XmlWriter::ScopedElement::operator=( ScopedElement&& other ) noexcept {
11386 if ( m_writer ) {
11387 m_writer->endElement();
11388 }
11389 m_writer = other.m_writer;
11390 other.m_writer = nullptr;
11391 return *this;
11392 }
11393
11394 XmlWriter::ScopedElement::~ScopedElement() {
11395 if( m_writer )
11396 m_writer->endElement();
11397 }
11398
11399 XmlWriter::ScopedElement& XmlWriter::ScopedElement::writeText( std::string const& text, bool indent ) {
11400 m_writer->writeText( text, indent );
11401 return *this;
11402 }
11403
11404 XmlWriter::XmlWriter( std::ostream& os ) : m_os( os )
11405 {
11406 writeDeclaration();
11407 }
11408
11409 XmlWriter::~XmlWriter() {
11410 while( !m_tags.empty() )
11411 endElement();
11412 }
11413
11414 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::startElement( std::string const& name ) {
11415 ensureTagClosed();
11416 newlineIfNecessary();
11417 m_os << m_indent << '<' << name;
11418 m_tags.push_back( name );
11419 m_indent += " ";
11420 m_tagIsOpen = true;
11421 return *this;
11422 }
11423
11424 XmlWriter::ScopedElement XmlWriter::scopedElement( std::string const& name ) {
11425 ScopedElement scoped( this );
11426 startElement( name );
11427 return scoped;
11428 }
11429
11430 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::endElement() {
11431 newlineIfNecessary();
11432 m_indent = m_indent.substr( 0, m_indent.size()-2 );
11433 if( m_tagIsOpen ) {
11434 m_os << "/>";
11435 m_tagIsOpen = false;
11436 }
11437 else {
11438 m_os << m_indent << "</" << m_tags.back() << ">";
11439 }
11440 m_os << std::endl;
11441 m_tags.pop_back();
11442 return *this;
11443 }
11444
11445 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::writeAttribute( std::string const& name, std::string const& attribute ) {
11446 if( !name.empty() && !attribute.empty() )
11447 m_os << ' ' << name << "=\"" << XmlEncode( attribute, XmlEncode::ForAttributes ) << '"';
11448 return *this;
11449 }
11450
11451 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::writeAttribute( std::string const& name, bool attribute ) {
11452 m_os << ' ' << name << "=\"" << ( attribute ? "true" : "false" ) << '"';
11453 return *this;
11454 }
11455
11456 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::writeText( std::string const& text, bool indent ) {
11457 if( !text.empty() ){
11458 bool tagWasOpen = m_tagIsOpen;
11459 ensureTagClosed();
11460 if( tagWasOpen && indent )
11461 m_os << m_indent;
11462 m_os << XmlEncode( text );
11463 m_needsNewline = true;
11464 }
11465 return *this;
11466 }
11467
11468 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::writeComment( std::string const& text ) {
11469 ensureTagClosed();
11470 m_os << m_indent << "<!--" << text << "-->";
11471 m_needsNewline = true;
11472 return *this;
11473 }
11474
11475 void XmlWriter::writeStylesheetRef( std::string const& url ) {
11476 m_os << "<?xml-stylesheet type=\"text/xsl\" href=\"" << url << "\"?>\n";
11477 }
11478
11479 XmlWriter& XmlWriter::writeBlankLine() {
11480 ensureTagClosed();
11481 m_os << '\n';
11482 return *this;
11483 }
11484
11485 void XmlWriter::ensureTagClosed() {
11486 if( m_tagIsOpen ) {
11487 m_os << ">" << std::endl;
11488 m_tagIsOpen = false;
11489 }
11490 }
11491
11492 void XmlWriter::writeDeclaration() {
11493 m_os << "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"UTF-8\"?>\n";
11494 }
11495
11496 void XmlWriter::newlineIfNecessary() {
11497 if( m_needsNewline ) {
11498 m_os << std::endl;
11499 m_needsNewline = false;
11500 }
11501 }
11502}
11503// end catch_xmlwriter.cpp
11504// start catch_reporter_bases.cpp
11505
11506#include <cstring>
11507#include <cfloat>
11508#include <cstdio>
11509#include <cassert>
11510#include <memory>
11511
11512namespace Catch {
11513 void prepareExpandedExpression(AssertionResult& result) {
11514 result.getExpandedExpression();
11515 }
11516
11517 // Because formatting using c++ streams is stateful, drop down to C is required
11518 // Alternatively we could use stringstream, but its performance is... not good.
11519 std::string getFormattedDuration( double duration ) {
11520 // Max exponent + 1 is required to represent the whole part
11521 // + 1 for decimal point
11522 // + 3 for the 3 decimal places
11523 // + 1 for null terminator
11524 const std::size_t maxDoubleSize = DBL_MAX_10_EXP + 1 + 1 + 3 + 1;
11525 char buffer[maxDoubleSize];
11526
11527 // Save previous errno, to prevent sprintf from overwriting it
11528 ErrnoGuard guard;
11529#ifdef _MSC_VER
11530 sprintf_s(buffer, "%.3f", duration);
11531#else
11532 sprintf(buffer, "%.3f", duration);
11533#endif
11534 return std::string(buffer);
11535 }
11536
11537 TestEventListenerBase::TestEventListenerBase(ReporterConfig const & _config)
11538 :StreamingReporterBase(_config) {}
11539
11540 void TestEventListenerBase::assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const &) {}
11541
11542 bool TestEventListenerBase::assertionEnded(AssertionStats const &) {
11543 return false;
11544 }
11545
11546} // end namespace Catch
11547// end catch_reporter_bases.cpp
11548// start catch_reporter_compact.cpp
11549
11550namespace {
11551
11552#ifdef CATCH_PLATFORM_MAC
11553 const char* failedString() { return "FAILED"; }
11554 const char* passedString() { return "PASSED"; }
11555#else
11556 const char* failedString() { return "failed"; }
11557 const char* passedString() { return "passed"; }
11558#endif
11559
11560 // Colour::LightGrey
11561 Catch::Colour::Code dimColour() { return Catch::Colour::FileName; }
11562
11563 std::string bothOrAll( std::size_t count ) {
11564 return count == 1 ? std::string() :
11565 count == 2 ? "both " : "all " ;
11566 }
11567
11568} // anon namespace
11569
11570namespace Catch {
11571namespace {
11572// Colour, message variants:
11573// - white: No tests ran.
11574// - red: Failed [both/all] N test cases, failed [both/all] M assertions.
11575// - white: Passed [both/all] N test cases (no assertions).
11576// - red: Failed N tests cases, failed M assertions.
11577// - green: Passed [both/all] N tests cases with M assertions.
11578void printTotals(std::ostream& out, const Totals& totals) {
11579 if (totals.testCases.total() == 0) {
11580 out << "No tests ran.";
11581 } else if (totals.testCases.failed == totals.testCases.total()) {
11582 Colour colour(Colour::ResultError);
11583 const std::string qualify_assertions_failed =
11584 totals.assertions.failed == totals.assertions.total() ?
11585 bothOrAll(totals.assertions.failed) : std::string();
11586 out <<
11587 "Failed " << bothOrAll(totals.testCases.failed)
11588 << pluralise(totals.testCases.failed, "test case") << ", "
11589 "failed " << qualify_assertions_failed <<
11590 pluralise(totals.assertions.failed, "assertion") << '.';
11591 } else if (totals.assertions.total() == 0) {
11592 out <<
11593 "Passed " << bothOrAll(totals.testCases.total())
11594 << pluralise(totals.testCases.total(), "test case")
11595 << " (no assertions).";
11596 } else if (totals.assertions.failed) {
11597 Colour colour(Colour::ResultError);
11598 out <<
11599 "Failed " << pluralise(totals.testCases.failed, "test case") << ", "
11600 "failed " << pluralise(totals.assertions.failed, "assertion") << '.';
11601 } else {
11602 Colour colour(Colour::ResultSuccess);
11603 out <<
11604 "Passed " << bothOrAll(totals.testCases.passed)
11605 << pluralise(totals.testCases.passed, "test case") <<
11606 " with " << pluralise(totals.assertions.passed, "assertion") << '.';
11607 }
11608}
11609
11610// Implementation of CompactReporter formatting
11611class AssertionPrinter {
11612public:
11613 AssertionPrinter& operator= (AssertionPrinter const&) = delete;
11614 AssertionPrinter(AssertionPrinter const&) = delete;
11615 AssertionPrinter(std::ostream& _stream, AssertionStats const& _stats, bool _printInfoMessages)
11616 : stream(_stream)
11617 , result(_stats.assertionResult)
11618 , messages(_stats.infoMessages)
11619 , itMessage(_stats.infoMessages.begin())
11620 , printInfoMessages(_printInfoMessages) {}
11621
11622 void print() {
11623 printSourceInfo();
11624
11625 itMessage = messages.begin();
11626
11627 switch (result.getResultType()) {
11628 case ResultWas::Ok:
11629 printResultType(Colour::ResultSuccess, passedString());
11630 printOriginalExpression();
11631 printReconstructedExpression();
11632 if (!result.hasExpression())
11633 printRemainingMessages(Colour::None);
11634 else
11635 printRemainingMessages();
11636 break;
11637 case ResultWas::ExpressionFailed:
11638 if (result.isOk())
11639 printResultType(Colour::ResultSuccess, failedString() + std::string(" - but was ok"));
11640 else
11641 printResultType(Colour::Error, failedString());
11642 printOriginalExpression();
11643 printReconstructedExpression();
11644 printRemainingMessages();
11645 break;
11646 case ResultWas::ThrewException:
11647 printResultType(Colour::Error, failedString());
11648 printIssue("unexpected exception with message:");
11649 printMessage();
11650 printExpressionWas();
11651 printRemainingMessages();
11652 break;
11653 case ResultWas::FatalErrorCondition:
11654 printResultType(Colour::Error, failedString());
11655 printIssue("fatal error condition with message:");
11656 printMessage();
11657 printExpressionWas();
11658 printRemainingMessages();
11659 break;
11660 case ResultWas::DidntThrowException:
11661 printResultType(Colour::Error, failedString());
11662 printIssue("expected exception, got none");
11663 printExpressionWas();
11664 printRemainingMessages();
11665 break;
11666 case ResultWas::Info:
11667 printResultType(Colour::None, "info");
11668 printMessage();
11669 printRemainingMessages();
11670 break;
11671 case ResultWas::Warning:
11672 printResultType(Colour::None, "warning");
11673 printMessage();
11674 printRemainingMessages();
11675 break;
11676 case ResultWas::ExplicitFailure:
11677 printResultType(Colour::Error, failedString());
11678 printIssue("explicitly");
11679 printRemainingMessages(Colour::None);
11680 break;
11681 // These cases are here to prevent compiler warnings
11682 case ResultWas::Unknown:
11683 case ResultWas::FailureBit:
11684 case ResultWas::Exception:
11685 printResultType(Colour::Error, "** internal error **");
11686 break;
11687 }
11688 }
11689
11690private:
11691 void printSourceInfo() const {
11692 Colour colourGuard(Colour::FileName);
11693 stream << result.getSourceInfo() << ':';
11694 }
11695
11696 void printResultType(Colour::Code colour, std::string const& passOrFail) const {
11697 if (!passOrFail.empty()) {
11698 {
11699 Colour colourGuard(colour);
11700 stream << ' ' << passOrFail;
11701 }
11702 stream << ':';
11703 }
11704 }
11705
11706 void printIssue(std::string const& issue) const {
11707 stream << ' ' << issue;
11708 }
11709
11710 void printExpressionWas() {
11711 if (result.hasExpression()) {
11712 stream << ';';
11713 {
11714 Colour colour(dimColour());
11715 stream << " expression was:";
11716 }
11717 printOriginalExpression();
11718 }
11719 }
11720
11721 void printOriginalExpression() const {
11722 if (result.hasExpression()) {
11723 stream << ' ' << result.getExpression();
11724 }
11725 }
11726
11727 void printReconstructedExpression() const {
11728 if (result.hasExpandedExpression()) {
11729 {
11730 Colour colour(dimColour());
11731 stream << " for: ";
11732 }
11733 stream << result.getExpandedExpression();
11734 }
11735 }
11736
11737 void printMessage() {
11738 if (itMessage != messages.end()) {
11739 stream << " '" << itMessage->message << '\'';
11740 ++itMessage;
11741 }
11742 }
11743
11744 void printRemainingMessages(Colour::Code colour = dimColour()) {
11745 if (itMessage == messages.end())
11746 return;
11747
11748 // using messages.end() directly yields (or auto) compilation error:
11749 std::vector<MessageInfo>::const_iterator itEnd = messages.end();
11750 const std::size_t N = static_cast<std::size_t>(std::distance(itMessage, itEnd));
11751
11752 {
11753 Colour colourGuard(colour);
11754 stream << " with " << pluralise(N, "message") << ':';
11755 }
11756
11757 for (; itMessage != itEnd; ) {
11758 // If this assertion is a warning ignore any INFO messages
11759 if (printInfoMessages || itMessage->type != ResultWas::Info) {
11760 stream << " '" << itMessage->message << '\'';
11761 if (++itMessage != itEnd) {
11762 Colour colourGuard(dimColour());
11763 stream << " and";
11764 }
11765 }
11766 }
11767 }
11768
11769private:
11770 std::ostream& stream;
11771 AssertionResult const& result;
11772 std::vector<MessageInfo> messages;
11773 std::vector<MessageInfo>::const_iterator itMessage;
11774 bool printInfoMessages;
11775};
11776
11777} // anon namespace
11778
11779 std::string CompactReporter::getDescription() {
11780 return "Reports test results on a single line, suitable for IDEs";
11781 }
11782
11783 ReporterPreferences CompactReporter::getPreferences() const {
11784 return m_reporterPrefs;
11785 }
11786
11787 void CompactReporter::noMatchingTestCases( std::string const& spec ) {
11788 stream << "No test cases matched '" << spec << '\'' << std::endl;
11789 }
11790
11791 void CompactReporter::assertionStarting( AssertionInfo const& ) {}
11792
11793 bool CompactReporter::assertionEnded( AssertionStats const& _assertionStats ) {
11794 AssertionResult const& result = _assertionStats.assertionResult;
11795
11796 bool printInfoMessages = true;
11797
11798 // Drop out if result was successful and we're not printing those
11799 if( !m_config->includeSuccessfulResults() && result.isOk() ) {
11800 if( result.getResultType() != ResultWas::Warning )
11801 return false;
11802 printInfoMessages = false;
11803 }
11804
11805 AssertionPrinter printer( stream, _assertionStats, printInfoMessages );
11806 printer.print();
11807
11808 stream << std::endl;
11809 return true;
11810 }
11811
11812 void CompactReporter::sectionEnded(SectionStats const& _sectionStats) {
11813 if (m_config->showDurations() == ShowDurations::Always) {
11814 stream << getFormattedDuration(_sectionStats.durationInSeconds) << " s: " << _sectionStats.sectionInfo.name << std::endl;
11815 }
11816 }
11817
11818 void CompactReporter::testRunEnded( TestRunStats const& _testRunStats ) {
11819 printTotals( stream, _testRunStats.totals );
11820 stream << '\n' << std::endl;
11821 StreamingReporterBase::testRunEnded( _testRunStats );
11822 }
11823
11824 CompactReporter::~CompactReporter() {}
11825
11826 CATCH_REGISTER_REPORTER( "compact", CompactReporter )
11827
11828} // end namespace Catch
11829// end catch_reporter_compact.cpp
11830// start catch_reporter_console.cpp
11831
11832#include <cfloat>
11833#include <cstdio>
11834
11835#if defined(_MSC_VER)
11836#pragma warning(push)
11837#pragma warning(disable:4061) // Not all labels are EXPLICITLY handled in switch
11838 // Note that 4062 (not all labels are handled
11839 // and default is missing) is enabled
11840#endif
11841
11842namespace Catch {
11843
11844namespace {
11845
11846// Formatter impl for ConsoleReporter
11847class ConsoleAssertionPrinter {
11848public:
11849 ConsoleAssertionPrinter& operator= (ConsoleAssertionPrinter const&) = delete;
11850 ConsoleAssertionPrinter(ConsoleAssertionPrinter const&) = delete;
11851 ConsoleAssertionPrinter(std::ostream& _stream, AssertionStats const& _stats, bool _printInfoMessages)
11852 : stream(_stream),
11853 stats(_stats),
11854 result(_stats.assertionResult),
11855 colour(Colour::None),
11856 message(result.getMessage()),
11857 messages(_stats.infoMessages),
11858 printInfoMessages(_printInfoMessages) {
11859 switch (result.getResultType()) {
11860 case ResultWas::Ok:
11861 colour = Colour::Success;
11862 passOrFail = "PASSED";
11863 //if( result.hasMessage() )
11864 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() == 1)
11865 messageLabel = "with message";
11866 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() > 1)
11867 messageLabel = "with messages";
11868 break;
11869 case ResultWas::ExpressionFailed:
11870 if (result.isOk()) {
11871 colour = Colour::Success;
11872 passOrFail = "FAILED - but was ok";
11873 } else {
11874 colour = Colour::Error;
11875 passOrFail = "FAILED";
11876 }
11877 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() == 1)
11878 messageLabel = "with message";
11879 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() > 1)
11880 messageLabel = "with messages";
11881 break;
11882 case ResultWas::ThrewException:
11883 colour = Colour::Error;
11884 passOrFail = "FAILED";
11885 messageLabel = "due to unexpected exception with ";
11886 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() == 1)
11887 messageLabel += "message";
11888 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() > 1)
11889 messageLabel += "messages";
11890 break;
11891 case ResultWas::FatalErrorCondition:
11892 colour = Colour::Error;
11893 passOrFail = "FAILED";
11894 messageLabel = "due to a fatal error condition";
11895 break;
11896 case ResultWas::DidntThrowException:
11897 colour = Colour::Error;
11898 passOrFail = "FAILED";
11899 messageLabel = "because no exception was thrown where one was expected";
11900 break;
11901 case ResultWas::Info:
11902 messageLabel = "info";
11903 break;
11904 case ResultWas::Warning:
11905 messageLabel = "warning";
11906 break;
11907 case ResultWas::ExplicitFailure:
11908 passOrFail = "FAILED";
11909 colour = Colour::Error;
11910 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() == 1)
11911 messageLabel = "explicitly with message";
11912 if (_stats.infoMessages.size() > 1)
11913 messageLabel = "explicitly with messages";
11914 break;
11915 // These cases are here to prevent compiler warnings
11916 case ResultWas::Unknown:
11917 case ResultWas::FailureBit:
11918 case ResultWas::Exception:
11919 passOrFail = "** internal error **";
11920 colour = Colour::Error;
11921 break;
11922 }
11923 }
11924
11925 void print() const {
11926 printSourceInfo();
11927 if (stats.totals.assertions.total() > 0) {
11928 if (result.isOk())
11929 stream << '\n';
11930 printResultType();
11931 printOriginalExpression();
11932 printReconstructedExpression();
11933 } else {
11934 stream << '\n';
11935 }
11936 printMessage();
11937 }
11938
11939private:
11940 void printResultType() const {
11941 if (!passOrFail.empty()) {
11942 Colour colourGuard(colour);
11943 stream << passOrFail << ":\n";
11944 }
11945 }
11946 void printOriginalExpression() const {
11947 if (result.hasExpression()) {
11948 Colour colourGuard(Colour::OriginalExpression);
11949 stream << " ";
11950 stream << result.getExpressionInMacro();
11951 stream << '\n';
11952 }
11953 }
11954 void printReconstructedExpression() const {
11955 if (result.hasExpandedExpression()) {
11956 stream << "with expansion:\n";
11957 Colour colourGuard(Colour::ReconstructedExpression);
11958 stream << Column(result.getExpandedExpression()).indent(2) << '\n';
11959 }
11960 }
11961 void printMessage() const {
11962 if (!messageLabel.empty())
11963 stream << messageLabel << ':' << '\n';
11964 for (auto const& msg : messages) {
11965 // If this assertion is a warning ignore any INFO messages
11966 if (printInfoMessages || msg.type != ResultWas::Info)
11967 stream << Column(msg.message).indent(2) << '\n';
11968 }
11969 }
11970 void printSourceInfo() const {
11971 Colour colourGuard(Colour::FileName);
11972 stream << result.getSourceInfo() << ": ";
11973 }
11974
11975 std::ostream& stream;
11976 AssertionStats const& stats;
11977 AssertionResult const& result;
11978 Colour::Code colour;
11979 std::string passOrFail;
11980 std::string messageLabel;
11981 std::string message;
11982 std::vector<MessageInfo> messages;
11983 bool printInfoMessages;
11984};
11985
11986std::size_t makeRatio(std::size_t number, std::size_t total) {
11987 std::size_t ratio = total > 0 ? CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH * number / total : 0;
11988 return (ratio == 0 && number > 0) ? 1 : ratio;
11989}
11990
11991std::size_t& findMax(std::size_t& i, std::size_t& j, std::size_t& k) {
11992 if (i > j && i > k)
11993 return i;
11994 else if (j > k)
11995 return j;
11996 else
11997 return k;
11998}
11999
12000struct ColumnInfo {
12001 enum Justification { Left, Right };
12002 std::string name;
12003 int width;
12004 Justification justification;
12005};
12006struct ColumnBreak {};
12007struct RowBreak {};
12008
12009class Duration {
12010 enum class Unit {
12011 Auto,
12012 Nanoseconds,
12013 Microseconds,
12014 Milliseconds,
12015 Seconds,
12016 Minutes
12017 };
12018 static const uint64_t s_nanosecondsInAMicrosecond = 1000;
12019 static const uint64_t s_nanosecondsInAMillisecond = 1000 * s_nanosecondsInAMicrosecond;
12020 static const uint64_t s_nanosecondsInASecond = 1000 * s_nanosecondsInAMillisecond;
12021 static const uint64_t s_nanosecondsInAMinute = 60 * s_nanosecondsInASecond;
12022
12023 uint64_t m_inNanoseconds;
12024 Unit m_units;
12025
12026public:
12027 explicit Duration(uint64_t inNanoseconds, Unit units = Unit::Auto)
12028 : m_inNanoseconds(inNanoseconds),
12029 m_units(units) {
12030 if (m_units == Unit::Auto) {
12031 if (m_inNanoseconds < s_nanosecondsInAMicrosecond)
12032 m_units = Unit::Nanoseconds;
12033 else if (m_inNanoseconds < s_nanosecondsInAMillisecond)
12034 m_units = Unit::Microseconds;
12035 else if (m_inNanoseconds < s_nanosecondsInASecond)
12036 m_units = Unit::Milliseconds;
12037 else if (m_inNanoseconds < s_nanosecondsInAMinute)
12038 m_units = Unit::Seconds;
12039 else
12040 m_units = Unit::Minutes;
12041 }
12042
12043 }
12044
12045 auto value() const -> double {
12046 switch (m_units) {
12047 case Unit::Microseconds:
12048 return m_inNanoseconds / static_cast<double>(s_nanosecondsInAMicrosecond);
12049 case Unit::Milliseconds:
12050 return m_inNanoseconds / static_cast<double>(s_nanosecondsInAMillisecond);
12051 case Unit::Seconds:
12052 return m_inNanoseconds / static_cast<double>(s_nanosecondsInASecond);
12053 case Unit::Minutes:
12054 return m_inNanoseconds / static_cast<double>(s_nanosecondsInAMinute);
12055 default:
12056 return static_cast<double>(m_inNanoseconds);
12057 }
12058 }
12059 auto unitsAsString() const -> std::string {
12060 switch (m_units) {
12061 case Unit::Nanoseconds:
12062 return "ns";
12063 case Unit::Microseconds:
12064 return "µs";
12065 case Unit::Milliseconds:
12066 return "ms";
12067 case Unit::Seconds:
12068 return "s";
12069 case Unit::Minutes:
12070 return "m";
12071 default:
12072 return "** internal error **";
12073 }
12074
12075 }
12076 friend auto operator << (std::ostream& os, Duration const& duration) -> std::ostream& {
12077 return os << duration.value() << " " << duration.unitsAsString();
12078 }
12079};
12080} // end anon namespace
12081
12082class TablePrinter {
12083 std::ostream& m_os;
12084 std::vector<ColumnInfo> m_columnInfos;
12085 std::ostringstream m_oss;
12086 int m_currentColumn = -1;
12087 bool m_isOpen = false;
12088
12089public:
12090 TablePrinter( std::ostream& os, std::vector<ColumnInfo> columnInfos )
12091 : m_os( os ),
12092 m_columnInfos( std::move( columnInfos ) ) {}
12093
12094 auto columnInfos() const -> std::vector<ColumnInfo> const& {
12095 return m_columnInfos;
12096 }
12097
12098 void open() {
12099 if (!m_isOpen) {
12100 m_isOpen = true;
12101 *this << RowBreak();
12102 for (auto const& info : m_columnInfos)
12103 *this << info.name << ColumnBreak();
12104 *this << RowBreak();
12105 m_os << Catch::getLineOfChars<'-'>() << "\n";
12106 }
12107 }
12108 void close() {
12109 if (m_isOpen) {
12110 *this << RowBreak();
12111 m_os << std::endl;
12112 m_isOpen = false;
12113 }
12114 }
12115
12116 template<typename T>
12117 friend TablePrinter& operator << (TablePrinter& tp, T const& value) {
12118 tp.m_oss << value;
12119 return tp;
12120 }
12121
12122 friend TablePrinter& operator << (TablePrinter& tp, ColumnBreak) {
12123 auto colStr = tp.m_oss.str();
12124 // This takes account of utf8 encodings
12125 auto strSize = Catch::StringRef(colStr).numberOfCharacters();
12126 tp.m_oss.str("");
12127 tp.open();
12128 if (tp.m_currentColumn == static_cast<int>(tp.m_columnInfos.size() - 1)) {
12129 tp.m_currentColumn = -1;
12130 tp.m_os << "\n";
12131 }
12132 tp.m_currentColumn++;
12133
12134 auto colInfo = tp.m_columnInfos[tp.m_currentColumn];
12135 auto padding = (strSize + 2 < static_cast<std::size_t>(colInfo.width))
12136 ? std::string(colInfo.width - (strSize + 2), ' ')
12137 : std::string();
12138 if (colInfo.justification == ColumnInfo::Left)
12139 tp.m_os << colStr << padding << " ";
12140 else
12141 tp.m_os << padding << colStr << " ";
12142 return tp;
12143 }
12144
12145 friend TablePrinter& operator << (TablePrinter& tp, RowBreak) {
12146 if (tp.m_currentColumn > 0) {
12147 tp.m_os << "\n";
12148 tp.m_currentColumn = -1;
12149 }
12150 return tp;
12151 }
12152};
12153
12154ConsoleReporter::ConsoleReporter(ReporterConfig const& config)
12155 : StreamingReporterBase(config),
12156 m_tablePrinter(new TablePrinter(config.stream(),
12157 {
12158 { "benchmark name", CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH - 32, ColumnInfo::Left },
12159 { "iters", 8, ColumnInfo::Right },
12160 { "elapsed ns", 14, ColumnInfo::Right },
12161 { "average", 14, ColumnInfo::Right }
12162 })) {}
12163ConsoleReporter::~ConsoleReporter() = default;
12164
12165std::string ConsoleReporter::getDescription() {
12166 return "Reports test results as plain lines of text";
12167}
12168
12169void ConsoleReporter::noMatchingTestCases(std::string const& spec) {
12170 stream << "No test cases matched '" << spec << '\'' << std::endl;
12171}
12172
12173void ConsoleReporter::assertionStarting(AssertionInfo const&) {}
12174
12175bool ConsoleReporter::assertionEnded(AssertionStats const& _assertionStats) {
12176 AssertionResult const& result = _assertionStats.assertionResult;
12177
12178 bool includeResults = m_config->includeSuccessfulResults() || !result.isOk();
12179
12180 // Drop out if result was successful but we're not printing them.
12181 if (!includeResults && result.getResultType() != ResultWas::Warning)
12182 return false;
12183
12184 lazyPrint();
12185
12186 ConsoleAssertionPrinter printer(stream, _assertionStats, includeResults);
12187 printer.print();
12188 stream << std::endl;
12189 return true;
12190}
12191
12192void ConsoleReporter::sectionStarting(SectionInfo const& _sectionInfo) {
12193 m_headerPrinted = false;
12194 StreamingReporterBase::sectionStarting(_sectionInfo);
12195}
12196void ConsoleReporter::sectionEnded(SectionStats const& _sectionStats) {
12197 m_tablePrinter->close();
12198 if (_sectionStats.missingAssertions) {
12199 lazyPrint();
12200 Colour colour(Colour::ResultError);
12201 if (m_sectionStack.size() > 1)
12202 stream << "\nNo assertions in section";
12203 else
12204 stream << "\nNo assertions in test case";
12205 stream << " '" << _sectionStats.sectionInfo.name << "'\n" << std::endl;
12206 }
12207 if (m_config->showDurations() == ShowDurations::Always) {
12208 stream << getFormattedDuration(_sectionStats.durationInSeconds) << " s: " << _sectionStats.sectionInfo.name << std::endl;
12209 }
12210 if (m_headerPrinted) {
12211 m_headerPrinted = false;
12212 }
12213 StreamingReporterBase::sectionEnded(_sectionStats);
12214}
12215
12216void ConsoleReporter::benchmarkStarting(BenchmarkInfo const& info) {
12217 lazyPrintWithoutClosingBenchmarkTable();
12218
12219 auto nameCol = Column( info.name ).width( static_cast<std::size_t>( m_tablePrinter->columnInfos()[0].width - 2 ) );
12220
12221 bool firstLine = true;
12222 for (auto line : nameCol) {
12223 if (!firstLine)
12224 (*m_tablePrinter) << ColumnBreak() << ColumnBreak() << ColumnBreak();
12225 else
12226 firstLine = false;
12227
12228 (*m_tablePrinter) << line << ColumnBreak();
12229 }
12230}
12231void ConsoleReporter::benchmarkEnded(BenchmarkStats const& stats) {
12232 Duration average(stats.elapsedTimeInNanoseconds / stats.iterations);
12233 (*m_tablePrinter)
12234 << stats.iterations << ColumnBreak()
12235 << stats.elapsedTimeInNanoseconds << ColumnBreak()
12236 << average << ColumnBreak();
12237}
12238
12239void ConsoleReporter::testCaseEnded(TestCaseStats const& _testCaseStats) {
12240 m_tablePrinter->close();
12241 StreamingReporterBase::testCaseEnded(_testCaseStats);
12242 m_headerPrinted = false;
12243}
12244void ConsoleReporter::testGroupEnded(TestGroupStats const& _testGroupStats) {
12245 if (currentGroupInfo.used) {
12246 printSummaryDivider();
12247 stream << "Summary for group '" << _testGroupStats.groupInfo.name << "':\n";
12248 printTotals(_testGroupStats.totals);
12249 stream << '\n' << std::endl;
12250 }
12251 StreamingReporterBase::testGroupEnded(_testGroupStats);
12252}
12253void ConsoleReporter::testRunEnded(TestRunStats const& _testRunStats) {
12254 printTotalsDivider(_testRunStats.totals);
12255 printTotals(_testRunStats.totals);
12256 stream << std::endl;
12257 StreamingReporterBase::testRunEnded(_testRunStats);
12258}
12259
12260void ConsoleReporter::lazyPrint() {
12261
12262 m_tablePrinter->close();
12263 lazyPrintWithoutClosingBenchmarkTable();
12264}
12265
12266void ConsoleReporter::lazyPrintWithoutClosingBenchmarkTable() {
12267
12268 if (!currentTestRunInfo.used)
12269 lazyPrintRunInfo();
12270 if (!currentGroupInfo.used)
12271 lazyPrintGroupInfo();
12272
12273 if (!m_headerPrinted) {
12274 printTestCaseAndSectionHeader();
12275 m_headerPrinted = true;
12276 }
12277}
12278void ConsoleReporter::lazyPrintRunInfo() {
12279 stream << '\n' << getLineOfChars<'~'>() << '\n';
12280 Colour colour(Colour::SecondaryText);
12281 stream << currentTestRunInfo->name
12282 << " is a Catch v" << libraryVersion() << " host application.\n"
12283 << "Run with -? for options\n\n";
12284
12285 if (m_config->rngSeed() != 0)
12286 stream << "Randomness seeded to: " << m_config->rngSeed() << "\n\n";
12287
12288 currentTestRunInfo.used = true;
12289}
12290void ConsoleReporter::lazyPrintGroupInfo() {
12291 if (!currentGroupInfo->name.empty() && currentGroupInfo->groupsCounts > 1) {
12292 printClosedHeader("Group: " + currentGroupInfo->name);
12293 currentGroupInfo.used = true;
12294 }
12295}
12296void ConsoleReporter::printTestCaseAndSectionHeader() {
12297 assert(!m_sectionStack.empty());
12298 printOpenHeader(currentTestCaseInfo->name);
12299
12300 if (m_sectionStack.size() > 1) {
12301 Colour colourGuard(Colour::Headers);
12302
12303 auto
12304 it = m_sectionStack.begin() + 1, // Skip first section (test case)
12305 itEnd = m_sectionStack.end();
12306 for (; it != itEnd; ++it)
12307 printHeaderString(it->name, 2);
12308 }
12309
12310 SourceLineInfo lineInfo = m_sectionStack.back().lineInfo;
12311
12312 if (!lineInfo.empty()) {
12313 stream << getLineOfChars<'-'>() << '\n';
12314 Colour colourGuard(Colour::FileName);
12315 stream << lineInfo << '\n';
12316 }
12317 stream << getLineOfChars<'.'>() << '\n' << std::endl;
12318}
12319
12320void ConsoleReporter::printClosedHeader(std::string const& _name) {
12321 printOpenHeader(_name);
12322 stream << getLineOfChars<'.'>() << '\n';
12323}
12324void ConsoleReporter::printOpenHeader(std::string const& _name) {
12325 stream << getLineOfChars<'-'>() << '\n';
12326 {
12327 Colour colourGuard(Colour::Headers);
12328 printHeaderString(_name);
12329 }
12330}
12331
12332// if string has a : in first line will set indent to follow it on
12333// subsequent lines
12334void ConsoleReporter::printHeaderString(std::string const& _string, std::size_t indent) {
12335 std::size_t i = _string.find(": ");
12336 if (i != std::string::npos)
12337 i += 2;
12338 else
12339 i = 0;
12340 stream << Column(_string).indent(indent + i).initialIndent(indent) << '\n';
12341}
12342
12343struct SummaryColumn {
12344
12345 SummaryColumn( std::string _label, Colour::Code _colour )
12346 : label( std::move( _label ) ),
12347 colour( _colour ) {}
12348 SummaryColumn addRow( std::size_t count ) {
12349 ReusableStringStream rss;
12350 rss << count;
12351 std::string row = rss.str();
12352 for (auto& oldRow : rows) {
12353 while (oldRow.size() < row.size())
12354 oldRow = ' ' + oldRow;
12355 while (oldRow.size() > row.size())
12356 row = ' ' + row;
12357 }
12358 rows.push_back(row);
12359 return *this;
12360 }
12361
12362 std::string label;
12363 Colour::Code colour;
12364 std::vector<std::string> rows;
12365
12366};
12367
12368void ConsoleReporter::printTotals( Totals const& totals ) {
12369 if (totals.testCases.total() == 0) {
12370 stream << Colour(Colour::Warning) << "No tests ran\n";
12371 } else if (totals.assertions.total() > 0 && totals.testCases.allPassed()) {
12372 stream << Colour(Colour::ResultSuccess) << "All tests passed";
12373 stream << " ("
12374 << pluralise(totals.assertions.passed, "assertion") << " in "
12375 << pluralise(totals.testCases.passed, "test case") << ')'
12376 << '\n';
12377 } else {
12378
12379 std::vector<SummaryColumn> columns;
12380 columns.push_back(SummaryColumn("", Colour::None)
12381 .addRow(totals.testCases.total())
12382 .addRow(totals.assertions.total()));
12383 columns.push_back(SummaryColumn("passed", Colour::Success)
12384 .addRow(totals.testCases.passed)
12385 .addRow(totals.assertions.passed));
12386 columns.push_back(SummaryColumn("failed", Colour::ResultError)
12387 .addRow(totals.testCases.failed)
12388 .addRow(totals.assertions.failed));
12389 columns.push_back(SummaryColumn("failed as expected", Colour::ResultExpectedFailure)
12390 .addRow(totals.testCases.failedButOk)
12391 .addRow(totals.assertions.failedButOk));
12392
12393 printSummaryRow("test cases", columns, 0);
12394 printSummaryRow("assertions", columns, 1);
12395 }
12396}
12397void ConsoleReporter::printSummaryRow(std::string const& label, std::vector<SummaryColumn> const& cols, std::size_t row) {
12398 for (auto col : cols) {
12399 std::string value = col.rows[row];
12400 if (col.label.empty()) {
12401 stream << label << ": ";
12402 if (value != "0")
12403 stream << value;
12404 else
12405 stream << Colour(Colour::Warning) << "- none -";
12406 } else if (value != "0") {
12407 stream << Colour(Colour::LightGrey) << " | ";
12408 stream << Colour(col.colour)
12409 << value << ' ' << col.label;
12410 }
12411 }
12412 stream << '\n';
12413}
12414
12415void ConsoleReporter::printTotalsDivider(Totals const& totals) {
12416 if (totals.testCases.total() > 0) {
12417 std::size_t failedRatio = makeRatio(totals.testCases.failed, totals.testCases.total());
12418 std::size_t failedButOkRatio = makeRatio(totals.testCases.failedButOk, totals.testCases.total());
12419 std::size_t passedRatio = makeRatio(totals.testCases.passed, totals.testCases.total());
12420 while (failedRatio + failedButOkRatio + passedRatio < CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH - 1)
12421 findMax(failedRatio, failedButOkRatio, passedRatio)++;
12422 while (failedRatio + failedButOkRatio + passedRatio > CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH - 1)
12423 findMax(failedRatio, failedButOkRatio, passedRatio)--;
12424
12425 stream << Colour(Colour::Error) << std::string(failedRatio, '=');
12426 stream << Colour(Colour::ResultExpectedFailure) << std::string(failedButOkRatio, '=');
12427 if (totals.testCases.allPassed())
12428 stream << Colour(Colour::ResultSuccess) << std::string(passedRatio, '=');
12429 else
12430 stream << Colour(Colour::Success) << std::string(passedRatio, '=');
12431 } else {
12432 stream << Colour(Colour::Warning) << std::string(CATCH_CONFIG_CONSOLE_WIDTH - 1, '=');
12433 }
12434 stream << '\n';
12435}
12436void ConsoleReporter::printSummaryDivider() {
12437 stream << getLineOfChars<'-'>() << '\n';
12438}
12439
12440CATCH_REGISTER_REPORTER("console", ConsoleReporter)
12441
12442} // end namespace Catch
12443
12444#if defined(_MSC_VER)
12445#pragma warning(pop)
12446#endif
12447// end catch_reporter_console.cpp
12448// start catch_reporter_junit.cpp
12449
12450#include <cassert>
12451#include <sstream>
12452#include <ctime>
12453#include <algorithm>
12454
12455namespace Catch {
12456
12457 namespace {
12458 std::string getCurrentTimestamp() {
12459 // Beware, this is not reentrant because of backward compatibility issues
12460 // Also, UTC only, again because of backward compatibility (%z is C++11)
12461 time_t rawtime;
12462 std::time(&rawtime);
12463 auto const timeStampSize = sizeof("2017-01-16T17:06:45Z");
12464
12465#ifdef _MSC_VER
12466 std::tm timeInfo = {};
12467 gmtime_s(&timeInfo, &rawtime);
12468#else
12469 std::tm* timeInfo;
12470 timeInfo = std::gmtime(&rawtime);
12471#endif
12472
12473 char timeStamp[timeStampSize];
12474 const char * const fmt = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ";
12475
12476#ifdef _MSC_VER
12477 std::strftime(timeStamp, timeStampSize, fmt, &timeInfo);
12478#else
12479 std::strftime(timeStamp, timeStampSize, fmt, timeInfo);
12480#endif
12481 return std::string(timeStamp);
12482 }
12483
12484 std::string fileNameTag(const std::vector<std::string> &tags) {
12485 auto it = std::find_if(begin(tags),
12486 end(tags),
12487 [] (std::string const& tag) {return tag.front() == '#'; });
12488 if (it != tags.end())
12489 return it->substr(1);
12490 return std::string();
12491 }
12492 } // anonymous namespace
12493
12494 JunitReporter::JunitReporter( ReporterConfig const& _config )
12495 : CumulativeReporterBase( _config ),
12496 xml( _config.stream() )
12497 {
12498 m_reporterPrefs.shouldRedirectStdOut = true;
12499 m_reporterPrefs.shouldReportAllAssertions = true;
12500 }
12501
12502 JunitReporter::~JunitReporter() {}
12503
12504 std::string JunitReporter::getDescription() {
12505 return "Reports test results in an XML format that looks like Ant's junitreport target";
12506 }
12507
12508 void JunitReporter::noMatchingTestCases( std::string const& /*spec*/ ) {}
12509
12510 void JunitReporter::testRunStarting( TestRunInfo const& runInfo ) {
12511 CumulativeReporterBase::testRunStarting( runInfo );
12512 xml.startElement( "testsuites" );
12513 }
12514
12515 void JunitReporter::testGroupStarting( GroupInfo const& groupInfo ) {
12516 suiteTimer.start();
12517 stdOutForSuite.clear();
12518 stdErrForSuite.clear();
12519 unexpectedExceptions = 0;
12520 CumulativeReporterBase::testGroupStarting( groupInfo );
12521 }
12522
12523 void JunitReporter::testCaseStarting( TestCaseInfo const& testCaseInfo ) {
12524 m_okToFail = testCaseInfo.okToFail();
12525 }
12526
12527 bool JunitReporter::assertionEnded( AssertionStats const& assertionStats ) {
12528 if( assertionStats.assertionResult.getResultType() == ResultWas::ThrewException && !m_okToFail )
12529 unexpectedExceptions++;
12530 return CumulativeReporterBase::assertionEnded( assertionStats );
12531 }
12532
12533 void JunitReporter::testCaseEnded( TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats ) {
12534 stdOutForSuite += testCaseStats.stdOut;
12535 stdErrForSuite += testCaseStats.stdErr;
12536 CumulativeReporterBase::testCaseEnded( testCaseStats );
12537 }
12538
12539 void JunitReporter::testGroupEnded( TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats ) {
12540 double suiteTime = suiteTimer.getElapsedSeconds();
12541 CumulativeReporterBase::testGroupEnded( testGroupStats );
12542 writeGroup( *m_testGroups.back(), suiteTime );
12543 }
12544
12545 void JunitReporter::testRunEndedCumulative() {
12546 xml.endElement();
12547 }
12548
12549 void JunitReporter::writeGroup( TestGroupNode const& groupNode, double suiteTime ) {
12550 XmlWriter::ScopedElement e = xml.scopedElement( "testsuite" );
12551 TestGroupStats const& stats = groupNode.value;
12552 xml.writeAttribute( "name", stats.groupInfo.name );
12553 xml.writeAttribute( "errors", unexpectedExceptions );
12554 xml.writeAttribute( "failures", stats.totals.assertions.failed-unexpectedExceptions );
12555 xml.writeAttribute( "tests", stats.totals.assertions.total() );
12556 xml.writeAttribute( "hostname", "tbd" ); // !TBD
12557 if( m_config->showDurations() == ShowDurations::Never )
12558 xml.writeAttribute( "time", "" );
12559 else
12560 xml.writeAttribute( "time", suiteTime );
12561 xml.writeAttribute( "timestamp", getCurrentTimestamp() );
12562
12563 // Write test cases
12564 for( auto const& child : groupNode.children )
12565 writeTestCase( *child );
12566
12567 xml.scopedElement( "system-out" ).writeText( trim( stdOutForSuite ), false );
12568 xml.scopedElement( "system-err" ).writeText( trim( stdErrForSuite ), false );
12569 }
12570
12571 void JunitReporter::writeTestCase( TestCaseNode const& testCaseNode ) {
12572 TestCaseStats const& stats = testCaseNode.value;
12573
12574 // All test cases have exactly one section - which represents the
12575 // test case itself. That section may have 0-n nested sections
12576 assert( testCaseNode.children.size() == 1 );
12577 SectionNode const& rootSection = *testCaseNode.children.front();
12578
12579 std::string className = stats.testInfo.className;
12580
12581 if( className.empty() ) {
12582 className = fileNameTag(stats.testInfo.tags);
12583 if ( className.empty() )
12584 className = "global";
12585 }
12586
12587 if ( !m_config->name().empty() )
12588 className = m_config->name() + "." + className;
12589
12590 writeSection( className, "", rootSection );
12591 }
12592
12593 void JunitReporter::writeSection( std::string const& className,
12594 std::string const& rootName,
12595 SectionNode const& sectionNode ) {
12596 std::string name = trim( sectionNode.stats.sectionInfo.name );
12597 if( !rootName.empty() )
12598 name = rootName + '/' + name;
12599
12600 if( !sectionNode.assertions.empty() ||
12601 !sectionNode.stdOut.empty() ||
12602 !sectionNode.stdErr.empty() ) {
12603 XmlWriter::ScopedElement e = xml.scopedElement( "testcase" );
12604 if( className.empty() ) {
12605 xml.writeAttribute( "classname", name );
12606 xml.writeAttribute( "name", "root" );
12607 }
12608 else {
12609 xml.writeAttribute( "classname", className );
12610 xml.writeAttribute( "name", name );
12611 }
12612 xml.writeAttribute( "time", ::Catch::Detail::stringify( sectionNode.stats.durationInSeconds ) );
12613
12614 writeAssertions( sectionNode );
12615
12616 if( !sectionNode.stdOut.empty() )
12617 xml.scopedElement( "system-out" ).writeText( trim( sectionNode.stdOut ), false );
12618 if( !sectionNode.stdErr.empty() )
12619 xml.scopedElement( "system-err" ).writeText( trim( sectionNode.stdErr ), false );
12620 }
12621 for( auto const& childNode : sectionNode.childSections )
12622 if( className.empty() )
12623 writeSection( name, "", *childNode );
12624 else
12625 writeSection( className, name, *childNode );
12626 }
12627
12628 void JunitReporter::writeAssertions( SectionNode const& sectionNode ) {
12629 for( auto const& assertion : sectionNode.assertions )
12630 writeAssertion( assertion );
12631 }
12632
12633 void JunitReporter::writeAssertion( AssertionStats const& stats ) {
12634 AssertionResult const& result = stats.assertionResult;
12635 if( !result.isOk() ) {
12636 std::string elementName;
12637 switch( result.getResultType() ) {
12638 case ResultWas::ThrewException:
12639 case ResultWas::FatalErrorCondition:
12640 elementName = "error";
12641 break;
12642 case ResultWas::ExplicitFailure:
12643 elementName = "failure";
12644 break;
12645 case ResultWas::ExpressionFailed:
12646 elementName = "failure";
12647 break;
12648 case ResultWas::DidntThrowException:
12649 elementName = "failure";
12650 break;
12651
12652 // We should never see these here:
12653 case ResultWas::Info:
12654 case ResultWas::Warning:
12655 case ResultWas::Ok:
12656 case ResultWas::Unknown:
12657 case ResultWas::FailureBit:
12658 case ResultWas::Exception:
12659 elementName = "internalError";
12660 break;
12661 }
12662
12663 XmlWriter::ScopedElement e = xml.scopedElement( elementName );
12664
12665 xml.writeAttribute( "message", result.getExpandedExpression() );
12666 xml.writeAttribute( "type", result.getTestMacroName() );
12667
12668 ReusableStringStream rss;
12669 if( !result.getMessage().empty() )
12670 rss << result.getMessage() << '\n';
12671 for( auto const& msg : stats.infoMessages )
12672 if( msg.type == ResultWas::Info )
12673 rss << msg.message << '\n';
12674
12675 rss << "at " << result.getSourceInfo();
12676 xml.writeText( rss.str(), false );
12677 }
12678 }
12679
12680 CATCH_REGISTER_REPORTER( "junit", JunitReporter )
12681
12682} // end namespace Catch
12683// end catch_reporter_junit.cpp
12684// start catch_reporter_listening.cpp
12685
12686#include <cassert>
12687
12688namespace Catch {
12689
12690 ListeningReporter::ListeningReporter() {
12691 // We will assume that listeners will always want all assertions
12692 m_preferences.shouldReportAllAssertions = true;
12693 }
12694
12695 void ListeningReporter::addListener( IStreamingReporterPtr&& listener ) {
12696 m_listeners.push_back( std::move( listener ) );
12697 }
12698
12699 void ListeningReporter::addReporter(IStreamingReporterPtr&& reporter) {
12700 assert(!m_reporter && "Listening reporter can wrap only 1 real reporter");
12701 m_reporter = std::move( reporter );
12702 m_preferences.shouldRedirectStdOut = m_reporter->getPreferences().shouldRedirectStdOut;
12703 }
12704
12705 ReporterPreferences ListeningReporter::getPreferences() const {
12706 return m_preferences;
12707 }
12708
12709 std::set<Verbosity> ListeningReporter::getSupportedVerbosities() {
12710 return std::set<Verbosity>{ };
12711 }
12712
12713 void ListeningReporter::noMatchingTestCases( std::string const& spec ) {
12714 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12715 listener->noMatchingTestCases( spec );
12716 }
12717 m_reporter->noMatchingTestCases( spec );
12718 }
12719
12720 void ListeningReporter::benchmarkStarting( BenchmarkInfo const& benchmarkInfo ) {
12721 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12722 listener->benchmarkStarting( benchmarkInfo );
12723 }
12724 m_reporter->benchmarkStarting( benchmarkInfo );
12725 }
12726 void ListeningReporter::benchmarkEnded( BenchmarkStats const& benchmarkStats ) {
12727 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12728 listener->benchmarkEnded( benchmarkStats );
12729 }
12730 m_reporter->benchmarkEnded( benchmarkStats );
12731 }
12732
12733 void ListeningReporter::testRunStarting( TestRunInfo const& testRunInfo ) {
12734 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12735 listener->testRunStarting( testRunInfo );
12736 }
12737 m_reporter->testRunStarting( testRunInfo );
12738 }
12739
12740 void ListeningReporter::testGroupStarting( GroupInfo const& groupInfo ) {
12741 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12742 listener->testGroupStarting( groupInfo );
12743 }
12744 m_reporter->testGroupStarting( groupInfo );
12745 }
12746
12747 void ListeningReporter::testCaseStarting( TestCaseInfo const& testInfo ) {
12748 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12749 listener->testCaseStarting( testInfo );
12750 }
12751 m_reporter->testCaseStarting( testInfo );
12752 }
12753
12754 void ListeningReporter::sectionStarting( SectionInfo const& sectionInfo ) {
12755 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12756 listener->sectionStarting( sectionInfo );
12757 }
12758 m_reporter->sectionStarting( sectionInfo );
12759 }
12760
12761 void ListeningReporter::assertionStarting( AssertionInfo const& assertionInfo ) {
12762 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12763 listener->assertionStarting( assertionInfo );
12764 }
12765 m_reporter->assertionStarting( assertionInfo );
12766 }
12767
12768 // The return value indicates if the messages buffer should be cleared:
12769 bool ListeningReporter::assertionEnded( AssertionStats const& assertionStats ) {
12770 for( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12771 static_cast<void>( listener->assertionEnded( assertionStats ) );
12772 }
12773 return m_reporter->assertionEnded( assertionStats );
12774 }
12775
12776 void ListeningReporter::sectionEnded( SectionStats const& sectionStats ) {
12777 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12778 listener->sectionEnded( sectionStats );
12779 }
12780 m_reporter->sectionEnded( sectionStats );
12781 }
12782
12783 void ListeningReporter::testCaseEnded( TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats ) {
12784 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12785 listener->testCaseEnded( testCaseStats );
12786 }
12787 m_reporter->testCaseEnded( testCaseStats );
12788 }
12789
12790 void ListeningReporter::testGroupEnded( TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats ) {
12791 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12792 listener->testGroupEnded( testGroupStats );
12793 }
12794 m_reporter->testGroupEnded( testGroupStats );
12795 }
12796
12797 void ListeningReporter::testRunEnded( TestRunStats const& testRunStats ) {
12798 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12799 listener->testRunEnded( testRunStats );
12800 }
12801 m_reporter->testRunEnded( testRunStats );
12802 }
12803
12804 void ListeningReporter::skipTest( TestCaseInfo const& testInfo ) {
12805 for ( auto const& listener : m_listeners ) {
12806 listener->skipTest( testInfo );
12807 }
12808 m_reporter->skipTest( testInfo );
12809 }
12810
12811 bool ListeningReporter::isMulti() const {
12812 return true;
12813 }
12814
12815} // end namespace Catch
12816// end catch_reporter_listening.cpp
12817// start catch_reporter_xml.cpp
12818
12819#if defined(_MSC_VER)
12820#pragma warning(push)
12821#pragma warning(disable:4061) // Not all labels are EXPLICITLY handled in switch
12822 // Note that 4062 (not all labels are handled
12823 // and default is missing) is enabled
12824#endif
12825
12826namespace Catch {
12827 XmlReporter::XmlReporter( ReporterConfig const& _config )
12828 : StreamingReporterBase( _config ),
12829 m_xml(_config.stream())
12830 {
12831 m_reporterPrefs.shouldRedirectStdOut = true;
12832 m_reporterPrefs.shouldReportAllAssertions = true;
12833 }
12834
12835 XmlReporter::~XmlReporter() = default;
12836
12837 std::string XmlReporter::getDescription() {
12838 return "Reports test results as an XML document";
12839 }
12840
12841 std::string XmlReporter::getStylesheetRef() const {
12842 return std::string();
12843 }
12844
12845 void XmlReporter::writeSourceInfo( SourceLineInfo const& sourceInfo ) {
12846 m_xml
12847 .writeAttribute( "filename", sourceInfo.file )
12848 .writeAttribute( "line", sourceInfo.line );
12849 }
12850
12851 void XmlReporter::noMatchingTestCases( std::string const& s ) {
12852 StreamingReporterBase::noMatchingTestCases( s );
12853 }
12854
12855 void XmlReporter::testRunStarting( TestRunInfo const& testInfo ) {
12856 StreamingReporterBase::testRunStarting( testInfo );
12857 std::string stylesheetRef = getStylesheetRef();
12858 if( !stylesheetRef.empty() )
12859 m_xml.writeStylesheetRef( stylesheetRef );
12860 m_xml.startElement( "Catch" );
12861 if( !m_config->name().empty() )
12862 m_xml.writeAttribute( "name", m_config->name() );
12863 }
12864
12865 void XmlReporter::testGroupStarting( GroupInfo const& groupInfo ) {
12866 StreamingReporterBase::testGroupStarting( groupInfo );
12867 m_xml.startElement( "Group" )
12868 .writeAttribute( "name", groupInfo.name );
12869 }
12870
12871 void XmlReporter::testCaseStarting( TestCaseInfo const& testInfo ) {
12872 StreamingReporterBase::testCaseStarting(testInfo);
12873 m_xml.startElement( "TestCase" )
12874 .writeAttribute( "name", trim( testInfo.name ) )
12875 .writeAttribute( "description", testInfo.description )
12876 .writeAttribute( "tags", testInfo.tagsAsString() );
12877
12878 writeSourceInfo( testInfo.lineInfo );
12879
