12880 if ( m_config->showDurations() == ShowDurations::Always )
12881 m_testCaseTimer.start();
12882 m_xml.ensureTagClosed();
12883 }
12884
12885 void XmlReporter::sectionStarting( SectionInfo const& sectionInfo ) {
12886 StreamingReporterBase::sectionStarting( sectionInfo );
12887 if( m_sectionDepth++ > 0 ) {
12888 m_xml.startElement( "Section" )
12889 .writeAttribute( "name", trim( sectionInfo.name ) );
12890 writeSourceInfo( sectionInfo.lineInfo );
12891 m_xml.ensureTagClosed();
12892 }
12893 }
12894
12895 void XmlReporter::assertionStarting( AssertionInfo const& ) { }
12896
12897 bool XmlReporter::assertionEnded( AssertionStats const& assertionStats ) {
12898
12899 AssertionResult const& result = assertionStats.assertionResult;
12900
12901 bool includeResults = m_config->includeSuccessfulResults() || !result.isOk();
12902
12903 if( includeResults || result.getResultType() == ResultWas::Warning ) {
12904 // Print any info messages in <Info> tags.
12905 for( auto const& msg : assertionStats.infoMessages ) {
12906 if( msg.type == ResultWas::Info && includeResults ) {
12907 m_xml.scopedElement( "Info" )
12908 .writeText( msg.message );
12909 } else if ( msg.type == ResultWas::Warning ) {
12910 m_xml.scopedElement( "Warning" )
12911 .writeText( msg.message );
12912 }
12913 }
12914 }
12915
12916 // Drop out if result was successful but we're not printing them.
12917 if( !includeResults && result.getResultType() != ResultWas::Warning )
12918 return true;
12919
12920 // Print the expression if there is one.
12921 if( result.hasExpression() ) {
12922 m_xml.startElement( "Expression" )
12923 .writeAttribute( "success", result.succeeded() )
12924 .writeAttribute( "type", result.getTestMacroName() );
12925
12926 writeSourceInfo( result.getSourceInfo() );
12927
12928 m_xml.scopedElement( "Original" )
12929 .writeText( result.getExpression() );
12930 m_xml.scopedElement( "Expanded" )
12931 .writeText( result.getExpandedExpression() );
12932 }
12933
12934 // And... Print a result applicable to each result type.
12935 switch( result.getResultType() ) {
12936 case ResultWas::ThrewException:
12937 m_xml.startElement( "Exception" );
12938 writeSourceInfo( result.getSourceInfo() );
12939 m_xml.writeText( result.getMessage() );
12940 m_xml.endElement();
12941 break;
12942 case ResultWas::FatalErrorCondition:
12943 m_xml.startElement( "FatalErrorCondition" );
12944 writeSourceInfo( result.getSourceInfo() );
12945 m_xml.writeText( result.getMessage() );
12946 m_xml.endElement();
12947 break;
12948 case ResultWas::Info:
12949 m_xml.scopedElement( "Info" )
12950 .writeText( result.getMessage() );
12951 break;
12952 case ResultWas::Warning:
12953 // Warning will already have been written
12954 break;
12955 case ResultWas::ExplicitFailure:
12956 m_xml.startElement( "Failure" );
12957 writeSourceInfo( result.getSourceInfo() );
12958 m_xml.writeText( result.getMessage() );
12959 m_xml.endElement();
12960 break;
12961 default:
12962 break;
12963 }
12964
12965 if( result.hasExpression() )
12966 m_xml.endElement();
12967
12968 return true;
12969 }
12970
12971 void XmlReporter::sectionEnded( SectionStats const& sectionStats ) {
12972 StreamingReporterBase::sectionEnded( sectionStats );
12973 if( --m_sectionDepth > 0 ) {
12974 XmlWriter::ScopedElement e = m_xml.scopedElement( "OverallResults" );
12975 e.writeAttribute( "successes", sectionStats.assertions.passed );
12976 e.writeAttribute( "failures", sectionStats.assertions.failed );
12977 e.writeAttribute( "expectedFailures", sectionStats.assertions.failedButOk );
12978
12979 if ( m_config->showDurations() == ShowDurations::Always )
12980 e.writeAttribute( "durationInSeconds", sectionStats.durationInSeconds );
12981
12982 m_xml.endElement();
12983 }
12984 }
12985
12986 void XmlReporter::testCaseEnded( TestCaseStats const& testCaseStats ) {
12987 StreamingReporterBase::testCaseEnded( testCaseStats );
12988 XmlWriter::ScopedElement e = m_xml.scopedElement( "OverallResult" );
12989 e.writeAttribute( "success", testCaseStats.totals.assertions.allOk() );
12990
12991 if ( m_config->showDurations() == ShowDurations::Always )
12992 e.writeAttribute( "durationInSeconds", m_testCaseTimer.getElapsedSeconds() );
12993
12994 if( !testCaseStats.stdOut.empty() )
12995 m_xml.scopedElement( "StdOut" ).writeText( trim( testCaseStats.stdOut ), false );
12996 if( !testCaseStats.stdErr.empty() )
12997 m_xml.scopedElement( "StdErr" ).writeText( trim( testCaseStats.stdErr ), false );
12998
12999 m_xml.endElement();
13000 }
13001
13002 void XmlReporter::testGroupEnded( TestGroupStats const& testGroupStats ) {
13003 StreamingReporterBase::testGroupEnded( testGroupStats );
13004 // TODO: Check testGroupStats.aborting and act accordingly.
13005 m_xml.scopedElement( "OverallResults" )
13006 .writeAttribute( "successes", testGroupStats.totals.assertions.passed )
13007 .writeAttribute( "failures", testGroupStats.totals.assertions.failed )
13008 .writeAttribute( "expectedFailures", testGroupStats.totals.assertions.failedButOk );
13009 m_xml.endElement();
13010 }
13011
13012 void XmlReporter::testRunEnded( TestRunStats const& testRunStats ) {
13013 StreamingReporterBase::testRunEnded( testRunStats );
13014 m_xml.scopedElement( "OverallResults" )
13015 .writeAttribute( "successes", testRunStats.totals.assertions.passed )
13016 .writeAttribute( "failures", testRunStats.totals.assertions.failed )
13017 .writeAttribute( "expectedFailures", testRunStats.totals.assertions.failedButOk );
13018 m_xml.endElement();
13019 }
13020
13021 CATCH_REGISTER_REPORTER( "xml", XmlReporter )
13022
13023} // end namespace Catch
13024
13025#if defined(_MSC_VER)
13026#pragma warning(pop)
13027#endif
13028// end catch_reporter_xml.cpp
13029
13030namespace Catch {
13031 LeakDetector leakDetector;
13032}
13033
13034#ifdef __clang__
13035#pragma clang diagnostic pop
13036#endif
13037
13038// end catch_impl.hpp
13039#endif
13040
13041#ifdef CATCH_CONFIG_MAIN
13042// start catch_default_main.hpp
13043
13044#ifndef __OBJC__
13045
13046#if defined(CATCH_CONFIG_WCHAR) && defined(WIN32) && defined(_UNICODE) && !defined(DO_NOT_USE_WMAIN)
13047// Standard C/C++ Win32 Unicode wmain entry point
13048extern "C" int wmain (int argc, wchar_t * argv[], wchar_t * []) {
13049#else
13050// Standard C/C++ main entry point
13051int main (int argc, char * argv[]) {
13052#endif
13053
13054 return Catch::Session().run( argc, argv );
13055}
13056
13057#else // __OBJC__
13058
13059// Objective-C entry point
13060int main (int argc, char * const argv[]) {
13061#if !CATCH_ARC_ENABLED
13062 NSAutoreleasePool * pool = [[NSAutoreleasePool alloc] init];
13063#endif
13064
13065 Catch::registerTestMethods();
13066 int result = Catch::Session().run( argc, (char**)argv );
13067
13068#if !CATCH_ARC_ENABLED
13069 [pool drain];
13070#endif
13071
13072 return result;
13073}
13074
13075#endif // __OBJC__
13076
13077// end catch_default_main.hpp
13078#endif
13079
13080#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_IMPL_ONLY)
13081
13082#ifdef CLARA_CONFIG_MAIN_NOT_DEFINED
13083# undef CLARA_CONFIG_MAIN
13084#endif
13085
13086#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE)
13088// If this config identifier is defined then all CATCH macros are prefixed with CATCH_
13089#ifdef CATCH_CONFIG_PREFIX_ALL
13090
13091#define CATCH_REQUIRE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CATCH_REQUIRE", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13092#define CATCH_REQUIRE_FALSE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CATCH_REQUIRE_FALSE", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal | Catch::ResultDisposition::FalseTest, __VA_ARGS__ )
13093
13094#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS( "CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, "", __VA_ARGS__ )
13095#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_AS( expr, exceptionType ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_AS( "CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_AS", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, expr )
13096#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_WITH( expr, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_STR_MATCHES( "CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_WITH", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, matcher, expr )
13097#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13098#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_MATCHES( expr, exceptionType, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_MATCHES( "CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_MATCHES", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, matcher, expr )
13099#endif// CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13100#define CATCH_REQUIRE_NOTHROW( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_NO_THROW( "CATCH_REQUIRE_NOTHROW", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13101
13102#define CATCH_CHECK( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CATCH_CHECK", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13103#define CATCH_CHECK_FALSE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CATCH_CHECK_FALSE", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure | Catch::ResultDisposition::FalseTest, __VA_ARGS__ )
13104#define CATCH_CHECKED_IF( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_IF( "CATCH_CHECKED_IF", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13105#define CATCH_CHECKED_ELSE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_ELSE( "CATCH_CHECKED_ELSE", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13106#define CATCH_CHECK_NOFAIL( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CATCH_CHECK_NOFAIL", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure | Catch::ResultDisposition::SuppressFail, __VA_ARGS__ )
13107
13108#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS( "CATCH_CHECK_THROWS", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, "", __VA_ARGS__ )
13109#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_AS( expr, exceptionType ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_AS( "CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_AS", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, expr )
13110#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_WITH( expr, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_STR_MATCHES( "CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_WITH", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, matcher, expr )
13111#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13112#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_MATCHES( expr, exceptionType, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_MATCHES( "CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_MATCHES", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, matcher, expr )
13113#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13114#define CATCH_CHECK_NOTHROW( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_NO_THROW( "CATCH_CHECK_NOTHROW", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13115
13116#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13117#define CATCH_CHECK_THAT( arg, matcher ) INTERNAL_CHECK_THAT( "CATCH_CHECK_THAT", matcher, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, arg )
13118
13119#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THAT( arg, matcher ) INTERNAL_CHECK_THAT( "CATCH_REQUIRE_THAT", matcher, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, arg )
13120#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13121
13122#define CATCH_INFO( msg ) INTERNAL_CATCH_INFO( "CATCH_INFO", msg )
13123#define CATCH_WARN( msg ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "CATCH_WARN", Catch::ResultWas::Warning, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, msg )
13124#define CATCH_CAPTURE( msg ) INTERNAL_CATCH_INFO( "CATCH_CAPTURE", #msg " := " << ::Catch::Detail::stringify(msg) )
13125
13126#define CATCH_TEST_CASE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TESTCASE( __VA_ARGS__ )
13127#define CATCH_TEST_CASE_METHOD( className, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST_CASE_METHOD( className, __VA_ARGS__ )
13128#define CATCH_METHOD_AS_TEST_CASE( method, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_METHOD_AS_TEST_CASE( method, __VA_ARGS__ )
13129#define CATCH_REGISTER_TEST_CASE( Function, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_REGISTER_TESTCASE( Function, __VA_ARGS__ )
13130#define CATCH_SECTION( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_SECTION( __VA_ARGS__ )
13131#define CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( __VA_ARGS__ )
13132#define CATCH_FAIL( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "CATCH_FAIL", Catch::ResultWas::ExplicitFailure, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13133#define CATCH_FAIL_CHECK( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "CATCH_FAIL_CHECK", Catch::ResultWas::ExplicitFailure, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13134#define CATCH_SUCCEED( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "CATCH_SUCCEED", Catch::ResultWas::Ok, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13135
13136#define CATCH_ANON_TEST_CASE() INTERNAL_CATCH_TESTCASE()
13137
13138// "BDD-style" convenience wrappers
13139#define CATCH_SCENARIO( ... ) CATCH_TEST_CASE( "Scenario: " __VA_ARGS__ )
13140#define CATCH_SCENARIO_METHOD( className, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST_CASE_METHOD( className, "Scenario: " __VA_ARGS__ )
13141#define CATCH_GIVEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " Given: " << desc )
13142#define CATCH_WHEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " When: " << desc )
13143#define CATCH_AND_WHEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( "And when: " << desc )
13144#define CATCH_THEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " Then: " << desc )
13145#define CATCH_AND_THEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " And: " << desc )
13146
13147// If CATCH_CONFIG_PREFIX_ALL is not defined then the CATCH_ prefix is not required
13148#else
13149
13150#define REQUIRE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "REQUIRE", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13151#define REQUIRE_FALSE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "REQUIRE_FALSE", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal | Catch::ResultDisposition::FalseTest, __VA_ARGS__ )
13152
13153#define REQUIRE_THROWS( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS( "REQUIRE_THROWS", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13154#define REQUIRE_THROWS_AS( expr, exceptionType ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_AS( "REQUIRE_THROWS_AS", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, expr )
13155#define REQUIRE_THROWS_WITH( expr, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_STR_MATCHES( "REQUIRE_THROWS_WITH", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, matcher, expr )
13156#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13157#define REQUIRE_THROWS_MATCHES( expr, exceptionType, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_MATCHES( "REQUIRE_THROWS_MATCHES", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, matcher, expr )
13158#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13159#define REQUIRE_NOTHROW( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_NO_THROW( "REQUIRE_NOTHROW", Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13160
13161#define CHECK( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CHECK", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13162#define CHECK_FALSE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CHECK_FALSE", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure | Catch::ResultDisposition::FalseTest, __VA_ARGS__ )
13163#define CHECKED_IF( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_IF( "CHECKED_IF", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13164#define CHECKED_ELSE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_ELSE( "CHECKED_ELSE", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13165#define CHECK_NOFAIL( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST( "CHECK_NOFAIL", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure | Catch::ResultDisposition::SuppressFail, __VA_ARGS__ )
13166
13167#define CHECK_THROWS( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS( "CHECK_THROWS", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13168#define CHECK_THROWS_AS( expr, exceptionType ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_AS( "CHECK_THROWS_AS", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, expr )
13169#define CHECK_THROWS_WITH( expr, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_STR_MATCHES( "CHECK_THROWS_WITH", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, matcher, expr )
13170#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13171#define CHECK_THROWS_MATCHES( expr, exceptionType, matcher ) INTERNAL_CATCH_THROWS_MATCHES( "CHECK_THROWS_MATCHES", exceptionType, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, matcher, expr )
13172#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13173#define CHECK_NOTHROW( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_NO_THROW( "CHECK_NOTHROW", Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13174
13175#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13176#define CHECK_THAT( arg, matcher ) INTERNAL_CHECK_THAT( "CHECK_THAT", matcher, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, arg )
13177
13178#define REQUIRE_THAT( arg, matcher ) INTERNAL_CHECK_THAT( "REQUIRE_THAT", matcher, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, arg )
13179#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13180
13181#define INFO( msg ) INTERNAL_CATCH_INFO( "INFO", msg )
13182#define WARN( msg ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "WARN", Catch::ResultWas::Warning, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, msg )
13183#define CAPTURE( msg ) INTERNAL_CATCH_INFO( "CAPTURE", #msg " := " << ::Catch::Detail::stringify(msg) )
13184
13185#define TEST_CASE( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TESTCASE( __VA_ARGS__ )
13186#define TEST_CASE_METHOD( className, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST_CASE_METHOD( className, __VA_ARGS__ )
13187#define METHOD_AS_TEST_CASE( method, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_METHOD_AS_TEST_CASE( method, __VA_ARGS__ )
13188#define REGISTER_TEST_CASE( Function, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_REGISTER_TESTCASE( Function, __VA_ARGS__ )
13189#define SECTION( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_SECTION( __VA_ARGS__ )
13190#define DYNAMIC_SECTION( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( __VA_ARGS__ )
13191#define FAIL( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "FAIL", Catch::ResultWas::ExplicitFailure, Catch::ResultDisposition::Normal, __VA_ARGS__ )
13192#define FAIL_CHECK( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "FAIL_CHECK", Catch::ResultWas::ExplicitFailure, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13193#define SUCCEED( ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_MSG( "SUCCEED", Catch::ResultWas::Ok, Catch::ResultDisposition::ContinueOnFailure, __VA_ARGS__ )
13194#define ANON_TEST_CASE() INTERNAL_CATCH_TESTCASE()
13195
13196#endif
13197
13198#define CATCH_TRANSLATE_EXCEPTION( signature ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TRANSLATE_EXCEPTION( signature )
13199
13200// "BDD-style" convenience wrappers
13201#define SCENARIO( ... ) TEST_CASE( "Scenario: " __VA_ARGS__ )
13202#define SCENARIO_METHOD( className, ... ) INTERNAL_CATCH_TEST_CASE_METHOD( className, "Scenario: " __VA_ARGS__ )
13203
13204#define GIVEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " Given: " << desc )
13205#define WHEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " When: " << desc )
13206#define AND_WHEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( "And when: " << desc )
13207#define THEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " Then: " << desc )
13208#define AND_THEN( desc ) INTERNAL_CATCH_DYNAMIC_SECTION( " And: " << desc )
13209
13210using Catch::Detail::Approx;
13211
13212#else // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE
13213
13215// If this config identifier is defined then all CATCH macros are prefixed with CATCH_
13216#ifdef CATCH_CONFIG_PREFIX_ALL
13217
13218#define CATCH_REQUIRE( ... ) (void)(0)
13219#define CATCH_REQUIRE_FALSE( ... ) (void)(0)
13220
13221#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS( ... ) (void)(0)
13222#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_AS( expr, exceptionType ) (void)(0)
13223#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_WITH( expr, matcher ) (void)(0)
13224#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13225#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THROWS_MATCHES( expr, exceptionType, matcher ) (void)(0)
13226#endif// CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13227#define CATCH_REQUIRE_NOTHROW( ... ) (void)(0)
13228
13229#define CATCH_CHECK( ... ) (void)(0)
13230#define CATCH_CHECK_FALSE( ... ) (void)(0)
13231#define CATCH_CHECKED_IF( ... ) if (__VA_ARGS__)
13232#define CATCH_CHECKED_ELSE( ... ) if (!(__VA_ARGS__))
13233#define CATCH_CHECK_NOFAIL( ... ) (void)(0)
13234
13235#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS( ... ) (void)(0)
13236#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_AS( expr, exceptionType ) (void)(0)
13237#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_WITH( expr, matcher ) (void)(0)
13238#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13239#define CATCH_CHECK_THROWS_MATCHES( expr, exceptionType, matcher ) (void)(0)
13240#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13241#define CATCH_CHECK_NOTHROW( ... ) (void)(0)
13242
13243#if !defined(CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS)
13244#define CATCH_CHECK_THAT( arg, matcher ) (void)(0)
13245
13246#define CATCH_REQUIRE_THAT( arg, matcher ) (void)(0)
13247#endif // CATCH_CONFIG_DISABLE_MATCHERS
13248
13249#define CATCH_INFO( msg ) (void)(0)
13250#define CATCH_WARN( msg ) (void)(0)
